clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | Early Voting Starts Friday (Speaker Todd Gilbert) | | It has been an honor representing you in House District 56. I have learned a lot, solved many problems as a team, and call many fellow legislators my friend. Thank you Speaker Todd Gilbert, R-Shenandoah for the shoutout last week in your == I have thoroughly enjoyed fighting to improve Virginia as a Member of the Republican Caucus in the Virginia House of Delegates. Now I am headed to the State Senate. Though we have made progress, we have much work to do to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Destructive and I would even go so far to say "anti-American" Democrat policies to include un-Constitutional mandates have given fellow Virginians countless reasons to vote Republican. I am proud to tell you all fellow Republican legislators in the House and the Senate are united. Isn't it great we have a Republican Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General? Let's all work hard, stay on message, and get the win this November so "we" can un-California Virginia! | Congratulations Delegate Rob Bell | == | It has been an honor serving with Delegate Rob Bell. He set a standard of service in the General Assembly few could match. Thank you for being a strong voice, especially for victims of crime. We are excited to hear Rob now works in the AG's office and will continue service to our Commonwealth! 💪🇺🇸🙏 == | Early Voting In-Person Friday | Early Voting In-Person at your local registrar's office begins this Friday September 22. Please spread the word. == | Who's On My Ballot? | == | | | == ---|--- | Thanks to you we earned the Republican nomination for State Senate District Ten with one of the largest 4-way convention wins in Virginia history! By putting God first, "We" did this! Now it is time to "SEAL the deal". Let's finish what we started. I am excited to be at the top of the ticket in 10 counties for Senate District 10 this November. My Democrat opponent is campaigning across the district, we are seeing his signs popping up, he is speaking at events, and he is running a write-in campaign against me. Let's not take this for granted, please do everything you can to ensure we get all of your friends and family to vote. God willing, I will win in November and be the first Goochland State Senator in history! Want a yard sign? Email john@mcguireforvirginia.com We have a whole lot of Republicans running across Virginia that need our help. Go to == and enter your address to find out who's on your ballot, where to vote, and more. | == | Keep it Positive! | With the right attitude and effort we can win. Right now we are in a very tough General Election and it is going to take everyone working together. It only takes a few people to mess things up. Sadly, we have a few 5th Congrssional District Republicans including a few in leadership publicly taking pot shots at me and acting a fool. Although most 5th members are professional, I wrongly figured those few would end their antics after the convention. This behavior is unbecoming, it is not productive, and it helps Democrats. We can do better. I normally ignore "keyboard warriors" but we are receiving messages of disgust from across the district from constituents (We the People) who want us to win. If you have a concern, let's meet in person and discuss it like adults. Considering the future of our republic is at stake right this very moment, we must do better. Unless you want Democrats to win, your message to Republicans taking public pot shots at fellow Republicans, should be "knock it off". Our focus is on winning the House and the Senate in November. As Governor Glenn Youngkin says, we "must lock arms" because, right now, that is all that matters! Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the District! | New: 70 Plus Endorsement List == | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Republican Nominee for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun == The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

**Good morning!** On this date 46 years ago, Voyager 1 took the first photo of the Earth and moon together in one frame. The historic image was recorded two weeks after the interstellar spacecraft was launched. ## 70% Against Trans Athletes Switching Competition
Nearly 70% of Americans say [transgender athletes should only be allowed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSpCAUheGnwQwLAUUCgk3MetMNLYRre7cQLLjd1rz9VE886fmSU_-_x_rwmDA___oTHO1l9YHwDauwfJi5VKvsotsBJKgO3DDZUSirhegOF4yYTBzjKJUxo97DMHkzTioOsPsAU4dOCqmEHWZhRy10LwdtthCljkbrzXqmBUSkUvv_BTMdsKev8obah3J2yR1EV2PqD5MLk8t9333eQoa7fZzJJW-BlxcxuZQX8Q8wufgTKgafGy_XVRpwzCG9GpbMqX5mT0cCgsbbVSo1fpWU-I45Nl5D9vNsteiqi9eNKWGbDNPieXpMP6_o90jfAQAA__8-nGr9) to compete against athletes of their own biological gender, up from 62% two years ago, according to a new Gallup Poll. The increase in opposition comes from Republicans, Democrats, and independents, with Republicans the most strongly opposed. But [even a majority of Democrats](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSpCAQgOGnwUyrbRiRgOASs7n0Qguk1b5ihAJ2Zuftt3bjjf_gr_r-3de748jX8dc9yLY9rW5r_KQVTD_OPcoVu2B3IiTZkR0ncwNpFEB3WqXlrEIAMipM5HbvJ-097opmrwmgY4uAEsw4g7kpUAOOSvstoApaKW-cUECBWyrD_8RXO2mP7_SkMmzp0UV7tparkH8ELgKXi151OFyMH_m7C1xyilHgcgMNKAUu1b17z6Wd_UFXoNIH3ppr1NecSqt9dqXxxtk1Ttfgav7sig35xTFynbRQcDwcx597-x3jKwAA__9mm2Hc) now oppose trans athletes, born as men, competing against women. "The [pendulum has swung too far,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D2SnDAQQOHTQNaU_gaGgMAJ2Th1SAnUgrYlNYXEyHv7rd1445e8-v68lpelQGn_bSNOxfNit0JvXMQI8glKL6p1k0dUqFucZD8-hB6NEO0xeWm1FUYK45TUo9TKDE80K_YCe9xcS5MSSotRPsX4MMJ0Spph3ZwybjBmHW1jBDoqfHV_mVI50IcPfuPVbRzbMB2lnLnRvxo1N2qutXae_yes-as3ao7oyDZqPjkE8JRcBhvxos2mDI5TgXJQ-gcrceCdNhsgYoJ88B0cbBxPLAiVI6YM-eSrZDgxuTvcEXK90w6FGby92mtyZ6UQKPdDY8QeLYXvy_Iz2mcAAAD__2A1cgs) and people are beginning to see what's at stake if it continues," said Riley Gaines, a former women's swimming champion at the University of Kentucky.
## New Jersey Tops Property Taxes List
A new [ranking of all 50 states](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAUAH8N3rDwA38wMHTxlq4dLQzPgQgbC17j5t9X6dz5pNPpvm7LzcYUj_un3dHQlhfrKD5xEZp3Ewe5QOPNhggoGzTdoHshtRKiCUaPg1Nu3bzuhZObU3aYlJsU-GmUCH0TDQiQQneT0L0SqoVOjavzoPyo1KotUwJ9pFzaR44HBdzSKz-xtC7vTTKB6KxMfjCYGczXdbXuWN0bMpjfagaz0AzmbmAwf1deyRJWfgUsyM-STyz04mR_sHJbkId4D1jpwIs_sFR88Vj5kXnXBtpTU4w_r5hSrMPIlLjvNqa_FPr_zG8AAAD__3GAZIg) shows New Jersey has the highest property taxes in the U.S. Only NJ and Illinois have property taxes higher than 2%, according to the Tax Foundation. For the 10 states with the lowest property tax, the rate averages closer to 0.5%. The least-taxed state, Hawaii, has a rate of 0.32%. For a $416,000 house, a homeowner in New Jersey would pay $9,279 in taxes compared to a $1,332 tax bill in Hawaii. See how your state ranks: [Here's a map](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAUAH8N3rDwA38wMHTxlq4dLQzPgQgbC17j5t9X6dz5pNPpvm7LzcYUj_un3dHQlhfrKD5xEZp3Ewe5QOPNhggoGzTdoHshtRKiCUaPg1Nu3bzuhZObU3aYlJsU-GmUCH0TDQiQQneT0L0SqoVOjavzoPyo1KotUwJ9pFzaR44HBdzSKz-xtC7vTTKB6KxMfjCYGczXdbXuWN0bMpjfagaz0AzmbmAwf1deyRJWfgUsyM-STyz04mR_sHJbkId4D1jpwIs_sFR88Vj5kXnXBtpTU4w_r5hSrMPIlLjvNqa_FPr_zG8AAAD__3GAZIg) showing average property taxes by state and the 10 highest and 10 lowest states ranked by tax rate.

clean_body: Nearly 70% of Americans say transgender athletes should only be allowed to compete against competetion that conform with their biological gender, up from 62% two years ago, according to a new Gallup Poll. | | | | | | MONday, SEPT. 18, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date 46 years ago, Voyager 1 took the first photo of the Earth and moon together in one frame. The historic image was recorded two weeks after the interstellar spacecraft was launched. () If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | 70% Against Trans Athletes Switching Competition Nearly 70% of Americans say to compete against athletes of their own biological gender, up from 62% two years ago, according to a new Gallup Poll. The increase in opposition comes from Republicans, Democrats, and independents, with Republicans the most strongly opposed. But now oppose trans athletes, born as men, competing against women. "The and people are beginning to see what's at stake if it continues," said Riley Gaines, a former women's swimming champion at the University of Kentucky. New Jersey Tops Property Taxes List A new shows New Jersey has the highest property taxes in the U.S. Only NJ and Illinois have property taxes higher than 2%, according to the Tax Foundation. For the 10 states with the lowest property tax, the rate averages closer to 0.5%. The least-taxed state, Hawaii, has a rate of 0.32%. For a $416,000 house, a homeowner in New Jersey would pay $9,279 in taxes compared to a $1,332 tax bill in Hawaii. See how your state ranks: showing average property taxes by state and the 10 highest and 10 lowest states ranked by tax rate. Cheap Deals for National Cheeseburger Day Today is , and Wendy's, McDonald's, Burger King, and others are offering deals and discounts, down to a 1-cent junior bacon cheeseburger offered by Wendy's all week. McDonald's is offering double cheeseburgers for 50 cents, and Burger King customers with Royal Perks accounts can get two-for-one cheeseburgers. The deals come with a caveat or two, the main one being that the major chains offer discounts only through their apps and not if you just walk up to the counter. However, the apps are free to download. Lauren Boebert apologized for creating a disturbance at a Denver theater as new video emerged that shows her vaping before the performance. Boebert previously insisted she hadn't vaped but now says she just didn't remember it. () ➤ Democratic Party defenders of President Biden admit that Hunter Biden's longtime business partner Eric Schwerin handled President Biden's finances when Biden was Vice President but say it's not correct to call him Biden's "bookkeeper." () ➤ The Texas Senate acquitted GOP Attorney General Ken Paxton on all 16 articles of impeachment involving corruption charges. The impeachment trial divided state Republicans. () ➤ New Mexico Gov. Michelle Lujan Grisham narrowed her anti-gun rules after a judge temporarily blocked her original executive order. She's now banning open and concealed carry only in parks and playgrounds. () Flying together with: A group of Christian millennials think they 've fixed the news... It's called , and it has 2 goals: 1. Keep its readers informed about world events 2. Keep its readers focused on Christ That means providing neutral coverage of events and pairing it with brief Biblical reminders. The question is: Are they hitting the mark? See what you think: The Pour Over is "The Chick-Fil-A of news sources." ➤ Deion Sanders' Colorado Buffaloes barely scraped by with a victory over rivals Colorado State University, winning 43-35 in double overtime in a game that ran four hours. Sanders' team was favored by 23 points. () ➤ Shohei Ohtani, the Los Angeles Angels two-way star considered by some to be the best player in baseball, is out for the season. Ohtani injured his elbow earlier this season and has now also hurt his side. He'll be a free agent next season. () ➤ Famed NASCAR driver Dale Earnhardt Jr. had to be pulled from his car after it caught fire at the Bristol Motor Speedway with just 30 laps to go. The UAW met with Detroit carmakers on Saturday, and more negotiations are planned for today. Nearly 13,000 workers have walked out so far. The show was set to return despite the writers' strike, but heavy criticism convinced Barrymore to stand down. () ➤The Astronomy Photographer of the Year awards are out. Ukrainian President Zelenskyy will also speak, his first in-person speech since Russia's invasion. () ➤ The NFL** has something new tonight for Monday Night Football: two games instead of one, overlapping by an hour. The Saints take on the Panthers at 7:15 on ESPN, while the Browns play the Steelers at 8:15 on ABC. () ➤ A 12-year-old boy rescued his behavioral therapist from drowning in a pool and gave him CPR. The boy said he learned the technique from watching Netflix's "Stranger Things." name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell insurance giant to STOP supporting deforestation
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1992492?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **A bribery scandal? Land grabbing? Money laundering? Forest destruction?** You read that right, Friend. Here’s the tragedy unfolding in the Brazilian Cerrado -- **the planet’s most biologically rich savanna** with MILLIONS of unique species -- and what YOU can do to help. The Cerrado is home to Indigenous, Afro-Brazilian, and traditional communities that have lived on the land for generations. But violent land grabbers are **stealing land and slashing trees** , forcing innocent people from their homes, and turning vibrant ecosystems into bleak plantations. In some areas, **you can drive for hours and see nothing but endless fields of soy where savannas teeming with colorful birds, giant anteaters, and armadillos once stood.** TIAA, an American corporation worth billions of dollars, claims to be a responsible investor. But it’s purchasing farmland from notorious landgrabbers in Brazil, letting others do the dirty work, keeping its hands looking clean, and reaping the rewards. A recent report exposed TIAA’s activities, meaning they’re especially vulnerable to public pressure right now, Friend. **[Will you DEMAND TIAA stop supporting violent land grabbing and deforestation in the Brazilian Cerrado and help SAVE forests? Sign now!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1992493?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1992494?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The Cerrado was once a massive stretch of uninterrupted savanna, but **land grabbers and massive farming corporations have DISMEMBERED it.** The formerly wild savanna is now a patchwork of plantations and flat, desolate land.
The ownership of a lot of this land is still in dispute. TIAA purchased land from a man charged with _**corruption and money laundering**_ for his involvement in a massive scheme to BRIBE judges in these land dispute cases. Does that sound like ethical investing to you?
**The Brazilian Cerrado is UNDER ATTACK -- but there’s a clear way you can help.** **[Please, Friend, take just 30 seconds to fight land theft and deforestation. We need 4,827 more people to send a message to TIAA by 11:59pm TONIGHT to hit our goal!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1992495?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1992494?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Jeff Conant
Senior International Forests Campaign Manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Michael B. Moore for South Carolina
subject: "On Message" From Michael B. Moore
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104585/images/Logo_white_rectangle.jpg]
On Message
from Michael B. Moore
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
Welcome to our campaign newsletter.
We're happy you're here.
We'll use this space to keep you updated on all the latest stories, events and opportunities related to Michael's run for South Carolina's 1st congressional district.
Stay tuned — we'll be in your inbox every Monday.
See you on the trail.
Join our movement [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
In the news
https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401 [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401]
POLITICO [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401]
The national media is paying more and more attention to our race every day. Last week, POLITICO [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401] reported that Democrats "are entertaining a once-unlikely prospect: retaking the House majority by winning in the South."
The story specifically highlighted the SC-01 racial gerrymandering case that will soon come before the Supreme Court [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/17/2181780/-My-swing-district-has-its-date-before-the-Supreme-Court] .
Per POLITICO: "It's impossible to know how many seats could become competitive, but the party is hoping a handful may come into play and that new maps could even threaten the likes of ... Nancy Mace."
https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/ [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/]
Roll Call [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/]
Roll Call [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/] ran a story explaining how new congressional maps "could be drawn in time to change the electoral landscape in 2024, when Democrats need a net gain of just five seats to take control of the House."
According to Roll Call, the SC-01 Supreme Court case "may also impact the federal redistricting litigation in Florida, which involves similar racial gerrymandering claims."
https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/ [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/]
Charleston City Paper [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/]
And back home in the Lowcountry, the Charleston City Paper [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/] published an editorial calling on the Supreme Court to redraw the lines of SC-01 — so that the map "reflects the true electoral nature of our lower coast, not a district that the GOP bleached by moving thousands of Black voters to other districts."
On the picket line
https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/25/2183281/-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/25/2183281/-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers]
Union of Southern Service Workers [https://ussw.org/]
Michael expressed solidarity with the workers of the Waffle House on Garners Ferry Road in Columbia, South Carolina, who began a three-day strike [https://twitter.com/RaiseUptheSouth/status/1677737443145949184] on this month after delivering to management their petition to organize.
As a business executive with nearly four decades of private sector experience — including several years as a leader in South Carolina's food industry — Michael knows firsthand that employees throughout any organization deserve fair pay and safe working conditions.
https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/ [https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/]
Holy City Sinner [https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/]
Michael steadfastly stands behind the striking Waffle House staff as they seek sensible concessions from management and strive for a better quality of life for restaurant workers in South Carolina.
He also urged Nancy Mace — who often mentions her past experience as a Waffle House waitress [https://twitter.com/NancyMace/status/1451926458994151427?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1451926458994151427%7Ctwgr%5Eb80d1ca7caee292360b8edb17aecebf62c52def8%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dailykos.com%2Fstories%2F2023%2F7%2F25%2F2183281%2F-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers] on the campaign trail — to similarly endorse the demands of those on strike.
In the arena
https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486 [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486]
Rep. Nancy Mace [https://twitter.com/RepNancyMace/status/1684928879235072000?s=20]
Nancy Mace attended a POLITICO event [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486] last week, where she warned that Republicans need to refocus on "child care, maternal care, prenatal care [and] abortion" if they want to keep control of the House.
It was more cheap talk from Mace, who — time and again — has flip-flopped on the issues that matter most to women and working families.
https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans?emci=9f4780c9-692d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid= [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans?emci=9f4780c9-692d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
The Guardian [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans]
Here are the facts:
*
In
2019,
Nancy
Mace
voted
for
a
six-week
abortion
ban
[https://www.scstatehouse.gov/votehistory.php?KEY=16575]
in
the
South
Carolina
legislature.
*
In
2021,
she
voted
against
the
expansion
of
the
child
tax
credit
[https://mace.house.gov/media/press-releases/mace-so-called-american-rescue-plan-was-never-about-covid-19-relief]
in
the
American
Rescue
Plan.
*
In
January,
she
co-sponsored
H.R.
7
[https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/5/2179435/-My-opponent-is-co-sponsoring-another-extreme-bill]
,
which
would
make
health
coverage
that
includes
reproductive
care
ineligible
for
federal
funding.
*
In
July,
she
voted
for
an
NDAA
amendment
that
makes
it
harder
for
servicewomen
to
access
health
care
[https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/17/2181768/-Nancy-Mace-called-it-an-asshole-move-Then-she-voted-for-it]
—
a
policy
she
herself
called
an
"asshole
move."
Nothing about Nancy Mace's record is pro-children or pro-women. She should stop pretending otherwise.
On social media
https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore]
Michael surpassed 6,600 Twitter followers [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore] this week! Can you help us reach 7,500 followers before the end of the month?
And if you aren't already, make sure to keep up with our campaign on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/MichaelBMooreforCongress] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/mbm_sc01/] , Threads [https://www.threads.net/@mbm_sc01] , LinkedIn [https://www.linkedin.com/company/moore4sc/about/] and TikTok. [https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelbmoore4sc]
From the trail
https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/ [https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/]
Michael had a fun weekend at San Diego Comic-Con, where he helped some talented artists promote a forthcoming graphic novel [https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/] about his great-great-grandfather: Civil War hero and Recontruction-era Congressman Robert Smalls.
https://screenrant.com/defiant-the-story-of-robert-smalls-sdcc-interview/ [https://screenrant.com/defiant-the-story-of-robert-smalls-sdcc-interview/]
At a time when Republican politicians like Ron DeSantis are seeking to rewrite our nation's history [https://www.msnbc.com/the-reidout/reidout-blog/ron-desantis-florida-slavery-curriculum-rcna96052] — exploiting partisan divides at the expense of our children's education — Michael believes it's more important than ever for leaders to embrace the totality of America's legacy.
https://blackgirlnerds.com/the-creative-team-behind-defiant-the-robert-smalls-story/ [https://blackgirlnerds.com/the-creative-team-behind-defiant-the-robert-smalls-story/]
Part of that important work is elevating the stories of lesser-known patriots like Robert Smalls, who — in the face of unfathomable hardship — never stopped working to make America a more perfect Union [https://www.nps.gov/people/robert-smalls.htm] .
Michael is proud to be seeking the same House seat that his great-great-grandfather held nearly 140 years ago.
On our team
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
There's so much work to do, and we're only just getting started.
Join us in our fight to flip this swing district.
Together — indivisible — we'll build a brighter future for South Carolina.

clean_body: [] On Message from Michael B. Moore [] Welcome to our campaign newsletter. We're happy you're here. We'll use this space to keep you updated on all the latest stories, events and opportunities related to Michael's run for South Carolina's 1st congressional district. Stay tuned — we'll be in your inbox every Monday. See you on the trail. Join our movement [] In the news [] POLITICO [] The national media is paying more and more attention to our race every day. Last week, POLITICO [] reported that Democrats "are entertaining a once-unlikely prospect: retaking the House majority by winning in the South." The story specifically highlighted the SC-01 racial gerrymandering case that will soon come before the Supreme Court [] . Per POLITICO: "It's impossible to know how many seats could become competitive, but the party is hoping a handful may come into play and that new maps could even threaten the likes of ... Nancy Mace." [] Roll Call [] Roll Call [] ran a story explaining how new congressional maps "could be drawn in time to change the electoral landscape in 2024, when Democrats need a net gain of just five seats to take control of the House." According to Roll Call, the SC-01 Supreme Court case "may also impact the federal redistricting litigation in Florida, which involves similar racial gerrymandering claims." [] Charleston City Paper [] And back home in the Lowcountry, the Charleston City Paper [] published an editorial calling on the Supreme Court to redraw the lines of SC-01 — so that the map "reflects the true electoral nature of our lower coast, not a district that the GOP bleached by moving thousands of Black voters to other districts." On the picket line [] Union of Southern Service Workers [] Michael expressed solidarity with the workers of the Waffle House on Garners Ferry Road in Columbia, South Carolina, who began a three-day strike [] on this month after delivering to management their petition to organize. As a business executive with nearly four decades of private sector experience — including several years as a leader in South Carolina's food industry — Michael knows firsthand that employees throughout any organization deserve fair pay and safe working conditions. [] Holy City Sinner [] Michael steadfastly stands behind the striking Waffle House staff as they seek sensible concessions from management and strive for a better quality of life for restaurant workers in South Carolina. He also urged Nancy Mace — who often mentions her past experience as a Waffle House waitress [] on the campaign trail — to similarly endorse the demands of those on strike. In the arena [] Rep. Nancy Mace [] Nancy Mace attended a POLITICO event [] last week, where she warned that Republicans need to refocus on "child care, maternal care, prenatal care [and] abortion" if they want to keep control of the House. It was more cheap talk from Mace, who — time and again — has flip-flopped on the issues that matter most to women and working families. = [=] The Guardian [] Here are the facts: In 2019, Nancy Mace voted for a six-week abortion ban [] in the South Carolina legislature. In 2021, she voted against the expansion of the child tax credit [] in the American Rescue Plan. In January, she co-sponsored H.R. 7 [] , which would make health coverage that includes reproductive care ineligible for federal funding. In July, she voted for an NDAA amendment that makes it harder for servicewomen to access health care [] — a policy she herself called an "asshole move." Nothing about Nancy Mace's record is pro-children or pro-women. She should stop pretending otherwise. On social media [] Michael surpassed 6,600 Twitter followers [] this week! Can you help us reach 7,500 followers before the end of the month? And if you aren't already, make sure to keep up with our campaign on Facebook [] , Instagram [] , Threads [] , LinkedIn [] and TikTok. [] From the trail [] Michael had a fun weekend at San Diego Comic-Con, where he helped some talented artists promote a forthcoming graphic novel [] about his great-great-grandfather: Civil War hero and Recontruction-era Congressman Robert Smalls. [] At a time when Republican politicians like Ron DeSantis are seeking to rewrite our nation's history [] — exploiting partisan divides at the expense of our children's education — Michael believes it's more important than ever for leaders to embrace the totality of America's legacy. [] Part of that important work is elevating the stories of lesser-known patriots like Robert Smalls, who — in the face of unfathomable hardship — never stopped working to make America a more perfect Union [] . Michael is proud to be seeking the same House seat that his great-great-grandfather held nearly 140 years ago. On our team [] There's so much work to do, and we're only just getting started. Join us in our fight to flip this swing district. Together — indivisible — we'll build a brighter future for South Carolina. Donate [] Volunteer [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright (C) Michael B. Moore for South Carolina. All rights reserved. Michael B. subject: I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol.
body:

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b5a2a2b-5906-4815-8e2c-f530487f3d4d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd0f2387-b287-4239-9c15-29fd5b8fb29f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I thought my days of putting people on the ground were over when I left the NFL. Then January 6th happened. I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol, and I remember hearing the glass break and the shouts coming closer. As they pounded on the doors, I texted my wife Aly, who was seven months pregnant with our second son: “Whatever happens, I love you.” I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door. Thankfully, it never came to that. And while I was barricaded on the House floor with my colleagues and our gas masks in hand, Ted Cruz – who had cheered on the mob earlier that day – hid in a supply closet. Ted Cruz’s false claims about the 2020 election helped incite the insurrection. That's Ted for you: All hat, no cattle. That day is one of many, many reasons I know Ted Cruz has got to go. People lost their lives, and our government came the closest it ever has to crumbling. His MAGA extremism is bad for Texas and our country, and it’s time to hold him accountable. [I’m running to replace Ted Cruz and give Texans the senator we deserve, and I hope you’ll help me do it, Peter. Will you donate now to me and Blue Amp Actin to help build our grassroots movement and defeat Ted Cruz once and for all? Any amount you can spare is truly appreciated. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3fbecf1c-5577-4753-87d9-a07b4839a402/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Your America
subject: Unveil the extraordinary leaders of military history in this free eBook
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23710%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qZE2hb%2fFg8Hi42epsWh7xQ&sysid=1)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23711%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GqUDKS3YFNd3P9nM9Y2lPg&sysid=1)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23712%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=px46Ac8IiICixL1jzgMlEA&sysid=1)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23712%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=px46Ac8IiICixL1jzgMlEA&sysid=1)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

name: Zak Malamed
subject: I know what it feels like to duck for cover
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
When I was 15 years old, I spoke at a New Yorkers Against Gun Violence rally on my first-ever trip to Albany.

I was disgusted by what I saw on the news: photos of school hallways turned into war zones, cell-phone recordings of screams and gun-shots, and an endless stream of “thoughts & prayers” tweets from leaders. I felt like I had to speak out.

But before I knew it, our nation’s problem with gun violence was more than just news clips and videos.

I was enjoying a night out with friends when I saw an automatic rifle lifted into the air. Three loud bangs rang out and I had to duck for cover behind a parked car.

Thankfully, nobody was hurt. But that jolt of adrenaline, the breathlessness, and the sudden fear that gripped me left me with a new perspective.

I know how it feels to receive a frantic text from your sister when there is an active shooter on her campus.

I can feel the pit in my stomach when I learned a close friend of mine was killed by a stray bullet walking down the street.

Gun violence is personal, and must be approached with the sense of urgency it deserves.

We need leaders who will not drag their feet or wait until the next senseless tragedy. That is why I will fight for common-sense gun safety reforms like assault weapon bans, red-flag laws, and universal background checks.

In addition, we need to focus on preventative measures like funding mental health initiatives and providing the best de-escalation training for law-enforcement.

New Yorkers deserve to be safe – and you deserve leaders who will stop at nothing to protect you and your family.

With gratitude,
Zak Malamed

clean_body: When I was 15 years old, I spoke at a New Yorkers Against Gun Violence rally on my first-ever trip to Albany. I was disgusted by what I saw on the news: photos of school hallways turned into war zones, cell-phone recordings of screams and gun-shots, and an endless stream of “thoughts & prayers” tweets from leaders. I felt like I had to speak out. But before I knew it, our nation’s problem with gun violence was more than just news clips and videos. I was enjoying a night out with friends when I saw an automatic rifle lifted into the air. Three loud bangs rang out and I had to duck for cover behind a parked car. Thankfully, nobody was hurt. But that jolt of adrenaline, the breathlessness, and the sudden fear that gripped me left me with a new perspective. I know how it feels to receive a frantic text from your sister when there is an active shooter on her campus. I can feel the pit in my stomach when I learned a close friend of mine was killed by a stray bullet walking down the street. Gun violence is personal, and must be approached with the sense of urgency it deserves. We need leaders who will not drag their feet or wait until the next senseless tragedy. That is why I will fight for common-sense gun safety reforms like assault weapon bans, red-flag laws, and universal background checks. In addition, we need to focus on preventative measures like funding mental health initiatives and providing the best de-escalation training for law-enforcement. New Yorkers deserve to be safe – and you deserve leaders who will stop at nothing to protect you and your family. With gratitude, Zak Malamed

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: The View thinks we're "dumb"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Joy Behar and her co-hosts on The View are at it again
%recipient.md5_hash%
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7v76avns3tvvnaj5r1bt8l0pgltagougquiij68_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob0c1h2bs)
Fellow American,

Joy Behar is at it again.

She was on The View calling young Republicans, **"dumb"** and **"liars."**

Joy Behar embodies the modern left's playbook: talk a big game, name-call, and then cower from actual debate.

I'm sure it'll be pretty easy to take on a "dumb" guy. Fellow American, **[should I challenge Joy Behar to a debate on air?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z33rqgukub4bt201j5o0grh1tkvf7qq2v8e7iif8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob0c1h2bs)**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znl6dapic01ginh2trhj3hj62htv8eht7fe59u28_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob0c1h2bs)
| [** YES - Take on _The View_ -> **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu2r8n5c7qhjk1uaujfuh6ukddnlob20uj5van5g_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob0c1h2bs)
---

[** NO **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq6l0tc72oepiv8hcjvjsh1av9na39iv9tfvd0e0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob0c1h2bs)
---

I truly believe we will win this race based *actually* debating the issues. We need meaningful discussion instead of 10 second sound bites.

That's why I've taken on Don Lemon, CNN, MSNBC, and the mainstream media. I know we can debate the issues and WIN.

We're running a different type of campaign. We aren't bowing down to the donor class in Washington or the Establishment. I have invested my family's own money into this race. I am not going to mega donors, asking for 5 or 10 million dollars to fund our ground game. _**I am relying on you.**_

I need your help to take on the mainstream media and radical Left. **[Please- in the next 30 mins - let me know what you think and chip in $5 or more.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zug1smelidggp4v5oiok512fftdjjjrqqcu2teag_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob0c1h2bs)**

Thanks for standing with me,

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhqpbuf3q2nk4b2eu85b6o9964v9l0n34dnr8260_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob0c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** DEBATE THE VIEW? **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeml85bussnsphum8p4lv9b07cm5096l7p3hlso8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob0c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9715kb2a17mcf93tsqvlbm81fjuib8obedsspro_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob0c1h2bs)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z28fqo1rv07t9c5sc7vpnu0idtbvk4d4hj3mfak8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob1c9h2bs)

---
| | Dear Friend, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9crhk7h0ps6ott2omersomvvvt8iu7e9ijcrqgg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob1c9h2bs)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdpjk4urbn2bdc8obh53oq0t2g3k8bcifallh1hg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob1c9h2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5n57lcrvbglacj99b0kiup2fveumoiblthps338_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1im6ob1c9h2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Joy Behar's name-calling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Joy Behar and her co-hosts on The View are at it again

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677931%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fln2ZLUDyGfGx4Gkix%2fx1Q&sysid=1)
Fellow American,

Joy Behar is at it again.

She was on The View calling young Republicans, **"dumb"** and **"liars."**

Joy Behar embodies the modern left's playbook: talk a big game, name-call, and then cower from actual debate.

I'm sure it'll be pretty easy to take on a "dumb" guy. Fellow American, **[should I challenge Joy Behar to a debate on air?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677932%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vAqr50mNTWA0eAei3MlRyA&sysid=1)**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677931%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fln2ZLUDyGfGx4Gkix%2fx1Q&sysid=1)
| [** YES - Take on _The View_ → **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677933%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1o3wY8brtOGan%2fafqY2PBA&sysid=1)
---

[** NO **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677934%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5vhvXMmpSrf2TLS0EI6JUg&sysid=1)
---

I truly believe we will win this race based *actually* debating the issues. We need meaningful discussion instead of 10 second sound bites.

That's why I've taken on Don Lemon, CNN, MSNBC, and the mainstream media. I know we can debate the issues and WIN.

We're running a different type of campaign. We aren't bowing down to the donor class in Washington or the Establishment. I have invested my family's own money into this race. I am not going to mega donors, asking for 5 or 10 million dollars to fund our ground game. _**I am relying on you.**_

I need your help to take on the mainstream media and radical Left. **[Please- in the next 30 mins - let me know what you think and chip in $5 or more.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677945%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fOp8%2fXpXqt0fcyTaXfZtlA&sysid=1)**

Thanks for standing with me,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677931%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fln2ZLUDyGfGx4Gkix%2fx1Q&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** DEBATE THE VIEW? **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677946%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QdrFkqyJvGKoiqrvejttNA&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677947%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tx1AmxGx2iYuIzHRZXFNGQ&sysid=1)

---

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677948%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pI4h1SKRG%2fA%2fSzVKa%2bnOKg&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677949%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6rEaziJdINmZUA%2b44wCpIw&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677940%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Kprvgz8c3PjPdTmw4HVaMQ&sysid=1)
---|---|---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mackinac=20Republican=20Leadership=20Conference?=
subject: NEW SPEAKER CONFIRMED: John West
body:
Announcing John West for Mackinac Leadership Conference. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
Discovery Institute Vice-President and Senior Fellow John West is confirmed to speak at the Mackinac Leadership Conference.
The **NEW MIGOP** , led by **CONSTITUTIONALISTS ,** is committed to making this conference the best one yet. JOHN WEST joins an already impressive lineup of speakers, including JIM CAVIEZEL, KARI LAKE, VIVEK RAMASWAMY, ZUBY, ALEX NEWMAN, and TAMARA SCOTT.
We are confident that the upcoming Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference will be the most diverse and unforgettable one ever.
John G. West is Vice President and a Senior Fellow at the Seattle-based Discovery Institute, where he also serves as Managing Director of the Institute’s Center for Science & Culture. His current research examines the impact of science and “scientism” on public policy and culture. West was previously an Associate Professor of Political Science at Seattle Pacific University, where he chaired the Department of Political Science and Geography. He holds a Ph.D. in Government from Claremont Graduate University.
West has written or edited twelve books, including Darwin Day in America: How Our Politics and Culture Have Been Dehumanized in the Name of Science; The Magician's Twin: C.S. Lewis on Science, Scientism, and Society; Darwin’s Conservatives: The Misguided Quest; Walt Disney and Live Action: The Disney Studio’s Live-Action Features of the 1950 and 60s; and Celebrating Middle Earth: The Lord of the Rings as a Defense of Western Civilization.
Additionally, Dr. West has directed and written several documentaries, including the award-winning Human Zoos, The War on Humans, and The Magician’s Twin: C.S. Lewis and the Case Against Scientism. He also helped produce the popular YouTube series Science Uprising.
He has been interviewed by TIME, Newsweek, USA Today, The Washington Post, and The New York Times, and he has appeared on CNN, Fox News, and C-SPAN.
For additional details about our Mackinac Island Conference, please [click here](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f68da2041e&e=a2af77507c).
**We cannot wait to see you at this historic conference.**

| [PURCHASE HOTEL AND CONFERENCE TICKETS HERE](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=e085448630&e=a2af77507c)
---
### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.
| [DONATE NOW](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=8f958cc863&e=a2af77507c)
---

West was previously an Associate Professor of Political Science at Seattle Pacific University, where he chaired the Department of Political Science and Geography. He holds a Ph.D. in Government from Claremont Graduate University. West has written or edited twelve books, including Darwin Day in America: How Our Politics and Culture Have Been Dehumanized in the Name of Science; The Magician's Twin: C.S. Lewis on Science, Scientism, and Society; Darwin’s Conservatives: The Misguided Quest; Walt Disney and Live Action: The Disney Studio’s Live-Action Features of the 1950 and 60s; and Celebrating Middle Earth: The Lord of the Rings as a Defense of Western Civilization. Additionally, Dr. West has directed and written several documentaries, including the award-winning Human Zoos, The War on Humans, and The Magician’s Twin: C.S. Lewis and the Case Against Scientism. He also helped produce the popular YouTube series Science Uprising. He has been interviewed by TIME, Newsweek, USA Today, The Washington Post, and The New York Times, and he has appeared on CNN, Fox News, and C-SPAN. For additional details about our Mackinac Island Conference, please . We cannot wait to see you at this historic conference. | PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States, SO HELP ME GOD. | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:communication@migop.org ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 MIGOP, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: You can or . |

# [Tell NBC having Trump on Meet the Press was a TERRIBLE idea](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec86f597-dc7c-49d5-94e2-79e7d4c3331a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8612339d-4fe7-4aa4-b4eb-3f9b910a30db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | [**Add your name, Tell NBC that having Trump on Meet the Press was a terrible idea, and tell them not to do it again.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1f49528a-11c4-458b-8a5a-649102f6db10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) NBC had Donald Trump on Meet the Press over the weekend, and it went about as horrifically as you'd expect. Trump lied nonstop, and largely went unchallenged by the show's host. It might as well have been a long campaign ad. [**Why do they keep giving this serial liar and indicted criminal air time?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9e80cbe-a2f4-4b68-9297-6e114975b08f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Meet the Press isn't just any news show, it is literally the longest running show on television. It has been the setting of some of the most historic moments in politics. And NBC should not give this monster the credibility that an appearance on that show implies. If Trump makes legitimate news, then fine, cover it. But don't give him the biggest megaphone on television to spout his lies. [**Add your name, Tell NBC that having Trump on Meet the Press was a terrible idea, and tell them not to do it again.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td477d987-ef3c-40f8-9c87-16bc8450bdd9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Larry Klayman
subject: URGENT: Five peaceful patriots face 142 years in prison
body:
As you read this urgent email, five innocent Americans face 142 years in prison.

As you read this urgent email, five innocent Americans face 142 years in prison. | | | | | [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23729%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6dkstFNAy9961eAtEgf%2feg&sysid=1)
---
| |
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23720%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=htMwrjuc6iziEaZp6BRZ5g&sysid=1)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23721%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8QJnNdp3ekPcBiCtMCWddw&sysid=1)**

As you read this urgent email, five innocent Americans face 142 years in prison.

Proud Boys members Joe Biggs, Ethan Nordean, Dominic Pezzola, Zach Rehl, and Enrique Tarrio were going to be sentenced this week by establishment U.S. District Court Judge Tim Kelly.

But Judge Kelly is out sick, so he’s delayed their sentencing.

If you’ve read my newest book, **It Takes A Counter Revolution: Wake Up America!** , you know Judge Kelly is _one of the very worst D.C. judges_ I talk about there.

He’s an establishment hack and not very intelligent...and he’s shredding the Bill of Rights to make an example of these peaceful patriots.

**In April, Judge Kelly proved what you and I have known all along -- the trial of the Proud Boys is a show trial, the kind you’d expect in a corrupt communist country.**

Judge Kelly even had the gall to claim:

“There Is No Evidence of Government Misconduct, Let Alone Misconduct Warranting Dismissal, a Mistrial, or Other Sanctions...”

But you and I know the truth:

* The FBI KNOWS the Proud Boys are innocent
* The FBI planted a snitch inside the defense team of disabled U.S. Marine and Proud Boy, Zach Rehl, since April, 2021...but revealed that only on March 22.
* And Judge Kelly has denied legal motions critical to the defense

**And now Joe Biden’s lawless lawyers at DOJ seek brutal prison sentences for each Proud Boy:**

* Joe Biggs - 33 years
* Ethan Nordean - 27 years
* Dominic Pezzola - 20 years
* Zach Rehl - 30 years
* Enrique Tarrio - 33 years

**That’s 142 years in prison for exercising their Constitutionally protected rights!**

As you recall, Zach is a disabled U.S. Marine. And he said something to his wife, Amanda, that alarms me:

**“They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”**

If Joe Biden’s FBI and DOJ can push around a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran and his friends for exercising their right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

That’s why I ask you to continue to stand with me at this crucial time.

**[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23722%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q%2bNZtOFlktX0gygF%2fXJcMw&sysid=1)**

As you know, I’m using two powerful class action lawsuits with a new one to soon be filed and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I will lose our country if we don’t act peacefully and legally NOW.

**[Please pray for the Proud Boys, and give what you can right away.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23723%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UpYAkTphyk3oey3OWdB%2bEw&sysid=1)**

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, five innocent Americans face 142 years in prison for exercising their rights. And you can bet Joe Biden’s FBI and DOJ will come for you and me next if we don’t fight back peacefully and legally NOW.

**[Please help me fight back in court for ALL January 6 peaceful protesters with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23724%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qgw9GoGuQ%2bAAVLPx2KeAAg&sysid=1)**

Your America News

| Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. body:
Peter stream the latest No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | |
---

We're excited to share the latest episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast, hosted by Mark and Krysty Ronchetti. In [**this episode**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c362648ec5&e=567664f14c), we delve into some critical issues that affect our community and our state.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5ed5aa6b8e&e=567664f14c)

* **Unmasking the Truth about Crime:** Join us as we expose Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham's misleading claims about her efforts to combat crime. Discover how Republicans have presented numerous crime-fighting bills, all of which have been halted by the governor. The consequences of this incompetence are evident, as violence in New Mexico continues to escalate.

* **Democratic Legislature's Role:** We discuss the role of the Democratic legislature in enabling the governor to stifle these essential crime bills, resulting in devastating consequences for our state.
➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=80f8864e28&e=567664f14c)

* **Media Bias and Framing:** Explore the damaging effects of media bias and how it can unfairly shape public perception of crucial issues like extreme gender ideology.

* **Life-Altering Decisions:** Lastly, we tackle a disturbing story about a family's decision to pursue hormone treatments for their 9-year-old child in Chicago, a decision that will forever alter their young one's life.
➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=97e435db00&e=567664f14c)

| | Patriot,

---
I recently sat down for an interview with Megyn Kelly.
---
_She said,_ _“[you could be]__enjoying this beautiful golf course, Mar-a-Lago, your lovely family. You don't have to be running for President, sitting for 4 criminal trials, some civil and possibly looking at jail time._**_Is it worth it?_**_”_
---
My answer is simple: _America is_ __always__ _worth it._
---
Because if we don’t win the 2024 election, we won’t have a country anymore.
---
Our southern border is being overrun by millions of illegal aliens, our cities are being destroyed by violent crime, inflation is ravaging our economy, Crooked Joe is waging war on _American_ energy all while he buys oil from our _enemies_ , and our nation is on the brink of entering World War III.
---
...And if we allow the Deep State to get away with weaponizing our legal system to criminalize political dissent, then our once Free Republic will be completely dead.
---
2024 is our final chance to save our country. And I truly believe that I can turn it around – and I will turn it around FAST!
---
To take back our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class that is trying to _permanently_ shut you out of the political process, this is simply the risk that I must take.
---
And I have full faith that with millions and millions of patriots like YOU peacefully standing by my side, I won’t even have to worry about the nightmare scenario of 1,000 years in prison as an innocent man.
---
Because we will prevail – just as we always have – and we will win back the White House and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
---

name: President Donald J. Trump
subject: Disgusting Political Weaponization
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Are you still an America First conservative?

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5bv6928pa00l7qt1ckculn4ae4h3ap2t3mp89bg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)

Friend - Joe Biden, his corrupt Department of Justice, and Merrick Garland are back at targeting me.

_**[Do you know what this is about?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2d06h155tmi2app46fie6dco5d8idv0pj2fi3io_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)**_

This witch hunt is because they know they can't beat me. They think they can distract me from America First and a ******[**VERY SAD attempt at removing me from this election.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z482carq29u82dcdvo93ua10t43i2blg1tpnh320_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)******

**[Friend, I need your support now, more than ever!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zveodk9m7hi2m9nc9t7641lsdd6mr39cce780buo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)**

**[ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU'RE WITH ME](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkgg9bhrnnqv07pau5c0i4jc8ics3jrl4skk1e90_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)**

This is __unprecedented even after all I 've been through already.__ I wonder how many more losses sleepy Joe and unmerited Merrick can take before they give up. Joe may not remember but I do, when:

First, they **[illegally spied on my campaign and threw false and slanderous accusations about me and my family](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zajjhg60orj2irlv7m11an0h8n3aq1tsci92kno0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs) **\- nothing but hoaxes!

Then the FBI (following Biden's Instructions) Agents raided Mar-a-Lago and **[refused to let my lawyers oversee](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm40qvg0fh6fdsuvg6ph6a0f93mfe2o59jrqrro8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs) **the search.

Finally, **[they impeached me TWICE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8hv8bpg2pblbflt64eil4o6jmpcler84k724oa8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs) **(I won both with a little thanks to some America First allies in the Senate!) and nothing ever came of it.

_**[I 'M NOT BACKING DOWN UNTIL WE RETAKE THE SENATE AND WHITE HOUSE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0glo1huj8t1uoj4oh6vnsbnv86m2bhpod8il668_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)**_

Biden and the cronies in the DOJ and Merrick Garland represent fraud of the highest degree. These meaningless indictments are scams. An attempt to distract me from one thing - representing the good people of this great country and Making America Great Again! **[Stand with me today and we will take back the Senate and White House!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zigptqk2ocjk92igi18cmct3v45gce4md0ggft2o_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)**
**[Your support is instrumental in achieving these ends, Friend.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze3viipkor8td9op9jise1l8o9pmlm348r46d4o0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)**

**[DON'T BACK DOWN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znt0j63f6134ajv6rqpjdqe7o1aboq0lmedntgoo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)

[ADD YOUR NAME TO SHOW YOU'RE WITH ME](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9mm0radp0l51tgjdhl5qdkpmgesjj0m2pktigso_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)**

This isn't the time to ignore **[INJUSTICE.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsei8aiohlfnem97di0t4atneerjkga0mg97iglg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)**

This attack on me is an attack on all of us. _They 're coming for **[you](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2btqpc3lum56bc463kp5rpi6ic5vgkcja1h7oe8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs) **next._ We can't let them surprise us with another baseless attack.

**[Act quickly. Act now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5es0m0132aulgc49ju9cc1nbishcbvkfv0aqut0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)**

Thanks,
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziaht67591037cv5pk2lqbv0llll8oppij50fi68_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)
Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

**[SUPPORT MAGA BEFORE IT'S TOO LATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z82rpjgf054onpevgq23i7dvjghm43cq1l7psm88_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm0o32clh2bs)**

clean_body: Pennsylvania's House is TIED. Your support in the next day before polls close can truly make a monumental difference. | | | | | Tomorrow, a tie-breaking special election will determine control of Pennsylvania’s House. This election is more than just a local race; its outcome could have HUGE implications for Pennsylvania, and the 2024 presidential election. Our Republican opponent is a Trump loyalist and MAGA extremist. Her anti-vaccine and anti-abortion remarks, her questionable beliefs about the 2020 election and Trump’s Big Lie, and her attendance at the “Stop the Steal” rally on January 6th are all tell-tale signs that she is not fit for elected office. That’s why now, more than ever, we need to rally behind our Democratic candidates in special elections like tomorrow’s. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | A win for the GOP could set Pennsylvania back on issues like LGBTQ+ rights, public health, ballot access, and more. We've seen extremists pass restrictive abortion bans in states like South Carolina, attack LGBTQ+ youth in states like Florida, and silence members of the opposition in states like Tennessee. We can’t let Pennsylvania go down the same path. With the PA House tied 101-101,every donation counts. Through donations from grassroots supporters like you, we can power Democrats to victory in Pennsylvania. This election isn’t just a choice between two candidates. It's a choice between two futures: one of darkness and division and another of unity and progress. Step up today to ensure that Pennsylvania and our nation move forward on the right path. subject: How do we make rural Americans optimistic again?

body:
| |
---
Hey Peter, We were reading the headlines this morning and one jumped out at us from a publication in America’s heartland: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69927193/427749683/1646350971?refcode=urd-em-230918-optimism&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzlhMDI3MzMtMzI1Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s3ysdzNrDyx7tMSCNSTnzi27ywB21ESDegXbLhm5OvM=) New polling suggests that rural Americans are losing hope in their future in our country. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Joy Behar embodies the modern left's playbook: talk a big game, name-call, and then cower from actual debate. I'm sure it'll be pretty easy to take on a "dumb" guy. Fellow American, | I truly believe we will win this race based actually debating the issues. We need meaningful discussion instead of 10 second sound bites. That's why I've taken on Don Lemon, CNN, MSNBC, and the mainstream media. I know we can debate the issues and WIN. We're running a different type of campaign. We aren't bowing down to the donor class in Washington or the Establishment. I have invested my family's own money into this race. I am not going to mega donors, asking for 5 or 10 million dollars to fund our ground game. I am relying on you. I need your help to take on the mainstream media and radical Left. Thanks for standing with me, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.
