subject: BREAKING: Jason Aldean Becomes ISRA Lifetime Member
body:
The Illinois State Rifle Association has been flexing its muscle in a state where gun rights are under attack.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/f604149c6308/breaking-jason-aldean-becomes-isra-lifetime-member?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0b0752156c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_18_02_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b0752156c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0b0752156c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_18_02_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b0752156c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0b0752156c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_18_02_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b0752156c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Protestors Burn American Flags at Jason Aldean Concert in Tinley Park, IL State Rifle Association Responds, Offers Country Music Star Complimentary Lifetime Membership (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/protestors-burn-american-flags-at-jason-aldean-concert-in-tinley-park-il-state-rifle-association-responds-offers-country-music-star-complimentary-lifetime-membership.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0b0752156c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_18_02_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b0752156c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/protestors-burn-american-flags-at-jason-aldean-concert-in-tinley-park-il-state-rifle-association-responds-offers-country-music-star-complimentary-lifetime-membership.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0b0752156c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_18_02_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b0752156c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Jason Aldean performing during CMA Fest 2022 in Nashville, Tenn., on June 9, 2022. (Photo by Amy Harris/Invision/AP, File)
By Illinois Review

During a recent Jason Aldean concert in Tinley Park, protestors burned American flags and chanted anti-American slogans in protest of Aldean’s number one hit song, ‘Try That In A Small Town.’ The scenes drew national attention and videos of the protestors burning flags and taunting the patriotic country music singer immediately began circulating on social media.

https://x.com/DailyMailCeleb/status/1701246423465852966?s=20&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0b0752156c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_18_02_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b0752156c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
In response, the Illinois State Rifle Association countered the anti-American protestors by offering Aldean a complimentary lifetime membership to their organization. In a statement released to the media, the Illinois-based pro-gun group wrote,

“Since 1903, the Illinois State Rifle Association – one of the oldest and most respected gun organizations in the United States, has fought to protect the right to bear arms for all law-abiding citizens, not just in Illinois, but across the country. And as we celebrate our 120th anniversary this year, we remain dedicated to our mission of gun rights advocacy; teaching men, women and young adults through our ISRA Training Academy on proper firearm safety and training; and lobbying elected officials in Springfield and Washington, DC.

Jason Aldean’s song, Try That In A Small Town, which hit number 1 on Billboard’s Hot 100 Chart has generated a lot of buzz, and even more controversy, but the lyrics represent what we’ve been fighting for as an organization for the last 120 years – and that’s the lawful right to protect yourself, your family and your community from danger. It’s not about promoting violence – it’s about preventing violence and allowing law-abiding citizens to defend themselves and others from those who wish to do harm.”

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/protestors-burn-american-flags-at-jason-aldean-concert-in-tinley-park-il-state-rifle-association-responds-offers-country-music-star-complimentary-lifetime-membership.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0b0752156c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_18_02_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b0752156c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Illinois State Rifle Association)

The organization then concluded their statement with,

“We applaud Jason on his success and standing up for our 2nd Amendment rights. As a token of our appreciation, we are honored to offer him a complimentary lifetime membership with the ISRA.”

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/protestors-burn-american-flags-at-jason-aldean-concert-in-tinley-park-il-state-rifle-association-responds-offers-country-music-star-complimentary-lifetime-membership.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0b0752156c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_18_02_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b0752156c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A copy of Jason Aldean’s complimentary lifetime membership card. (Source: Illinois State Rifle Association)
In a piece written in the Washington Examiner (https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/washington-secrets/jason-aldean-concert-draws-flag-burning-protest-2a-groups-support?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0b0752156c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_18_02_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b0752156c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , columnist Paul Bedard wrote that, “The Illinois State Rifle Association has been flexing its muscle in a state where gun rights are under attack...”

On January 10, 2023, Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker signed legislation banning assault weapons, making Illinois just the 9th state to enact one of the strongest assault weapons bans in the country.

On January 18, 2023, the ISRA filed a federal lawsuit opposing Gov. Pritzker’s unconstitutional assault weapons ban.

https://www.homergop.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0b0752156c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_18_02_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b0752156c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.homergop.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0b0752156c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_18_02_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b0752156c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Here's what's at stake:

**Supporting Our Troops:** The House GOP defense bill includes funding to pay our troops, modernize our military equipment, and ensure they have the resources they need to protect our nation.

**National Security:** We face increasing threats from around the world, and our military must be prepared to defend our interests. This bill is essential to maintain a strong national defense posture.

**Conservative Principles:** It's time to do what's best for our country. This bill aligns with conservative values by prioritizing national security and fiscal responsibility.

_**We can't afford to let the radical left stand in the way of securing our nation and supporting our troops.**_

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, in Washington, liberals treat our national security like a political football. Prime example: The Biden administration just threatened to veto the House GOP's defense bill, all to score some pathetic political points for the Blue Team. This bill, designed to provide crucial funding for our military and strengthen our national defense, is now at risk of being derailed by the radical left. | Here's what's at stake: Supporting Our Troops: The House GOP defense bill includes funding to pay our troops, modernize our military equipment, and ensure they have the resources they need to protect our nation. National Security: We face increasing threats from around the world, and our military must be prepared to defend our interests. This bill is essential to maintain a strong national defense posture. Conservative Principles: It's time to do what's best for our country. This bill aligns with conservative values by prioritizing national security and fiscal responsibility. We can't afford to let the radical left stand in the way of securing our nation and supporting our troops. | | | | Thank you, Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. CADDO ST. PMB #174 CLEBURNE, TX 76031 Stay connected with our campaign and be part of the movement. Follow Roger on social media for updates, volunteer to support the cause, or reach out to him directly. By joining Team Williams, you will make a difference in your community. | A Note For You, From Roger My commitment to our great state and country is unwavering, and I am grateful to have my wife Patty, our two daughters, and YOU standing beside me on this journey. | Roger Williams 10 N. subject: This isn’t how government is meant to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Gaughran for Congress _
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/864d034f0494/party-12744145?e=a6aa651d40)

| | [ ](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=2421cb1699&e=a6aa651d40)

| | **Dear Friend** ,

If you’re following the news out of Washington, things are looking grim. Last night, the House Republicans put out a proposed short-term budget that is completely irresponsible – breaking their own promises made in the debt ceiling agreement and requiring cuts to essential services.

Then, far right extremists said even THAT didn’t go far enough. These House Republicans can’t pass anything on their own – and forget about negotiating with the Senate and President Biden to achieve a final solution to fund the government (which is Congress’ primary job by the way).

The GOP doesn’t know how to govern – and Nick LaLota is part of the problem. He joins up with these extremists to protect George Santos, to try to impeach President Biden with zero evidence of wrongdoing, and to sit by while nothing gets done for Long Island.

We are going to need a change – big time. [Please send a donation so I bring reasonable policies to Washington that put Long Island first. ](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=8a51545f3c&e=a6aa651d40)

Thanks,
Jim
---
|
---
---
| |

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: When you woke up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Michigan is going to be one of the closest, most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country next year.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=684%2E135344%2EAIIaZT)

Hey there --
I am sure you didn't wake up this morning, spring out of bed and scream "Today is the day I am going to donate to help Elissa Slotkin hold Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats!"
But I am emailing in the hope that you will consider contributing today anyway. Here’s why:
Michigan is going to be one of the closest, most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country next year. Recent polling shows a dead-heat in both the Senate and the Presidential races, which means we have two competitive elections to win next year. And now we have a Republican opponent who, as of early September, has a 20 year voting record of supporting things like extreme bans on abortion even in the cases of rape, incest, and a common miscarriage.
This news makes it especially important that we’re doing the work to build an early foundation now. Donations a year from now – when we’re in the home stretch – are important. But donations now are even more important, because they allow us to map out a strategic plan and make decisions about when and how we reach voters.
**I also hope you will contribute because, at the end of this month, we’ll once again report our fundraising numbers for the quarter and everyone will be watching to see how we compare to our new Republican opponent.** And because I have never taken corporate PAC money, it’s donations from emails like this that will showcase our competitive edge in this race.
So while contributing to my campaign might not have been at the top of your to-do list this morning, [**I would love it if you would consider donating $3 or whatever you can to my campaign today. The amount is important, but not as important as the donation itself. It will all add up fast when we're all chipping in.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hbnlDo&refcode=em230918-1-60&t=2&akid=684%2E135344%2EAIIaZT)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-sep23.4B2XRE&refcode=em230918-1-60&t=21&akid=684%2E135344%2EAIIaZT)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-sep23.ftxq_S&refcode=em230918-1-60&t=22&akid=684%2E135344%2EAIIaZT)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hxG7bS&refcode=em230918-1-60&t=23&akid=684%2E135344%2EAIIaZT)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-sep23.Buc2ei&refcode=em230918-1-60&t=24&akid=684%2E135344%2EAIIaZT)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-sep23.CyJnvg&refcode=em230918-1-60&t=25&akid=684%2E135344%2EAIIaZT)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sep23.owjc7j&refcode=em230918-1-60&t=26&akid=684%2E135344%2EAIIaZT)**

****
Thank you,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=684%2E135344%2EAIIaZT).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: GOP Presidential Debate
subject: Counting down until Trump’s return
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Will we see President Trump return to the GOP primary debate stage later this month? | After the first GOP Primary Debate, we were impressed with the quality of the Republican candidates. However, there was a notable absence. President Trump was dealing with the rampant Democratic witch hunt, but we are still hopeful for a return to the debate stage. **_What about you, Peter?_**

**_Would you like to see President Trump take the debate stage at the next GOP Primary Debate?_**

[**YES - I WANT TO SEE TRUMP ON THE STAGE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2172cbfb139e451a98dc80fb886e6276&_e=uplnPKPjcRvH2LeXKh2DehLQKO0u3t4o1Xni7UiRbQjnuA4I4215hfOTWN4XsXMVhffmIjBNCrSFpngP_zWcgoy8L1x6g4mxd5YR_YbLvBLwxdzENSIDWRczYpvd33Q2_LouyP7mteJySx_lPumzrcLJExALAqDbdy5BHUUr45yKzDqWA8GgNE6Wp8fuSmdxpMNg83MN5O1KYAitRCme8R9Ol2Ngwnsfpc5BGJq0JV9xMb7WJaItbJx0bkLO4QhEOZKeBwIZWBYcdRl3p6h2P4rEtw2a7EyesSWn0n1XPlDg3Hfo0IFwdGeAdgJ7iGjZ64492x0IO3nlH_SjmVdaINHstZ_zCJJuG55Si1hGZuRwt6k4xkqa9Sd5JkWutrbrB_7zjddAguur2P4ubouB--RY1zLlaCDUBJKf9Jp2rfFfL7uWMi7XkSR8He6QriuG)
[**NO - HE HAS MORE IMPORTANT THINGS TO FOCUS ON**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2172cbfb139e451a98dc80fb886e6276&_e=uplnPKPjcRvH2LeXKh2DehLQKO0u3t4o1Xni7UiRbQjnuA4I4215hfOTWN4XsXMVhffmIjBNCrSFpngP_zWcgoy8L1x6g4mxd5YR_YbLvBLwxdzENSIDWRczYpvd33Q2_LouyP7mteJySx_lPumzrcLJExALAqDbdy5BHUUr45yKzDqWA8GgNE6Wp8fuSmdxpMNg83MN5O1KYAitRCme8R9Ol2Ngwnsfpc5BGJq0JV9xMb7WJaItbJx0bkLO4QhEOZKeBwIZWBYcdRl3p6h2P4rEtw2a7EyesSWn0n1XPlBnU1jw0PQNw0Wkmvsu9IOXo79JO2iSkdam8XO2Fmzu2E19Qwu7YBKXl-707Y2U8wa641-iK3VSml2NYsfqKPRtbMcjl5W1iBfrLpVUa-CWNzITM8MLNrKIwwaI5ynAAAgqkrzwnzMRjYMBPi84NLNa)

| Hi Peter,

Exciting news! On Saturday, September 30th, I’m welcoming House Democratic Caucus Chair, Rep. Pete Aguilar to South San Francisco. With Super Tuesday less than six months away, and the November 5th election just over a year away, this will be a unique opportunity to be part of the conversation that will chart the course for the future of the Democratic Party.
---
| [RSVP now!](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=bf7f269a4c&e=292fde286a "RSVP now!")
---
| If you can't make it to the reception with Congressman Pete Aguilar, would you consider contributing towards our critical fundraising deadline on September 30th? [Click here to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=06e09575f7&e=292fde286a)

Standing up for voting fights, fighting for our planet, and ensuring our economy works for everyone is what I am fighting for in Washington. Your support is vital as we work towards a brighter future for all Americans. Thank you for being a part of our journey.
---
| Sincerely,
Congressman Kevin Mullin

This message is just for you, Fellow Conservative, We’d like to thank you for being a subscriber to our email list and a strong supporter of Ted Cruz and the Ted Cruz for Senate campaign here in Houston, Texas. We truly appreciate that you open and read our campaign email messages and updates. This campaign is so important for the future of Texas and our entire country. And we are working as hard as we can to re-elect Senator Cruz to the United States Senate for you. **_Why_ is our mission so important?** **First,** we must ensure that Texas continues to have Senator Cruz as a strong, effective voice in Washington, DC; one that is looking out for Texans and our Texas values. As you know, Senator Cruz loves Texas and has been focused on providing conservative solutions for our state and Nation. **Secondly,** and very importantly, we must also do our part to ensure that Republicans win back the United States Senate in 2024. We all know it and we all feel it- something is very wrong in the modern Democratic Party. It isn’t even about politics anymore. It’s about our lives. A far-left Democrat Senate is a threat to our families, our livelihoods, our jobs, and our Constitutional rights. **But the GOP can’t retake the Senate if we don’t re-elect Senator Cruz...** **...and we can’t win this race until****you****make your first donation.** **[Donate $5 right now to help us Save America? >>](http://trk.tedcruz.) **
---
[**MAKE YOUR FIRST DONATION **](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
_Thank you- we need you and we are with you!_ \- Team Cruz

First, I headed to Union County to talk with voters about my record as Auditor General, and my priorities as Pennsylvania’s next Attorney General. Whether it’s protecting the right to vote for every eligible Pennsylvanian, or defending abortion rights from far-right attacks, our next Attorney General will be **on the front lines of these fights.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69930215/427761018/-412144306?refcode=email_091823_Pictures&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmUyMGMzYS0zODU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bA504uptutq_R_u1ckZDYt3tTaewtcrLoEmPHtglEpU=)
Next, I traveled west to Pittsburgh to meet with Governor Shapiro and other local officials at the Labor Day Parade! There, I talked about the need to support Pennsylvania workers, raise the minimum wage, and ensure the union way of life continues to thrive here in PA.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69930216/427761021/-412144306?refcode=email_091823_Pictures&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmUyMGMzYS0zODU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bA504uptutq_R_u1ckZDYt3tTaewtcrLoEmPHtglEpU=)
I was so excited to meet with Democrats from across the Commonwealth and discuss the local issues that are impacting our communities the most. From supporting public schools, students and teachers to creating good-paying jobs that uplift communities, I’ll roll up my sleeves and get to work for _every_ Pennsylvanian as your next Attorney General.
**We can’t take this election for granted.** The far-right is going to try every trick in the book to mislead voters, smear my record, and take this seat so they can implement their extremist agenda.
[_**I need your help to fight back. Please consider making a donation to my campaign so we can continue to connect with voters across the Commonwealth and win this important election →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69930219/427761022/-412144306?refcode=email_091823_Pictures&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmUyMGMzYS0zODU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bA504uptutq_R_u1ckZDYt3tTaewtcrLoEmPHtglEpU=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Bad news for Republicans:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Hey there,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a small donation between Seth Moulton and our campaign ahead of our midnight deadline [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff] . But first, I wanted to explain why your gift is so important — especially right now.
From the moment I jumped into the race, Republicans piled on.
It actually started the night right before I announced my campaign. In one of Kevin McCarthy’s first acts as Speaker, he unilaterally removed me from serving on the House Intelligence Committee.
Then it was Matt Gaetz. He introduced legislation trying to bar me from accessing classified information.
Then came Tucker Carlson. He recently launched into a desperate rant about me on his primetime Fox News show.
Then Donald Trump piled on too. He couldn’t resist. He dedicated part of his CPAC speech to hurl insult after insult against me.
And I’m going to be honest, I don’t even send you the really crazy stuff.
It’s just the beginning. After every one of their attacks, I then receive thousands more like it online from their MAGA loyalists trying to sabotage our work to defend democracy.
Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve stood up to these bullies and called out their lies.
It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the Senate floor.
Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight — especially when it gets tough. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or any one of his lackeys tear our campaign down.
Friend, I need to know you have my back the entire way. Will you pitch in a donation of $3 or more to Seth Moulton and our campaign before our midnight deadline? The attacks are only going to get nastier from here, so we need to prepare for everything they’re going to launch our way: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Thank you for your support,
— Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

body:
Here's what you need to know about where the candidates in the race for PA-01 stand on abortion freedom:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69930462/427761826/-1962024584?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20230918_fr_midmonth2_team_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGJiYWFiYS0zODU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y4CDyDc-aXMpicdPqPy_IA_6PijnNAeBcGMb6NszG2w=)

Here's what you need to know about where the candidates in the race for PA-01 stand on abortion freedom: **Rep. Brian FitzPatrick (R)**
🪖 Voted to block service members from accessing abortion
❌ Voted against codifying the abortion freedoms we had under Roe v. Wade
⛓️ Voted to criminalize doctors who perform abortions **Mark Houck (R)**
😳 Said "rape and incest is not a good excuse" for getting an abortion **Ashley Ehasz (D)**
🇺🇸 Risked her life to protect our freedoms overseas – she'll do the same in Congress
🫡 Pro-choice and proud of it Every time we see another clinic close, another woman who had to sit in a parking lot until she was sick enough to have an abortion, another child forced into parenthood – **it's a reminder of how real the stakes are for abortion freedom in this country right now.** **[That's why we HAVE to elect the only pro-choice candidate in this race. We have a big end-of-quarter goal coming up. body:

| | | **OFFICIAL SEPTEMBER PETITION TO HELP STOP D.C. STATEHOOD**
Hey Friend, thankfully we reached our signature quota last month to stop the Radical Left from making D.C. the 51st state a little longer. **[We hate to bother you, but we NEED you to do your part this month as well by adding your name!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zce6ieja8q394nd0aut0enjmmerg6cfq9gjh00o8_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm2p73cth2bs "We hate to bother you, but we NEED you to do your part this month as well by adding your name!")**

Here's the bottom line:

**Democrats may be days away from making D.C. the 51st state.** Yes, you read that correctly, just DAYS AWAY. American conservative values are DOOMED if patriots like you don't act NOW to STOP the bill from passing!

If D.C. becomes a state, Chuck Schumer locks in **PERMANENT** Democratic majorities with TWO more far-Left Senators.

To make matters even worse, the Radical Left will have the power to IMPEACH Clarence Thomas and PACK the Court - _obliterating our country as we know it!_

**[Don't think twice, sign State Republicans' Official Petition to help Stop D.C. Statehood BEFORE Democrats vote on the bill.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znq83kdfoja4sbr1a0spta8luh82nr5sfpplp158_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hm2p73cth2bs "Don’t think twice, sign State Republicans’ Official Petition to help Stop D.C. Statehood BEFORE Democrats vote on the bill.")**

**If this passes, nothing else matters. Conservatives will never have a say again.**

Hi there, I’m Maryland State Delegate Joseline Peña-Melnyk and I’m supporting Lesley Lopez and her campaign for Congress in MD-06’s open seat because she’s a remarkably tough woman with a concrete record of results. I have seen Lesley on the frontlines of change and truly believe that she has what it takes to win this highly competitive race.
Right now, Lesley needs all of us to step up for her can’t-miss September 30th end-of-quarter fundraising goal because we need smart, persistent, and tireless women like Lesley in Congress. Please chip in with $10, $50, $100, or what you can to Lesley’s campaign. Your help will keep this critical open seat blue and send an advocate and fighter for all Maryland families to Congress! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamlesley_email?refcode2=link_CTA]
If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

GIVE $10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamlesley_email?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=abx10] GIVE $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamlesley_email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode2=abx50]
GIVE $100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamlesley_email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode2=abx100] GIVE OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamlesley_email?refcode2=abx-other]

As her fellow Maryland State Delegate and Chair of the Health and Government Operations Committee, I’ve seen Lesley in action:
✓ Lesley worked with Democrats and Republicans to address the healthcare gap, bringing life-saving healthcare providers to serve families in our state’s rural regions and immigrant communities in our cities.
✓ Lesley passed bipartisan legislation that eliminated co-pays for breast cancer screenings, making this essential preventative care more accessible for all.
✓ Lesley is a smart policymaker who sticks to her principles and knows how to work across the aisle to benefit families across our state.
Take it from me, a woman with a working-class background like Lesley who has run for Congress in Maryland: our state is a bit of a boys club. But if we pull together, Lesley will be the first woman elected to represent MD-06 in thirty years and the first woman in our federal delegation since Senator Barbara Mikulski retired. We need more fearless women who are true Democrats like Lesley in Congress.
Right now, the best way we can support Lesley in this fight is to help her reach her September 30 end-of-quarter goal so that she can succeed!
I’m asking you to pitch in $10, $50, $100, or what you can to Lesley’s campaign so we can elect a proven leader and a powerhouse of a woman with a track record that speaks for itself to Congress to fight for us. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamlesley_email?refcode2=link_CTA]
Let’s do this for all of Maryland’s families!
Thank you,
# [#] Joseline Peña-Melnyk
Lesley Lopez is a Democrat running for the open competitive seat in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District. When she’s not busy being a mom to her two toddlers, Lesley Lopez serves the people of Maryland as a Delegate from District 39 in the Maryland General Assembly. Since she was first elected in 2018, Lesley has rapidly become an effective legislator and leader, spearheading efforts to alleviate student debt, improve the delivery and efficiency of health care, and protect the limited financial resources of economically vulnerable Marylanders. Lesley has passed legislation to strengthen gun safety laws and guarantee the rights for all women in the state. She is an adjunct professor at George Washington University and a proud union member of SEIU Local 500. Lesley lives in Germantown, MD, with her husband Richard Kelly, and their two sons, Max and Graham.

clean_body: | | | | Join us in saying HELL NO LAWLER PETITIONS It’s becoming increasingly clear that New York City politicians could care less about YOU, Peter - yet they twist themselves in knots to accommodate illegal immigrants. Governor Hochul needs to grow a backbone and stop the radical leftists in her own party from forcing another tax onto YOU and driving even more good people out of our state. | | | | | Thank you, Lawler Petitions Team | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- ==

Let me level with you, Peter.

I was just running through our numbers and noticed our finances aren’t where I’d like them to be at this point in the month.

You see, being short by even a few dollars can throw off our entire budget. That means we may have to cut back on our plans over the next few critical months of this campaign.

**If you have a few bucks to spare, I’d really appreciate it if you could add a contribution to our campaign before our critical end-of-quarter deadline.**

Look, I hate asking you for money, but your grassroots donations help us keep the lights on and pay for staff.

_**[That’s why I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between Fight for Progress and my campaign today. No pressure though, I know how hard you work for every dollar—and I’ll never take your support for granted. I appreciate you being part of the team.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69930901/427763288/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230918-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNjgyZWYxLTM5NTYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0YuLEJq1R6LgoTzeW_OGvQqnkEJiLZOLdz8D-9BcJpc=)**_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: Impeachment? Do not be distracted.
body:
The American people won’t be secure unless Congress defunds the weaponization of the Department of Justice. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10390791?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

The left is trying to undermine our elections and **bar President Trump from running again** through a legal theory involving January 6th and the 14th Amendment.

Dozens of major news outlets have touted the theory to lend it credibility. Citizens for Renewing America’s Jeffrey Clark responded by [releasing a primer](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=30d3adba4c&e=17913c7d6d) thoroughly debunking the crackpot legal theory, which President Trump [posted](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=206753c9a5&e=17913c7d6d) on Truth Social.

Meanwhile, _the spending fight in Washington is upon us_.

In coming weeks **conservatives****will have their resolve put to the test** by the D.C. cartel. We must stay focused on defunding weaponized government. _Let me explain_.

Kevin McCarthy recently announced an impeachment inquiry against Joe Biden. While Biden should be held to account for his corruption, _woke and weaponized federal agencies enabled him_.

They are the target in this fight - **conservatives cannot be distracted** or allow impeachment to be an excuse to fund the weaponized bureaucracy. My Citizens for Renewing America colleague Wade Miller said it best:

“Impeachment is not a replacement for accountability through government funding and the power of the purse...it is time for Republicans to take a stand to protect Americans.”
---
|
---
| **Executive Dir. Wade Miller: Enough is Enough, Stop Funding Weaponized Government**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c9b72b72f7&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Citizens for Renewing America Executive Director Wade Miller joined House Freedom Caucus members [calling on Republicans](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=90af230e3a&e=17913c7d6d) to put together **a spending package that addresses weaponized government** acting against the interests of the American people.

“We have a weaponization of the DOJ and FBI, political opponents are being targeted and Americans with different opinions are being treated differently than those with regime-friendly viewpoints.”

_Impeachment is not a substitute for defunding the weaponized bureaucracy_ that enforced COVID tyranny, destroyed our schools, and investigated and harassed its political opponents like our colleague Jeffrey Clark and countless more Americans.
---
|
---
| **FBI Whistleblower Steve Friend: Impeachment Inquiry “Ploy” to Pass Spending Bills**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=ddc579464f&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| As FBI Whistleblower and Citizens for Renewing America Senior Fellow Steve Friend [explained](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3a25dec6d3&e=17913c7d6d) on Newsmax, _impeachment will not address the underlying issues with weaponized government_ infecting all aspects of American’s life.

“They’re going to say that in order to carry out this impeachment inquiry they’re going to need to fund the government through a continuing resolution... however, any sort of impeachment against President Biden is not going to have meaningful change on folks’ day-to-day lives. They’re not going to see a change to weaponized government, the border or inflation.”
---
|
---
| **Primer: Debunking Leftist Legal Theories to Bar President Trump from Running Again**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7689c8e25d&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| It’s not above the left to use dubious legal theories to undermine the Constitution and our elections. We’re seeing this on full-display with their latest effort to wage lawfare against President Trump.

Thankfully, my colleague Jeffrey Clark, **who was persecuted for serving President Trump** , responded with a thorough Constitutional analysis debunking their phony claims.

“The arguments trying to stop Trump from going on the ballot are wrong both as a matter of law and as a matter of nationally adjudicated fact.”

**Primer:[Why the Fourteenth Amendment Does Not Bar Presidential Candidates from Running for the Presidency](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=6107e4efa7&e=17913c7d6d)**
---
|
---
| Friends, as I said on [Twitter](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e22d0d4d90&e=17913c7d6d), the American people won’t be secure unless Congress defunds the weaponization of the Department of Justice. It must be a priority in the funding battle this month.

We must seize the initiative and define this debate.

As always, thank you for [your support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a5ea11251e&e=17913c7d6d).

Keep fighting,

Russ Vought

clean_body: The American people won’t be secure unless Congress defunds the weaponization of the Department of Justice. | | | | | | | | | | Friends, The left is trying to undermine our elections and bar President Trump from running again through a legal theory involving January 6th and the 14th Amendment. Dozens of major news outlets have touted the theory to lend it credibility. Citizens for Renewing America’s Jeffrey Clark responded by thoroughly debunking the crackpot legal theory, which President Trump on Truth Social. Meanwhile, the spending fight in Washington is upon us. In coming weeks conservativeswill have their resolve put to the test by the D.C. cartel. We must stay focused on defunding weaponized government. Let me explain. Kevin McCarthy recently announced an impeachment inquiry against Joe Biden. While Biden should be held to account for his corruption, woke and weaponized federal agencies enabled him. They are the target in this fight - conservatives cannot be distracted or allow impeachment to be an excuse to fund the weaponized bureaucracy. My Citizens for Renewing America colleague Wade Miller said it best: “Impeachment is not a replacement for accountability through government funding and the power of the purse...it is time for Republicans to take a stand to protect Americans.” | | Executive Dir. Wade Miller: Enough is Enough, Stop Funding Weaponized Government | | Citizens for Renewing America Executive Director Wade Miller joined House Freedom Caucus members to put together a spending package that addresses weaponized government acting against the interests of the American people. “We have a weaponization of the DOJ and FBI, political opponents are being targeted and Americans with different opinions are being treated differently than those with regime-friendly viewpoints.” Impeachment is not a substitute for defunding the weaponized bureaucracy that enforced COVID tyranny, destroyed our schools, and investigated and harassed its political opponents like our colleague Jeffrey Clark and countless more Americans. | | FBI Whistleblower Steve Friend: Impeachment Inquiry “Ploy” to Pass Spending Bills | | As FBI Whistleblower and Citizens for Renewing America Senior Fellow Steve Friend on Newsmax, impeachment will not address the underlying issues with weaponized government infecting all aspects of American’s life. “They’re going to say that in order to carry out this impeachment inquiry they’re going to need to fund the government through a continuing resolution... however, any sort of impeachment against President Biden is not going to have meaningful change on folks’ day-to-day lives. They’re not going to see a change to weaponized government, the border or inflation.” | | Primer: Debunking Leftist Legal Theories to Bar President Trump from Running Again | | It’s not above the left to use dubious legal theories to undermine the Constitution and our elections. We’re seeing this on full-display with their latest effort to wage lawfare against President Trump. Thankfully, my colleague Jeffrey Clark, who was persecuted for serving President Trump , responded with a thorough Constitutional analysis debunking their phony claims. “The arguments trying to stop Trump from going on the ballot are wrong both as a matter of law and as a matter of nationally adjudicated fact.” Primer: | | Friends, as I said on , the American people won’t be secure unless Congress defunds the weaponization of the Department of Justice. It must be a priority in the funding battle this month. We must seize the initiative and define this debate. As always, thank you for . body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=de93ba9e3b8646d4b2f42d0f7668156b&_e=LaipodqkWV2VhmSH2P9X23g2KgKz5sHlNxrssny5jLdpIZubfjuRTbKGj4zw_lyOUlk_gDYjqkMCVXEWooVeomAZSyd3nb3Ww8x6gcyeY6H7iptK7vZ37BXSzc73vvovY8_mle8LY6RLOIE9kuiU4MeG3TAp5nYj8xUrd1Yq3utZa-eGu4DA65rWTiuA0rdtBlK1YCdEBM9pJHfHUO7c0bWEqLC0L5lLj9rF370EeOlKZWCv2zcy049MXng_MghiQcr-Wff24JaPdymAdc4nJyMFgVhSdMKn13Wilp494ifMSoyLmAWMec5_m6wnMT7GlzaOIU6qOkMADc9HQTo6vjnxQqIzauKKGupc8LSj9x_3q6XJZnfef1g8CX6Oj6ED)

Peter, My name is Hung Cao.
I spent 25 years in the U.S. Navy fighting on the front lines in some of the most dangerous places in the world.

Serving in the military wasn’t easy. I sacrificed the comforts of home, time with my family, and even the birth of my first child.

I’ve performed dangerous deep dives, dismantled bombs with seconds to go, and have come face to face with some of the world’s most dangerous terrorists.

I know what courage is - **and I know that right now, we don’t have it in Washington.**

I saw Joe Biden leave our troops behind in Afghanistan, and after brave men and women lost their lives because of his decisions, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines.

**My military career may be over, but I’m just beginning the next chapter of my fight to protect and defend America.**

**I’m running for U.S. Senate because America deserves REAL conservative leadership that knows that freedom isn’t free.**

After traveling the world in the Navy, I can tell you with certainty: if we lose our freedom in America, there is nowhere else to go.

Yet every day the Biden Administration is undermining our values and putting our nation at risk of falling to our enemies like communist China.

_This isn’t the America my brothers and sisters in arms and I put our lives on the line for._

**But just like during my time in the Navy, I can’t finish this mission alone.**

I need an A-team by my side, and I want you to be a part of it.

**[I’m asking you today: are you with me in our fight to take back the U.S. Senate and RESTORE American freedom?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=de93ba9e3b8646d4b2f42d0f7668156b&_e=LaipodqkWV2VhmSH2P9X23g2KgKz5sHlNxrssny5jLdpIZubfjuRTbKGj4zw_lyOUlk_gDYjqkMCVXEWooVeomAZSyd3nb3Ww8x6gcyeY6H7iptK7vZ37BXSzc73vvovY8_mle8LY6RLOIE9kuiU4MeG3TAp5nYj8xUrd1Yq3utZa-eGu4DA65rWTiuA0rdtBlK1YCdEBM9pJHfHUO7c0bWEqLC0L5lLj9rF370EeOmOKTa1KbtWOEyqgOFGB4lkJ_6WVB37DWSmSY0p_MTn1rzH2Y0gfWx2qkDwGEdsaO1upY4nKpy9zFqa0bVyH9C1NAnesNiI8YUkMA47vy5KRODtpVv-fjhHUy0xwd84cElMIVTdla1k5YUkeJjSgrAl)**
---
[**> > STAND WITH ME TODAY <<**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=de93ba9e3b8646d4b2f42d0f7668156b&_e=LaipodqkWV2VhmSH2P9X23g2KgKz5sHlNxrssny5jLdpIZubfjuRTbKGj4zw_lyOUlk_gDYjqkMCVXEWooVeomAZSyd3nb3Ww8x6gcyeY6H7iptK7vZ37BXSzc73vvovY8_mle8LY6RLOIE9kuiU4MeG3TAp5nYj8xUrd1Yq3utZa-eGu4DA65rWTiuA0rdtBlK1YCdEBM9pJHfHUO7c0bWEqLC0L5lLj9rF370EeOnLzF1WL0RIQn-oP6uxwwCR5T05A10fUTvRz_0SRfrR84X52cA7Q5wUzsXh78lMJ_8QeYYrX2tdsMn8UT69ZAhYkM0pTmRilQi-HlPs0BhKfZncKr1zDLsgqMQ5osMCzRUcQe0aV5LjVux9qxJznzMi)

Together, I know we can win this race and take back our freedoms.

In Liberty,

I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8a948681f14b60834fc3041636176430520b93d4ff365eb1fc954f99cd9d2fd0291f85da94dfe60d4843d4482180ad1cbcc5fa58f23c4bf12eeab631e8e7e2d7 Will you join me today and help me save our country? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8a948681f14b60834fc3041636176430520b93d4ff365eb1fc954f99cd9d2fd0291f85da94dfe60d4843d4482180ad1cbcc5fa58f23c4bf12eeab631e8e7e2d7 DONATE NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. You have just 1 DAY LEFT to participate in the RNC’s contest for a chance to join me at my SECOND Presidential Debate in California! But you must enter BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, Peter. ENTER FOR A CHANCE TO WIN TICKETS As a supporter, I would love for you to be there! But you must enter by midnight TOMORROW NIGHT for your chance to win two free tickets to the second Presidential Debate, airfare for two, and hotel accommodations. When you make a contribution of ANY amount here before 11:59 PM on Tuesday, you will automatically be entered into the drawing for an unforgettable trip to witness me on the Presidential Debate stage again. I hope to see you there, Peter! My very best, Nikki Haley ENTER NOW GET YOUR SHIRT VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. Will you join me today and help me save our country? DONATE NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to the Republican National Committee by clicking here . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here or by texting “2NDDEBATE” to 80810 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone , you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Text STOP 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between August 3rd, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time and September 19th, 2023 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations for two (2) (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. | Friend,

Back in January, the whole world witnessed a historic contest for House Speaker.

'The Patriot 20' and I fought lobbyist pressure until we had a toolkit to fight back against the Biden Regime.

But, Friend, I had to deliver some unfortunate news to Congress...

**The American People have not received CRITICAL policy changes from that agreement. Instead, we 've received more empty words from the D.C. Swamp creatures.**

**Well, this Florida Man has learned that things only change Washington when you force them to change. So, I 'm going on OFFENSE and DEMANDING what you were promised:**

_Single-Subject Spending Bills ... Votes on Term Limits and Balanced Budgets... Subpoenas for the Biden Crime Family Members Who Have Been Grifting Off This Country... And IMPEACHMENT for the Big Guy Himself!_

**Get this - now, leadership is calling for a "continuing resolution" so we can continue funding every element of this weaponized government... _including the Election Interference Operation of Jack Smith._**

Enough is enough, Friend.

Speaker McCarthy may be taking baby steps like 'endorsing' an impeachment inquiry into the addled man who converted the Vice Presidency to his family's personal ATM Machine.

But we must do more. I am demanding every single concession that you were promised in January - that means NO continuing resolutions and REAL accountability for the Biden Crime Family!

name: American Defense News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zio49m0u65b73r4b44lscdi1kep2k7rpkrl8n8uo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hmeoj4clh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhmnj6khqtpkd6blavh6ghhq5kjpjorc42fqp1gg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hmeoj4clh2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5jnhua9h5eg9ho154g5fdal6da2k4ps5a2tgp98_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hmeoj4clh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zap2qjkd00tnbi2a4bei60fk3ivjfoolpprid5bg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hmeoj4clh2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcv6g262fhfi3k8khodj901o289tr6ue7osmm410_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hmeoj4clh2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr49g7n3hm9i0vksd1u8doab175igl0scsqr8s3o_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hmeoj4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chhmep36c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5kjl4nmedh14sqbpea8cbtpe9gar6f6bhv49st0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hmeoj4clh2bs)_

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq2ncjsi7o9lt0620nhoo1sl4r9m4h4jp8n9aqag_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1hmeoj4clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Suzanne=20Crouch?=
subject: A View From The Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
What an incredible week on the campaign trail! Meeting passionate Hoosiers from all walks, their enthusiasm for change is energizing!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

What an incredible week it has been on the campaign trail! I've had the privilege of meeting with passionate Hoosiers from all walks of life who are eager to see positive change in Indiana. From college students to dedicated patriots, I've been energized by the enthusiasm for our campaign and our vision for the great state of Indiana.

Read on for a recap of some of the events from this past week!

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid022LyfAGGbCJD8rLJJ3t22zhQghgscXmxnSZnGk4uJzyfGAdEnyU3rWFQUVQpjTygKl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

P.S. My first TV ad dropped this week! Did you see it?

Check it out on my Facebook page (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , here (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid022LyfAGGbCJD8rLJJ3t22zhQghgscXmxnSZnGk4uJzyfGAdEnyU3rWFQUVQpjTygKl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

And, while you're on my page, give me a follow to keep up with campaign happenings, endorsements, how we plan to enact meaningful change for our great state, and more!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

** Butler University College Republicans
------------------------------------------------------------
I️ kicked off the week visiting with the Butler University College Republicans. It was inspiring to hear from the future leaders of our state, discussing the issues most important to them.

Our dialogue was a reminder of the importance of engaging with our youth and ensuring that Indiana remains a place where they can thrive.

** Hamilton County Republican Party Fall Dinner
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

One of the highlights of the week was attending and speaking at the Hamilton County Republican Fall Dinner, the largest fall dinner in our state.

The enthusiasm in the room was palpable, and it reaffirmed my belief that together, we can make Indiana an even better place to live, work, and raise a family.

** Front Porch Patriots
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I visited and spoke with the Front Porch Patriots in Indianapolis.

It was an honor to discuss their concerns and our shared commitment to preserving Indiana's values.

** Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The Brown County Republican Party hosted a wonderful Lincoln Day Dinner, and I was privileged to attend and speak.

The event highlighted the importance of honoring our rich history and the principles that have made our state great.

** Governor Candidate Forum
------------------------------------------------------------
The 8th District Republican Central Committee's Governor Candidate Forum was a great opportunity to discuss our plans for Indiana's future and address important questions from party leaders.

** Johnson County GOP Chairman's Cookout
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

To cap off the week, I️ went to the Johnson County GOP Chairman's Cookout.

It was a fantastic gathering of like-minded Hoosiers who are dedicated to the conservative values that make our state strong.

** A Special Shoutout to Team Crouch!
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

It was great to see so many wearing red this week! This includes our wonderful cheerleaders at the Hamilton County Fall Dinner and the many members of Team Crouch who showed their support at the Dale Fall Festival Parade, Johnson County Chairman's Cookout and this weekend's candidate forum.

I am deeply grateful for the unwavering support of Team Crouch and the countless Hoosiers who have joined us on this journey.
YOU are driving our campaign forward, and I couldn't be more proud to have you by my side.
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“There is no other person that knows Indiana the way Lieutenant Governor Suzanne Crouch does. She has visited corner to corner of our great state. Her vision, energy and servant leadership have helped small cities and towns grow and prosper. I am honored to endorse her!"

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I️ have worked with Lt. Gov. Crouch over the years and I️ think she is well suited to be Governor. Her experience with local and state government makes her stand out above the rest and I️ believe she is the best choice."
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"It is with much enthusiasm that I recommend Suzanne Crouch for Governor. I trust her honest and practical approach to running our state. She is a huge supporter of the City of Rockport and Spencer County!"

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Having known Suzanne since holding office in Vanderburgh County, as an Indiana lawmaker, State Auditor and now Lt. Governor, she is well qualified! No one running is better prepared to assume the position of Indiana Governor."

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to all of you who have shown your support and joined us at these events. Your enthusiasm and commitment to our campaign are what drive us forward. Together, we can bring about positive change and make Indiana an even better place for all.

As we continue on this exciting journey, I invite you to stay engaged, share your thoughts, and spread the word about our campaign. Let's work together to make Indiana the best it can be.

Onward and upward,

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Join me at one of my upcoming fundraisers!
------------------------------------------------------------
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .

** Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise!
------------------------------------------------------------

As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)!
SHOP (https://shop.crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
DONATE (https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Let's keep the conversation going! Please reach out to share your questions, comments and concerns about Indiana as I️ run for Governor.
EMAIL ME (https://crouchforindiana.com/connect/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=20df9fec97-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_15_02_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-20df9fec97-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"It is with much enthusiasm that I recommend Suzanne Crouch for Governor. I trust her honest and practical approach to running our state. She is a huge supporter of the City of Rockport and Spencer County!" "Having known Suzanne since holding office in Vanderburgh County, as an Indiana lawmaker, State Auditor and now Lt. Governor, she is well qualified! No one running is better prepared to assume the position of Indiana Governor." Last but not least... I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to all of you who have shown your support and joined us at these events. Your enthusiasm and commitment to our campaign are what drive us forward. Together, we can bring about positive change and make Indiana an even better place for all. As we continue on this exciting journey, I invite you to stay engaged, share your thoughts, and spread the word about our campaign. Let's work together to make Indiana the best it can be. Onward and upward, Get Involved! Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more. GET INVOLVED () Join me at one of my upcoming fundraisers! For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at: heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) . Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise! As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)! SHOP () DONATE () Let's keep the conversation going! Please reach out to share your questions, comments and concerns about Indiana as I️ run for Governor. EMAIL ME () ============================================================ Copyright © 2023 Suzanne Crouch for Indiana, All rights reserved.

body:
Last year, the election in CA-13 was decided by 564 votes.

We were the second-closest race in the entire country. The Central Valley deserves a fighter in Congress – someone who isn't afraid to stand up to party bosses and fight for clean water, quality education, public safety, and the fundamental freedoms that our communities deserve. But a mere 564 votes determined that, instead, we’d be represented by an anti-choice, out-of-touch extremist who votes in lockstep with Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc6f7a28-7b75-4a40-a8b0-add12a83b2b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter,

Coach appeared on _The Kimberly Guilfoyle Show_ recently. They discussed a number of important issues, including Coach’s ongoing stand to force the Pentagon to reverse its illegal woke abortion policy.

As you know, Coach isn’t backing down. He’s taking a stand for life and the rule of law.

**[Here’s a powerful short clip from the program where he breaks down his fight>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/60e94f39c878dece3947229f28c3afba/26543e78ffd1a0cfc3d6b838967d376c/33013)**

subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaaccf8675bf4c15affbc86445dfa949&_e=pUvoH1GKEjOsOWVhb9n1-BX8KlXtNcsJJhI5B3cOLK7BOrgn34pSUd8ZJRfXk6mFdOiWbj0ktQVZ9MHhY9xWiAq7INVAdY8_hTkyMsu8StL3zUC8iVI21FSJw_CcDCLTr6Mkp6IqGndD9W2oZjEbSjusVZ1j5euBzepeMLBrZmgrqxTa9WxpADBFW9ZqiO5ETRO_Cbs8xl1NipZhZCLsHGh_GpyilSn5pF1Pv9VGlszrE8Owz8wwokZgja_tj3d0IB1hrJsZuTEgIRh7Q22MqqhMGvCBGwvnPDACrlt1OomrIkzj8BFMCurBPgnhFiw75A6AHHXIm8el9xj1YsgiWhq_MNuaN_EqbvXRUNdoQNBBe5rWFp1T6cBQa56JxM9IeGo0hwKvaV3IXtDJg---eg%3D%3D)
