| | Dear Friend, [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaaccf8675bf4c15affbc86445dfa949&_e=pUvoH1GKEjOsOWVhb9n1-BX8KlXtNcsJJhI5B3cOLK7BOrgn34pSUd8ZJRfXk6mFdOiWbj0ktQVZ9MHhY9xWiAq7INVAdY8_hTkyMsu8StL3zUC8iVI21FSJw_CcDCLTr6Mkp6IqGndD9W2oZjEbSjusVZ1j5euBzepeMLBrZmgrqxTa9WxpADBFW9ZqiO5ETRO_Cbs8xl1NipZhZCLsHGh_GpyilSn5pF1Pv9VGlsxHGY7hk5dExqQXzI-q0Smu7TZJJAfUP-RKcn-a0JIFM4ABbmcfqfPIki3XCfYrxLQVtiYwNCFZIFUHp0oP9BLluJ9JL5eyRfnC9QbT-9pVBk63mXWBRHFeu36pcCUi-iIvKJCvPR5lsbYv56A3C58t4TR8HsTwrGwzxPWaCPSLWA%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaaccf8675bf4c15affbc86445dfa949&_e=pUvoH1GKEjOsOWVhb9n1-BX8KlXtNcsJJhI5B3cOLK7BOrgn34pSUd8ZJRfXk6mFdOiWbj0ktQVZ9MHhY9xWiAq7INVAdY8_hTkyMsu8StL3zUC8iVI21FSJw_CcDCLTr6Mkp6IqGndD9W2oZjEbSjusVZ1j5euBzepeMLBrZmgrqxTa9WxpADBFW9ZqiO5ETRO_Cbs8xl1NipZhZCLsHGh_GpyilSn5pF1Pv9VGlsyhgVtY6tQ9VRMPPQgKMznRf7B4sbIcRRBbhCgurhNd9-_X4VlALcBQwASTZmG-t5QUQOaOJxLTPU7N6ABf6KDwrVDlBOwHJmbLlD7PM-JW4SFIop3Gsb52YclP54VVZjAgF4QueB-mx8R38FhJFIpR6cI4RIiy__lNLBmIZtnlWg%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaaccf8675bf4c15affbc86445dfa949&_e=pUvoH1GKEjOsOWVhb9n1-BX8KlXtNcsJJhI5B3cOLK7BOrgn34pSUd8ZJRfXk6mFdOiWbj0ktQVZ9MHhY9xWiAq7INVAdY8_hTkyMsu8StL3zUC8iVI21FSJw_CcDCLTr6Mkp6IqGndD9W2oZjEbSjusVZ1j5euBzepeMLBrZmgrqxTa9WxpADBFW9ZqiO5ETRO_Cbs8xl1NipZhZCLsHGh_GpyilSn5pF1Pv9VGlsxBOuJf1bo2mwpXAYnQr7lt6CtB4uWigVLL0NmAZ-MZ5mXDWzKupBSkzrLWJTsgkWuv8aHBvdqMTnUXAT2I3XHMlX6jbtilPrPSrE7ZGDcn2WjZpqVAcdNL9Xy8kksVzpoqL6w1bKb0c4HtXZzn1I7aiAVdP6BJgE6fcsj0lNR5cA%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

Biden! #EndFossilFuels
---
We marched alongside 75,000 people in the streets of New York City yesterday calling on President Joe Biden to stop approving fossil fuel projects, phase down oil and gas drilling, declare a climate emergency, and provide a just and equitable transition off fossil fuels. It was the largest demonstration pressuring Biden since he took office and the largest climate mobilization since the start of the pandemic. It follows more than 700 other #EndFossilFuels actions in 65 countries with 600,000 people joining over the weekend, with more on the way. Yesterday’s march was about people power. We were led by New York grassroots organizations; Black, Indigenous, other communities of color, and frontline communities living next to oil and gas facilities and infrastructure across the world; youth, elders, workers, people of faith, and people of all backgrounds impacted by fossil fuels and climate disaster across the United States. [Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez even joined our rally](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/eR1oNBZ1lqoGbKL8pO4doCd2oB5AA-sR69hJWXT35h4BieGFGB9gO-mlYfvr6bq4neR6MS_cuTrpiDpXTwUXZJuBqjCN02AHZ5vW_PnMoBLFwsJFkLWafT8JI9eto3JuPAfjK11tsJE2DM1qbNs7K9t8l-lcnfar6GITfKtvEtoKuV4Q1VVjRAcOlTkrBtWk9knzHoTCMVi8sI5KhjhByNe_jjMZ0S4gnrSRNFYSntN11gXuL0NXzlW-CcbITM_X0lTeXMCgLUChb-J3EflKYp3ONAR5Xa5YE2c8weOb8CaLfWC9CQq5cZW8UrlldZLm/3zp/-0NTJcrtRr-UYl2DIXMQOQ/h1/TKnmYskYAC7NiR5rLVlOq5ZBO66Uxh6UydIJnNFP_xY) and called on Biden to #EndFossilFuels! **Let's keep the heat on the Biden administration!** Sign and share the petition: [_bit.ly/EndFossilFuelsNow_](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhc0vIVXmMBIcuUyj64AJJ8Hd9YUyD-C_lfnlgb0G2zgn7AdQ2v9wRJul4uFNgTHh5MGCOmL6DGGrvHnilNZBtFyaDzJwx2aiFDxnKQhA-RzqwsWi5ZAxNCoiJsMs0CPh7GoRLqUY_iDTP5X6WWIm0YZsDhbWqVrpddnvNvvZZMyJQPARyMD384gnzQstKt4DHx9C_1bdl-Y9EFKDwC-kQhN0RpDqQ8V1jQhXq8VXyO-DgAj5_ReEqD740ywW5P5ZgSfhB1jQTwEbU9w7wbCGfUtlanrFf2UPxPFCZ9u7VJQ8/3zp/-0NTJcrtRr-UYl2DIXMQOQ/h2/2u9kMleDmK_mjeCdjx2K55u-Hqv0yrVuPUmcCMvRFig)

clean_body: Every signature counts to send our message to Biden | | Biden! #EndFossilFuels We marched alongside 75,000 people in the streets of New York City yesterday calling on President Joe Biden to stop approving fossil fuel projects, phase down oil and gas drilling, declare a climate emergency, and provide a just and equitable transition off fossil fuels. It was the largest demonstration pressuring Biden since he took office and the largest climate mobilization since the start of the pandemic. It follows more than 700 other #EndFossilFuels actions in 65 countries with 600,000 people joining over the weekend, with more on the way. Yesterday’s march was about people power. We were led by New York grassroots organizations; Black, Indigenous, other communities of color, and frontline communities living next to oil and gas facilities and infrastructure across the world; youth, elders, workers, people of faith, and people of all backgrounds impacted by fossil fuels and climate disaster across the United States. and called on Biden to #EndFossilFuels! Let's keep the heat on the Biden administration! Sign and share the petition: | | Upcoming Events Thurs Sep 21 12pm - (Virtual) Wed Oct 4 7pm - (Virtual) * Month of October - | Bila:huk 7 Directions of Service | | | Sent via . name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie=20Clark?=
subject: Minister, Show Host & Author Teresa Lusk Endorses Julie Clark for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
“Our nation, state, and border towns need a public servant to champion hard, but necessary positions for the sake of the American people.” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/017bb8c6466e/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12652055?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=5491400916&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| **I’m ecstatic to announce that ordained minister, show host and author Teresa Lusk has endorsed my candidacy to serve Texas’ 23rd District!**

It’s fearless voices like Teresa’s that make a difference in our troubled world! Teresa’s story of transformation and healing after overcoming the hurts she faced has become a vehicle of helping others triumph over painful circumstances.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=4f6c7314a6&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| **Teresa shared the following endorsement statement:**

_“After honest conversations regarding fundamental values and policy perspectives, I am proud to endorse Congressional Candidate Julie Clark for District TX-23. Now more than ever, our nation, state, and border towns need a public servant to champion hard, but necessary positions for the sake of the American people.

The border crisis, the economy, and our veterans matter, and so will your vote. I believe Julie is ready to be the gatekeeper and government-elected Congresswoman for such a time as this.”_

_**I’m deeply honored to have Teresa’s endorsement, and am grateful for her engagement in the political discourse on matters that relate to Texas**_. Teresa’s involvement in the grassroots movement to save our nation from the Radical Left agenda reminds me of how the founding of our nation was made possible by all the preachers and ministers who left the pulpit to lead men in battle against a global tyrant during the Revolutionary War.

**As a Texas Congresswoman,** I look forward to collaborating with Teresa Lusk and every other engaged Patriot who is utilizing their God-given gifts to defend our shared values!

It’s time to get our nation back into action as it was intended, with responsive and loyal elected officials who are in continual discussion with their constituents – and the results of their service demonstrably reflect that! _**I will be that kind of Congresswoman for YOU!**_

**[Peter, will you join us in the movement to save our nation from the Radical Left by offering an endorsement of your own today?](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=82d67744eb&e=c982eb7ad4)**

clean_body: “Our nation, state, and border towns need a public servant to champion hard, but necessary positions for the sake of the American people.” | | | | | | | Dear Peter, | I’m ecstatic to announce that ordained minister, show host and author Teresa Lusk has endorsed my candidacy to serve Texas’ 23rd District! It’s fearless voices like Teresa’s that make a difference in our troubled world! Teresa’s story of transformation and healing after overcoming the hurts she faced has become a vehicle of helping others triumph over painful circumstances. | | Teresa shared the following endorsement statement: “After honest conversations regarding fundamental values and policy perspectives, I am proud to endorse Congressional Candidate Julie Clark for District TX-23. Now more than ever, our nation, state, and border towns need a public servant to champion hard, but necessary positions for the sake of the American people. The border crisis, the economy, and our veterans matter, and so will your vote. I believe Julie is ready to be the gatekeeper and government-elected Congresswoman for such a time as this.” I’m deeply honored to have Teresa’s endorsement, and am grateful for her engagement in the political discourse on matters that relate to Texas. Teresa’s involvement in the grassroots movement to save our nation from the Radical Left agenda reminds me of how the founding of our nation was made possible by all the preachers and ministers who left the pulpit to lead men in battle against a global tyrant during the Revolutionary War. As a Texas Congresswoman, I look forward to collaborating with Teresa Lusk and every other engaged Patriot who is utilizing their God-given gifts to defend our shared values! It’s time to get our nation back into action as it was intended, with responsive and loyal elected officials who are in continual discussion with their constituents – and the results of their service demonstrably reflect that! name: Tim Scott
subject: Racially insensitive
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
Friend, I just got off of Hannity and I'm livid.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a1682251696b431abfe2ebcfb10e14db&_e=RJbIlfxYqlRqEWsF69BK_2VoBdUPrsC_R8_OB1Pm7LnZgmFGmbZHGdijV0PSTr42B_7tyLv1UXlStgnsn5ZXLqV3YmM3UJWfTyamNGCOyj_6IKtzt3ERVSNXbOUHi9rASZWZi7uHxQJ8NwYe83NzFDmB4H4L2IMGIZM62EOUN3lb1obIMWix1vm0O3vkLXoBCrPc06UgVPjOQbxAYip1Il3d6z2ZydUFZNpRMW3S7ODPV5SwSW6pA08odFXQ8lwY8mZ9Irn_1xygB3f4NzLkI8MgRTngU3D5e8b1O0LSwVSES8Vn-CLjt24BWEF5VN_mcdW9wQXdaMW20KV-8t8Y1HpPue0U08Qdf_jwfUzODVkzCceqYXAPcdKwt0RJF3OmyvOyWg8gdNdwH7iZKwaBuS7Dbn3HsV7dJBv1qYTwLk8%3D "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Friend, as I told Sean Hannity the other night, I'm livid.

Sunny Hostin, the ladies of The View, and the liberal media can try and attack me all they want, **but it won 't stop me!**

Being discriminated against, called names, and bullied doesn't scare me. **What is happening right now is another form of discrimination and I won 't stand for it.** I will rise above and keep fighting for what is actually important - our nation's future.

Whoopi Goldberg said I have "Clarence Thomas syndrome" as a Black Republican. Joy Behar said I'm a Republican because I "don't get" the idea of racism. And now Sunny Hostin is blatantly racially insensitive about my life.

---
| | | [STAND WITH ME: CHIP IN NOW!](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a1682251696b431abfe2ebcfb10e14db&_e=RJbIlfxYqlRqEWsF69BK_2VoBdUPrsC_R8_OB1Pm7LnZgmFGmbZHGdijV0PSTr42B_7tyLv1UXlStgnsn5ZXLqV3YmM3UJWfTyamNGCOyj_6IKtzt3ERVSNXbOUHi9rASZWZi7uHxQJ8NwYe83NzFDmB4H4L2IMGIZM62EOUN3lb1obIMWix1vm0O3vkLXoBCrPc06UgVPjOQbxAYip1Il3d6z2ZydUFZNpRMW3S7ODPV5SwSW6pA08odFXQ8lwYTDe9rgplDhXUZugulOPA2XhJTafuUqasK8ZspOOcj4TSiZXbLcuyD1mVsnBr6mepVuYzgyNPHe_FvvZ5WX-GRABdc1vKovCLzLBkt1wypg96-OM9pK26VzvH6yRHVyk4jkW0Uv-tIavEiagYHSy_i3dAwG2U-6F9XstREesHyzs%3D "STAND WITH ME: CHIP IN NOW!")
---

**I 've said it before and I'll say it again:** Yesterday's exception is today's rule. I believe that America can do for anyone what she has done for me. And I'm running for President to share my optimistic, conservative message with every American.

**We live in the greatest country on God 's green earth and I will not let the radical Left ruin it.**

They're indoctrinating schoolchildren to believe we live in an evil country. That's not true! You can go as high and as far as your character and your hard work will take you.

We need leadership focused on looking toward the challenges ahead, not in the rearview mirror.

**If you chip into my campaign, we can restore hope, create new opportunities, and protect the America we all know and love._[Will you please chip in now?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a1682251696b431abfe2ebcfb10e14db&_e=RJbIlfxYqlRqEWsF69BK_2VoBdUPrsC_R8_OB1Pm7LnZgmFGmbZHGdijV0PSTr42B_7tyLv1UXlStgnsn5ZXLqV3YmM3UJWfTyamNGCOyj_6IKtzt3ERVSNXbOUHi9rASZWZi7uHxQJ8NwYe83NzFDmB4H4L2IMGIZM62EOUN3lb1obIMWix1vm0O3vkLXoBCrPc06UgVPjOQbxAYip1Il3d6z2ZydUFZNpRMW3S7ODPV5SwSW6pA08odFXQ8lwYSURn9MG-gkX8ruOLAANbBNTbIODR9cdngahGhqb7CuoAmZaz4lyc05wAxiAzC7kepG6cx1ePX6apxznK0XtHL3T_qc4J9OgCe6VHshUQQRFQ9exJf5yn9CkHWFYmv5Op-GgVm-IzVOBiludU1Ra6x6agWv1U-evvS_9Y4I6NPFY%3D "Will you please chip in now?")_**

| | | [STAND WITH ME: CHIP IN NOW!](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a1682251696b431abfe2ebcfb10e14db&_e=RJbIlfxYqlRqEWsF69BK_2VoBdUPrsC_R8_OB1Pm7LnZgmFGmbZHGdijV0PSTr42B_7tyLv1UXlStgnsn5ZXLqV3YmM3UJWfTyamNGCOyj_6IKtzt3ERVSNXbOUHi9rASZWZi7uHxQJ8NwYe83NzFDmB4H4L2IMGIZM62EOUN3lb1obIMWix1vm0O3vkLXoBCrPc06UgVPjOQbxAYip1Il3d6z2ZydUFZNpRMW3S7ODPV5SwSW6pA08odFXQ8lwY_JjiRjlOzvANPHK-QNuIn_yIOIVtP5C6EMxkdhe4NSCuHFuNAwEQpcweaMRjz8ePBq-giNODqjd0-lKGx8DZNq_w1y1l469lYYnfhgWPZFzQ9kMMPLCNwVvk-NYL39vVaYiyvyeAdgV7AxOLMSeAnMQ0DH3XhIQf_Aul98hm9so%3D "STAND WITH ME: CHIP IN NOW!")

- Tim Scott

name: Your America
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Your American News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23730%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RiFUBHYpchBtFxXZ3kVIdQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23731%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U7ko9v12Fp%2fQ%2beOwaDeVsQ&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23732%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8sXw4U91TBOnBksSEIiyyQ&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23733%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ik6oOIx0KsAyfr7fqTsgFw&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23734%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qmTXibtCq5zGLHStCuNtkg&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. | | | | This sponsored message from Your American News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.” What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty. Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. body:
Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it.
| | |
---
Friend, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69934253/427776233/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmEzMjI0ZS00MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GQjYPnsPQQG3cn-BEuxjxfji7-iGkPcMhvFvmr17GQ=)
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.
We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.
My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. **She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future are always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.**
**_And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it._**
Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable among us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.
With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.
**[_So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $5 between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69934254/427776234/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmEzMjI0ZS00MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GQjYPnsPQQG3cn-BEuxjxfji7-iGkPcMhvFvmr17GQ=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69934260/427776240/1575385346?refcode=jtk4445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmEzMjI0ZS00MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GQjYPnsPQQG3cn-BEuxjxfji7-iGkPcMhvFvmr17GQ=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69934261/427776241/1575385346?refcode=jtk4445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmEzMjI0ZS00MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GQjYPnsPQQG3cn-BEuxjxfji7-iGkPcMhvFvmr17GQ=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Attn: Friend,
This is your courtesy reminder that the September enrollment window for our campaign’s _*most exclusive*_ membership program **CLOSES** in just a few short hours.
🚨 _**GOLD CARD ENROLLMENT DEADLINE: TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.**_ 🚨

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: 🚨 re... gun emergency
body:
\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
---
| | Idaho's Freedom Caucus is sounding the alarm.

Why?

Because our God-given right to bear arms is under full-blown attack.

Just look around—New Mexico's governor is snatching away gun rights like candy, and the ATF?

Don't get me started. They're trying to turn you and me into criminals, overnight, with their pistol brace ban nonsense.

Think Idaho's a safe haven?

Think again... our own Supreme Court just slammed the door on carrying at private events **_on public land_**. They even had the nerve to shame Idahoans for open-carrying during Boise's 4th of July parade this year. And now, the ATF's coming for our gun shows and private sales with their new "universal background checks."

Enough is enough...

It's time to armor up and fight back.

We can't let bureaucrats in D.C. or even our own state turn us into felons for exercising our 2nd Amendment rights.

**Here's the game plan:**

The Idaho Freedom Caucus is leading the charge to bulletproof our state laws.

Yeah, this puts us on the chopping block come next election, but we're ready to face the music to safeguard our freedom.

The thing is, _The Idaho Freedom Caucus PAC_ is your best bet to keep freedom-loving lawmakers in the game.

And for the next 13 days only, every dollar you donate gets doubled,**_thanks to a generous patriot stepping up to match funds._**

If you want to help curb the gun-grabbers in Idaho, [click here to contribute $1,000, $500, or heck, even $50](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=1e13774899&e=dea908e0fe "contribute to the fight").

Or, you can send a check to:

Idaho Freedom Caucus PAC
PO BOX 134
Blanchard, Idaho, 83804,

If you're in, please take action before the end of September.

Every penny counts when we're fighting for our rights (and believe me... **_we go in there and FIGHT_**).

Let's show 'em what Idaho's made of.

Thank you, and God bless.

Cheers,

Brian

\---

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Tell House Republicans that a government shutdown is NOT acceptable →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Well friends, here we are again - House Republicans have completely lost the plot, and hardworking Americans are set to pay the price.
The fiscal year ends on September 30th and if a government funding bill or package isn’t passed by then (which seems unlikely), we at least need to pass a short-term funding bill in order to keep the government open.
But some of my more extreme Republican colleagues in the House are setting the stage for yet another irresponsible government shutdown by tying their support for any spending bill to unreasonable demands, like further restricting our reproductive rights and bodily autonomy.
They’re essentially holding the government hostage, and it’s not just federal employees who will pay the price. Shutdowns can slow down food assistance programs and disrupt services for veterans and seniors - and slow and harm our economy overall.
Join me in calling on House Republicans to drop their dangerous and unreasonable demands and get real about a commonsense funding bill. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/UvapufWh5EGGCaocKVk9Uw2?contactdata=mmSYnt/L+/+UnDCiufSsTGQ2uusoBR020ZLGX/bYIHbpZevlQkS5nP/4o7I2O0LMIsrZlLIels1MnH/hyYBe/PHxKz5WcF26o+6YIUTnXmDEVd32WQjfSEH2WFxtmFe0KxmWjAnXvmFKaJ0oGLSW+A==]
ADD MY NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/UvapufWh5EGGCaocKVk9Uw2?contactdata=mmSYnt/L+/+UnDCiufSsTGQ2uusoBR020ZLGX/bYIHbpZevlQkS5nP/4o7I2O0LMIsrZlLIels1MnH/hyYBe/PHxKz5WcF26o+6YIUTnXmDEVd32WQjfSEH2WFxtmFe0KxmWjAnXvmFKaJ0oGLSW+A==]
Playing games with government funding is completely reckless - and especially hypocritical from the party of so-called fiscal responsibility!
Right now, our top priority needs to be passing a funding bill to keep the government open and operational - so we can get back to work on legislation that will help American families.
Sign my petition to tell the extreme House GOP that they need to put people over politics. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/UvapufWh5EGGCaocKVk9Uw2?contactdata=mmSYnt/L+/+UnDCiufSsTGQ2uusoBR020ZLGX/bYIHbpZevlQkS5nP/4o7I2O0LMIsrZlLIels1MnH/hyYBe/PHxKz5WcF26o+6YIUTnXmDEVd32WQjfSEH2WFxtmFe0KxmWjAnXvmFKaJ0oGLSW+A==]
Thanks for your support - more to come on this important issue.
-Sara

California’s 51st District

name: GIFFORDS
subject: [SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS] Why do you support the gun safety movement?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’ve all been called to the fight to end gun violence for different reasons. What’s yours?
#

Friends -
We’ve all been brought to the fight to end gun violence for different reasons.
Some of you may be here because you or someone you love has been a survivor of gun violence.
Some of you may be here because you are a parent, grandparent, or caretaker who is worried you may send your little one off to school, only to have them never return home.
Some of you may be here because you are a responsible gun owner, and you’re tired of extreme elected officials putting gun lobby profits over their constituents’ safety.
Whatever the reason you’ve decided to join GIFFORDS’ community of over 1 million supporters, we want to say thank you. We’re so glad to have you here.
Today, we’re asking you for something a little different than what we normally do:
[**Will you take our quick survey to share why you care about the fight to end gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_gsmovement_sep2023/?source=em230918-1-30&refcode2=6549.3935704.ccBOvO&akid=6549%2E3935704%2EccBOvO)
**[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_gsmovement_sep2023/?source=em230918-1-30&refcode2=6549.3935704.ccBOvO&akid=6549%2E3935704%2EccBOvO)**
We could not do our lifesaving work to pass gun safety legislation and elect leaders with the courage to act without your support.
Each individual story of why you have been called to the fight to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic is extremely important to us.
[**So please, will you take just a few minutes out of your day to share your thoughts?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_gsmovement_sep2023/?source=em230918-1-30&refcode2=6549.3935704.ccBOvO&akid=6549%2E3935704%2EccBOvO)
Thank you. Your reasons for supporting our fight to end gun violence are what have built the strength of this movement. We appreciate you taking the time to share your story with us.
All the best,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=6549%2E3935704%2EccBOvO) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Craig Riedel
subject: There’s something off about this map...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Riedel For Ohio](craigriedelforcongress
body:
| | | [](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=55101237df2741a39bab4bbba4f07839&_e=66LuoyhCCTEPKlCwT656jz_Zax8lYmJzXS9eZJ3vcP_G1OBhshbRiSxCRVLp-H2izHbeFHz1IvQPOoCj6890IHGtHGtfvnqdASBYVE04hhLYO6uACSLgk9IavxgptRHiv5599jNpzqdixD8jncIcvGLQNtRqDapr5jQVsqg4WOszyHhrHs1ePSHNhTQaPMgALgbQCXk9dn4wczDHb6sQMchbxcZL3LhZ20Wi7Z8Q_d7nAcqmfN2KNU0yFKOMTUo65973na6gki2m8iIGjpbO2Hft4_P0l6W2LkjpNBxTn3OBj0cMIxMVZlxs9IvAAJqEeLQbMVlBtyULQ_E91mDV23ZvudJ5H1SOIrCvibdRCsY%3D)
---
My friend, have you ever taken a gander at Ohio’s Congressional Maps? **Well, if you haven't, look no further, and if you have, here’s a refresher:**
---
[](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=55101237df2741a39bab4bbba4f07839&_e=66LuoyhCCTEPKlCwT656jz_Zax8lYmJzXS9eZJ3vcP_G1OBhshbRiSxCRVLp-H2izHbeFHz1IvQPOoCj6890IHGtHGtfvnqdASBYVE04hhLYO6uACSLgk9IavxgptRHiv5599jNpzqdixD8jncIcvGLQNtRqDapr5jQVsqg4WOszyHhrHs1ePSHNhTQaPMgALgbQCXk9dn4wczDHb6sQMQVtUooz9O5_yVEcpV6ON7CHt6PIit59442vB5pNTYKe7eYwMBz3DFlSjzx8HwVJ2GYhGJ--4Bnp0ce0moKxL-H1Gg3ak-U9Wf0WDOV1DBZYkF-aOMz4brnK7vQ4ObvdXQlW2-3ciPnAs4VYreHKZkU%3D)
---
For reference, the darker the color, blue or red, reflects how Democrat or Republican a district is, respectively. Now, I know what you’re thinking: That’s a whole lot of red—but looks can be deceiving.
---
[](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=55101237df2741a39bab4bbba4f07839&_e=66LuoyhCCTEPKlCwT656jz_Zax8lYmJzXS9eZJ3vcP_G1OBhshbRiSxCRVLp-H2izHbeFHz1IvQPOoCj6890IHGtHGtfvnqdASBYVE04hhLYO6uACSLgk9IavxgptRHiv5599jNpzqdixD8jncIcvGLQNtRqDapr5jQVsqg4WOszyHhrHs1ePSHNhTQaPMgALgbQCXk9dn4wczDHb6sQMUzkNys1f7D4gAkbHflTrmvuiCPdxwUfceOy7QeHTs5MCOCQ0X8-VVANunuy1GOa4x2B_9wYYbo2F4YaBm4ZAbHVCyVTvfP6mxmQua2Otj1PvAdtb41g8VBMQxwaoWJNj5VQeD5Zxd9n8l1EZVkuLFI%3D)
---
There it is, Ohio’s 9th Congressional District, or, as I like to call it: home. Our district is incredible, isn't it? The hardworking people, the natural beauty, the rich history—it's where we've made our lives. But there is one glaring problem.
---

clean_body: | | | My friend, have you ever taken a gander at Ohio’s Congressional Maps? Well, if you haven't, look no further, and if you have, here’s a refresher: For reference, the darker the color, blue or red, reflects how Democrat or Republican a district is, respectively. Now, I know what you’re thinking: That’s a whole lot of red—but looks can be deceiving. There it is, Ohio’s 9th Congressional District, or, as I like to call it: home. Our district is incredible, isn't it? The hardworking people, the natural beauty, the rich history—it's where we've made our lives. But there is one glaring problem. Ah, there it is. Marcy Kaptur, a Democrat representing our Republican district. For four decades, we've seen the same representation, the same old politics. Marcy has consistently voted for policies that don't align with our values. She supports big government, higher taxes, and burdensome regulations. My friend, I'm not a career politician. I'm a member of this community, just like you. And I'm here to tell you that I'm the candidate who can finally end Marcy's reign. But here's the thing—I can't do it alone. Thank you for your support. As always, if you ever have any questions or ideas, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're in this together, and your voice matters. Faithfully, Craig Riedel Republican candidate for OH-9 | | | | ---|--- craigriedelforcongress.com 427 W Dussel Dr. Maumee, OH. 43537 Box 196

_**[Granting D.C. and Puerto Rico statehood](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52f9eefbae66488c8171cca95895bfb9&_e=skoC1XhoWK1xpRceKE3KVW57Q92FBl2i6IqD5eQ1vjkDF4sBNUWqObWnDTBIKWI224Zn70rR8O6DRoqhUNEdHn32ZkPdTFJXQudVKq-ebzu_ASpa6jhiil0iss2w-VegQBL4U6Vbuf-LJr-g9q-oram3JbEs757HLfcbCCdazYZR_6q8CX7MyBsdawBmK4VmMITj_09al7Qtl0MaljBzVEH3-frUg3VTtcM2XZsBFzisDpr0lhb0H0zZhYXtlTkwAxZBQeZqTnot4wYQoAKzfOcdp7KmExpnkrpffec_NAf4N35H2_eEQolF_bKTdGHIvx7n7yMJwzIz8T9bMtcujIkss2YsvMXfnhoJ9aKPTFKVdkv0y3Xg4pWEqsZ_xE8aMRijJeWSpgNN18sh0EER6XOAtUjKp6l6FsqNHcF7oUDl5fsld_hGVkacHbjcW75YZPJKI7NXdS9CyhUhgJru_g%3D%3D)**_
_**[Erasing President Donald J. Trump's legacy](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52f9eefbae66488c8171cca95895bfb9&_e=skoC1XhoWK1xpRceKE3KVW57Q92FBl2i6IqD5eQ1vjkDF4sBNUWqObWnDTBIKWI224Zn70rR8O6DRoqhUNEdHn32ZkPdTFJXQudVKq-ebzu_ASpa6jhiil0iss2w-VegQBL4U6Vbuf-LJr-g9q-oram3JbEs757HLfcbCCdazYZR_6q8CX7MyBsdawBmK4VmMITj_09al7Qtl0MaljBzVEH3-frUg3VTtcM2XZsBFzisDpr0lhb0H0zZhYXtlTkwAxZBQeZqTnot4wYQoAKzfOcdp7KmExpnkrpffec_NAcG5SOkMin49HCXvATaoN_JB05raaBFjJIQULx6NFHphlGRqwTCorAPcj_e8QlH6yT6qdcD1DEMSklUk1ad9xCMMaIcd6Wg2obHoGXw6pZu_y17T_eWg5U0QpNvwvnyIyHT5bHN0RvzTNe9Cs5Wu81_9eAWOKgNxdFkVueCpSqUbA%3D%3D)**_
The list goes ON AND ON.

Friend, you can probably see by now why **[2024 is the most important election of our lives.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52f9eefbae66488c8171cca95895bfb9&_e=skoC1XhoWK1xpRceKE3KVW57Q92FBl2i6IqD5eQ1vjkDF4sBNUWqObWnDTBIKWI224Zn70rR8O6DRoqhUNEdHn32ZkPdTFJXQudVKq-ebzu_ASpa6jhiil0iss2w-VegQBL4U6Vbuf-LJr-g9q-oram3JbEs757HLfcbCCdazYZR_6q8CX7MyBsdawBmK4VmMITj_09al7Qtl0MaljBzVEH3-frUg3VTtcM2XZsBFzisDpr0lhb0H0zZhYXtlTkwAxZBQeZqTnot4wYQoAKzfOcdp7KmExpnkrpffec_NAc0taVNTP72ySCP4YaEs8UoK3ebdtJWpwowkmxktpi8l8MM071wydqDh8j2iHJN4cYoGTi2tzIyKkj4FqprGhO1eW3tfAKB1nriHmnS-lx3i08GOhy6k6m9enMTi46H1TefGIr-5LWNFhiXD3uYh2U5-4E0CpR3aPjUdXzdmwmFmg%3D%3D)** EVERYTHING is on the line.

As you read this urgent email, five innocent Americans face 142 years in prison.

Proud Boys members Joe Biggs, Ethan Nordean, Dominic Pezzola, Zach Rehl, and Enrique Tarrio were going to be sentenced this week by establishment U.S. District Court Judge Tim Kelly.

But Judge Kelly is out sick, so he's delayed their sentencing.

If you've read my newest book, **It Takes A Counter Revolution: Wake Up America!** , you know Judge Kelly is _one of the very worst D.C. judges_ I talk about there.

He's an establishment hack and not very intelligent...and he's shredding the Bill of Rights to make an example of these peaceful patriots.

**In April, Judge Kelly proved what you and I have known all along -- the trial of the Proud Boys is a show trial, the kind you 'd expect in a corrupt communist country.**

Judge Kelly even had the gall to claim:

"There Is No Evidence of Government Misconduct, Let Alone Misconduct Warranting Dismissal, a Mistrial, or Other Sanctions..."

But you and I know the truth:

* The FBI KNOWS the Proud Boys are innocent
* The FBI planted a snitch inside the defense team of disabled U.S. Marine and Proud Boy, Zach Rehl, since April, 2021...but revealed that only on March 22.
* And Judge Kelly has denied legal motions critical to the defense

**And now Joe Biden 's lawless lawyers at DOJ seek brutal prison sentences for each Proud Boy:**

* Joe Biggs - 33 years
* Ethan Nordean - 27 years
* Dominic Pezzola - 20 years
* Zach Rehl - 30 years
* Enrique Tarrio - 33 years

**That 's 142 years in prison for exercising their Constitutionally protected rights!**

As you recall, Zach is a disabled U.S. Marine. And he said something to his wife, Amanda, that alarms me:

**" They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you."**

If Joe Biden's FBI and DOJ can push around a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran and his friends for exercising their right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

That's why I ask you to continue to stand with me at this crucial time.

name: Replace Sinema
subject: What Mitt Romney has to say about one of Sinema’sdonors
body:

Team, Our dad retired from Toledo Jeep and mom helped organize an auto union at Champion Spark Plug alongside the Reuthers. For more than a century, the Kapturs have been part of the UAW family, and we’re proud of that. I understand that unions are the bedrock of America's Middle Class, and they make our country strong. **I stand in full support of the United Auto Workers.** **** While auto companies are posting billions in profits for shareholders, line workers are fighting for better working conditions, fair wages, and health and retirement benefits that every worker should have the right to earn. This is about dignity and fairness. I pray for a quick and fair resolution so that our workers can get back to doing what they love to do and so that our economy continues to grow stronger — for everyone. In Solidarity, Marcy [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tcAb-PaXtEayL-mWUU_QGw2?unsubscribedata=FfzDmqlo9BRcPHwI4Sw0Ftn57f8Vgml%2B7VpqmxWY%2Fm0mfkE347P95K3iWf1xFCMcQFImCI1N559Sh4YiIkSS5PX5CVlvvUb98zu%2BPmAHYUgQtim4DzE2H%2BOiAx1CBPOtGfdmY9mO1M%2Bw2cxGgaxVadheaUN42m92ImMl4wK6YFHG5FntJL5zbksMIPt60rGL836BTApoJaiEBFXEPrIAEosJ7Nr5wighWwlll3VZ0hLOz%2BMNGRCxnOlUtGszuC1oNqP%2BDCJ%2BuYar%2FSVWZZb91AgJdIyhCK0xNYU30Vk%2BcbxRzYstB8%2BzULAoP%2BZ6VjcO1rzO5LmlS54ecLePCJMqVufOs8Djv9oVecZSf1ujaEV7UfHD356d5J4rUT11MAlV65V8TfkcEIQiZi2oE8Z4RMJy7bhfYPZtrc05LW9LZYQ%3D)

subject: This is your chance. 1 day left.
body:
Will you join me at my second debate?

| |

| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk63s99i25fhdnc3lqa2skn8ts2l62rpo9ltmg5o_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1jm0p70cth2bs)
---

Friend,

Time is running out!

You have just **1 DAY LEFT** to participate in the RNC's contest for a chance to join me at my SECOND Presidential Debate in California!

**[But you must enter BEFORE MIDNIGHT TOMORROW NIGHT, Friend.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3kujp3norhqc3js7kif2pmgc9skpultk4ee0218_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1jm0p70cth2bs "But you must enter BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, Friend.")**
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu20sur3tqiqidif6flllc22lepn7loogskei1j0_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1jm0p70cth2bs)

---
As a supporter, I would love for you to be there! But you must enter by **midnight TOMORROW NIGHT** for your chance to win two free tickets to the second Presidential Debate, airfare for two, and hotel accommodations.

**[When you make a contribution of ANY amount here before 11:59 PM on Tuesday, you will automatically be entered into the drawing for an unforgettable trip to witness me on the Presidential Debate stage again.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkfnm82f60or2aqcf6up7ro78u9h7sjmt4qcr31g_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1jm0p70cth2bs "When you make a contribution of ANY amount here before 11:59 PM on Tuesday, you will automatically be entered into the drawing for an unforgettable trip to witness me on the Presidential Debate stage again.")**

I hope to see you there, Friend!

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zea37gndf0q9kj0fksauvkm5uvvcr9l559tlaucg_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1jm0p70cth2bs)

Nikki Haley

---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztavs5nqh4ftsmlctsifnstpb1mrj3o3a01bcn10_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1jm0p70cth2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbu752g7i656m6uabdan9hcif9lcrm61l16agu1g_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1jm0p70cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb9h62j4rhkitfl2pa7gp7lcj38f4ovtrt7kfvno_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1jm0p70cth2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

body:

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

body:
Will we see President Trump return to the GOP primary debate stage later this month? | After the first GOP Primary Debate, we were impressed with the quality of the Republican candidates. However, there was a notable absence. President Trump was dealing with the rampant Democratic witch hunt, but we are still hopeful for a return to the debate stage. **_What about you, Fellow American?_**

body:
A blue Senate is riding on this race:
#
Peter, as we gear up for the upcoming election season, I want to bring your attention to Sherrod Brown’s campaign in Ohio—a race that is critical to keeping our Senate majority.
**************[Will you make a donation right now to re-elect Sherrod Brown and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69936839/427785731/-831317943?refcode=dd_em_230918_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODRhNGQ5ZC00NzU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=is0dTZ6jvExfui2kXQO9YapWEH4fXlAq_2LQ0Ugok6Y=)**************
The Ohio Senate race is sure to be a high-stakes election. NBC News said next year’s election had the potential to get “even nastier and more expensive” than the last one. CNN just called Sherrod one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country. Winning this fight won’t be easy.
**********[But Sherrod is no stranger to tough fights—and with our help, he can win. Contribute $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69936840/427785732/-831317943?refcode=dd_em_230918_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODRhNGQ5ZC00NzU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=is0dTZ6jvExfui2kXQO9YapWEH4fXlAq_2LQ0Ugok6Y=)**********
Not only is Sherrod a tireless advocate for Ohioans, he’s a dear colleague and friend of mine in the Senate. He is a true champion for working families who has dedicated his career to public service, from fighting for affordable health care to promoting equal rights and opportunity for all.
Recently, Sherrod Brown and I have collaborated on vital legislation, including bills that would end the federal use of the death penalty, restore overtime pay for millions of Americans, and more. I’m relying on his continued partnership in Washington as part of our Democratic majority.
****************[That’s why I’m asking for your support: will you help Democrats hold this seat in Ohio and keep the Senate majority blue? Contribute now—every donation makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69936841/427785733/-831317943?refcode=dd_em_230918_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODRhNGQ5ZC00NzU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=is0dTZ6jvExfui2kXQO9YapWEH4fXlAq_2LQ0Ugok6Y=)****************
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Biden's FBI caught red handed!
body:
We are suing the Deep State for interference in the 2022 midterm elections.

| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677085%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=131aMTl4QKN5mC9W6LjmGw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, We are suing the Deep State for interference in the 2022 midterm elections. America First Legal just filed a lawsuit against the FBI and Biden’s Department of Justice for illegally concealing federal records related to the Biden administration’s government-sponsored censorship and election interference during the midterm elections last year. **You may recall:** Matt Taibbi revealed in his The Twitter Files exposure that just two days before the 2022 midterms election, the FBI National Election Command Post (NECP) sent an email to the FBI San Francisco Field Office, flagging twenty-five accounts as election misinformation threats, including the Twitter account for Right Side Broadcasting Network, which regularly broadcasted former President Donald Trump’s election rallies to millions of Americans. **Biden’s FBI was caught red handed!** _Since then, my team at America First Legal has demanded all FBI records related to the censorship of political speech and interference surrounding the midterms elections! _ **That’s why we are fighting in court right now:** America First Legal is suing the FBI and the DOJ for illegally concealing these records. Our aggressive lawsuit will also further expose how the FBI uses the false “misinformation” label as an excuse for censorship of the lawful speech of millions of Americans. **Censorship of political speech is morally wrong and it is a grave threat to our society. We will _expose and crush the censorship regime_ that has corrupted our elections process.** [**_But we need every patriotic American to stand with us and support our fight. Please donate right now to fund our legal attack on the Deep State and expose their election interference_ >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677086%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7EldMOa4P8Cis5hE1LzXGw&sysid=1)
| [**RUSH HELP TO AMERICA FIRST LEGAL**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677087%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WS2Mw8tlXkASi4a05vcpgg&sysid=1)
---
I promise you, America First Legal will continue fighting to expose the truth about how Biden’s government is actively working to undermine the American people’s First Amendment rights and prevent free and fair elections. While others may shrink away, we step up to fight in court! _Thank you as always for strongly standing with us,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal
|
---
| [**DONATE HERE >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677088%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IlqBEKlp5%2fFwWpWQ3rzDfw&sysid=1)

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: humiliating defeat:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
---

name: Bob Casey
subject: Asking for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
I’m in a tough race here in Pennsylvania, and every dollar makes a difference.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69937645/427788456/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTc4MzQwZS00YTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jtBVfOszhR50LidqvPhE-HXcEVeRAFKi-TuB17irkAU=&emci=ce75806b-4956-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=8178340e-4a56-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Hi Peter, I’m writing to ask if you will make a $5 contribution to our campaign today.

[**_I want to take a minute to explain why this request matters to our campaign, but if you are ready to help us hold Pennsylvania and keep the Senate blue, you can chip in at this link to split a donation between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69937646/427788457/1703534649?refcode=20230918.1_BC_9U&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTc4MzQwZS00YTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jtBVfOszhR50LidqvPhE-HXcEVeRAFKi-TuB17irkAU=)**_

$5 may not sound like much. It’s about the price of a water ice, a Hershey bar, or half of a cheesesteak. But the truth is, when enough folks chip in a few dollars whenever they can – whether it’s $50, $25, or even $5 – it makes a difference.

And the stakes of this race are high.

National Republicans are going to pull out all the stops to flip PA. They see the Commonwealth as key to their path to taking back the Senate majority and the White House, which is why we have to build a strong campaign now.

I know we have what it takes to fight back against whatever the GOP throws at us. We made history by electing Josh Shapiro and John Fetterman in 2022, and we’re going to need that same momentum on our side to win in 2024.

[**_So if you’re able, will you split $5 between my re-election campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help us win these key battleground states? I’m in a tough race here in Pennsylvania, and every dollar makes a difference._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69937647/427788458/1703534649?refcode=20230918.1_BC_9U&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTc4MzQwZS00YTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jtBVfOszhR50LidqvPhE-HXcEVeRAFKi-TuB17irkAU=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Without a deadline, it’s just a dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We’ve set a $100,000 email fundraising goal for two reasons
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=30063%2E3422442%2E8I6vh-)
One of Katie’s favorite sayings is **"a task without a deadline is just a dream."**
Our upcoming federal fundraising deadline is on September 30th, and our task is to raise another $100,000 over email by then. [**_More on why below, but if you’d like to donate now and move on, just click here!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230918-1?refcode=EMAL18_1_TSK_20230918_V1_F&refcode2=30063_3422442_8I6vh-&akid=30063%2E3422442%2E8I6vh-)**_
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230918-1?amount=&refcode=EMAL18_1_TSK_20230918_V1_F&refcode2=30063_3422442_8I6vh-&akid=30063%2E3422442%2E8I6vh-)
We’ve set a $100,000 email goal for two reasons. **One, at the end of September we’re required to publicly report how much money we’ve raised.** Reporting a strong number can deter super PACs from spending big on attack ads against Katie and proves that we don’t need corporate PAC money to run a robust campaign.
**Two: We’re less than six months to our primary, and in October we have to begin making important spending decisions.** With 36% of voters undecided in the race, we need the resources to run ads, hire organizers, and host events throughout the state. While we so appreciate anything you may give in the weeks before Election Day, donations given now allow us to strategically plan ahead and stretch every dollar further.
[**So, Derek, can you chip in today to help us meet our $100,000 end-of-quarter goal and prepare for the competitive race ahead?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230918-1?refcode=EMAL18_1_TSK_20230918_V1_F&refcode2=30063_3422442_8I6vh-&akid=30063%2E3422442%2E8I6vh-)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230918-1?refcode=EMAL18_1_TSK_20230918_V1_F&refcode2=30063_3422442_8I6vh-&akid=30063%2E3422442%2E8I6vh-)
Thanks for being on Team Porter.
—KPHQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAL18_1_TSK_20230918_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=30063_3422442_8I6vh-&akid=30063%2E3422442%2E8I6vh-)**

Peter,

Republicans in Congress have launched an impeachment investigation against Pres. Biden over his family’s corrupt business dealings.

With each passing day, it appears quite clear that **Joe Biden sold the office of the Vice President for many millions of dollars and sold out our country in the process.**

Predictably, my opponent **Adam Schiff** is out right away with a fundraising pitch calling this effort a “sham” and “vindictive,” while simultaneously pointing his own disgraceful finger back at Pres. Trump.

Yet, unlike the bogus and truly sham impeachments of Pres. Trump that Adam Schiff himself led, an impeachment of Biden won’t be based on a perfectly normal and straightforward phone call. Instead, it will be based on **actual high crimes and misdemeanors.**

Frankly, like many Americans, I have seen the voluminous evidence being gathered by Congressman Comer and his team, and **we are ready to render our verdict against Joe Biden, who I now refer to as The Smiling Felon.**

Adam Schiff, the Left, and their media allies are going to do everything they can to try and discredit an impeachment effort, [**and I need your help to push back against Schiff – which you can help me do with a small contribution today.**](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=10534c75974947c8bebcb899688bd343&_e=eorKX1AXDRxjrtk3ptVZJ8GK6iZXS884Rh0p5vrhj_Z1sVp6FXBn3bAGkr3gdEPpfeWr2YgcstVHlURLh1eM6zHIYqiXOGVSGf-bOMgrEK5Fq0L3kMrluNOHp40JwAnru6W8sLKAp2m7b-g77zrbrtZb0f9DI6GUJuKNbwNklhBEuNBGJKCBoQzDdXMBKoikd4bacN2qwN500nphlFfvHIUhifRKFrpYCmAd5V5vHaqPvIw_bYMlFJ1CUPdrYWW43qTuKQt_utWrA265mStRQGctE05VBZABA1aFOnw6NWFhhBWq0DA_tJBBxsli0-yLJ3aZBWo5bRK8awSu99grm_ca45bRsXAijY6sczZ50gaXZj8P0vi0kjHhBsZ2Mg1NZzTVDl6fmDG-7eMa0yRtUw%3D%3D)

In addition to the multitude of serious felonies Biden may be facing, **we cannot have a President who is compromised – _and essentially owned_ – by the likes of Communist China and others.**

Biden is mentally and physically unfit to lead, he is corrupt, and he and his allies like Schiff have done more damage to this nation than we ever could have imagined possible.

[**We need to defeat Biden and Schiff in 2024 and restore conservative leadership in America. Please support my campaign to defeat Adam Schiff in our race for U.S. Senate in California by chipping in $15 or another amount today.**](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=10534c75974947c8bebcb899688bd343&_e=eorKX1AXDRxjrtk3ptVZJ8GK6iZXS884Rh0p5vrhj_Z1sVp6FXBn3bAGkr3gdEPpfeWr2YgcstVHlURLh1eM6zHIYqiXOGVSGf-bOMgrEK5Fq0L3kMrluNOHp40JwAnru6W8sLKAp2m7b-g77zrbrtZb0f9DI6GUJuKNbwNklhBEuNBGJKCBoQzDdXMBKoikd4bacN2qwN500nphlFfvHIUhifRKFrpYCmAd5V5vHar0yfaQ-wnKvK0CL4GsbTOK9XvbSn3FAFrhVfOhyN5CEyfQGowWTFQ7M10WqCHuzCRZuxGgfTA4ONqYEUGVbE3xCKTBoPRLegSzXhxun9TqGCr3iTfHw7o0n1DyT7QYfpPPWLrsJbWNY6ZHoIncLzDB7f3JvGxbefMuko1QQXltVA%3D%3D)

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. Follow Eric On Social Media P.O. Box 730, Hilmar, CA 95324 | | Paid for by Eric Early for US Senate 2024 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Short film: Peace for All Time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Is it any wonder that as America has waged violence throughout the world, violence has overtaken our own nation?

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_video_non_donors_1&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Is it any wonder that as America has waged violence throughout the world, violence has overtaken our own nation? This is the question I asked this summer in the Peace Speech I gave at St. Anselm University in New Hampshire. To an overflowing auditorium, I invoked again the call for peace that my uncle President John F. Kennedy issued 60 years ago, in his landmark speech at American University. Today, my campaign releases the third episode in the series of documentary shorts about my campaign called _Running on Truth_. This short film illuminates the spirit of my speech, which is about the power and necessity of making the United States a peaceful nation. I’m proud to announce [Episode 3: “Peace for All Time.](https://www.kennedy24.com/running-on-truth-episode-3?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_video_non_donors_1&n=2)” I hope you will take some time to watch the episode. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/running-on-truth-episode-3?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_video_non_donors_1&n=3) | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/running-on-truth-episode-3?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_video_non_donors_1&n=4 "Watch the Short Film") [Watch the Short Film](https://www.kennedy24.com/running-on-truth-episode-3?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_video_non_donors_1&n=4)
---
By waging endless wars abroad, we have neglected our own wellbeing, and we have brought the violence home. Gun violence, domestic violence, deteriorating mental and physical health... these are the wages of war. They are inseparable from the violence we inflict abroad.
What will be the wages of peace? We will begin to discover that in my Presidency. It will be a profound turnaround of our country, toward health, moral vitality, and prosperity for all.
Peace starts within. It comes from seeing that within each of us which is brave and generous and idealistic. It comes first by believing the radical idea that peace is possible. When we take the first critical steps toward peace, America will become, once again, a true world leader, and we will restore our moral authority around the world.
In service,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_video_non_donors_1&n=5)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_video_non_donors_1&n=6) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_video_non_donors_1&n=7) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_video_non_donors_1&n=8) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_video_non_donors_1&n=9)
* * *
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_video_non_donors_1&n=10).

Ron DeSantis is holding a fundraiser in Houston, Texas on September 20th at the home of Dr. Riva Collins and Ira Mitzner. The fundraiser for Ron DeSantis's Presidential campaign is being held in the same vicinity of a fundraiser for RINO Texas Speaker of the House Dade Phelan, who recently led the charge to impeach pro-Trump Texas Attorney General Paxton over false accusations of corruption and bribery. Many of the same donors attending Phelan's September 20th fundraiser are also attending DeSantis' event, and sources have confirmed to me that Phelan and DeSantis will be meeting in Texas together as well as fundraising together in Texas this week where DeSantis will spend the entire week in a multi city fundraising blitz across Texas.
**This week, DeSantis, the absentee Governor of Florida, is expected to visit six cities in Texas over four days, including campaign photo-ops and fundraisers in the Texas cities of Midland, Houston, Tyler, Dallas, Waco, and San Antonio.**
**September 19: Midland, Texas**
**September 20: Houston, Texas**
**September 21: Tyler, Texas and Dallas, Texas**
**September 22: Waco, Texas and San Antonio, Texas**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c84ad147-95aa-477a-b7de-522ab5b30379?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZtCz6-Wf73qTVMeJWnQClGw85I3scLxsikwJ45nr-rc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137151521)
One of the most notable names attending both fundraisers will be Texas billionaire Dick Weekley, who was one of the powerbrokers orchestrating the recent failed impeachment attempt against pro-Trump Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton.
An investigation into Weekley's recent political contributions revealed that he is a prolific donor to House Speaker Kevin McCarthy. Weekley has donated to McCarthy's Congressional campaigns 11 times since 2013, totaling $24,200.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/06a758cc-a3f2-43b5-875a-05e2854c7f46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Weekley also recently donated $10,000 to McCarthy's 'Protect the House 2024' PAC, and $40,800 to McCarthy's 'Take Back The House 2022' PAC. Weekley has donated $126,200 to the RINO controlled National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) since Kevin McCarthy became the House Republican minority leader in 2018.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2f6895c7-e295-4d8d-bece-32a4e3f8dc7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

---|---|---
Just as was the case[ last week in New York City and Greenwich, Connecticut](https://substack.com/redirect/20c850b3-19a5-4267-a629-1306a48bc012?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for Ron DeSantis's birthday fundraisers, I was able to uncover the fact that DeSantis donor Dick Weekley is also a donor to Senator Mitt Romney. Romney and DeSantis continue to overlap between their supporters and donors, especially within the last week following Romney's announcement that he won't be seeking re-election to the US Senate.

It is worth noting that Texas Speaker of the House Dade Phelan has earned the nickname "Drunk Dade" from his constituents after he was called out by Attorney General Ken Paxton for being drunk of the floor of the Texas House. Instead of taking responsibility for his public intoxication and instead of checking into rehab to address his public drinking issues, Drunk Dade decided to retaliate against Paxton by leading the charge for him to be impeached.
Watch this video to see Dade Phelan drunk on the floor of the Texas legislature, slurring his words and engaging in public intoxication on taxpayer dime.
If anyone deserves to be impeached and forced to resign for their behavior, it's Texas Speaker of the House Dade Phelan.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/82ce9949-0e99-4ce0-ab09-196ab63b0ae2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

It would appear that the impeachment attempt against Ken Paxton was orchestrated by Ron DeSantis donors in the 2024 Presidential election cycle in which the Republican establishment is seeking out ways to undermine President Trump in Texas, a state with one of the highest number of GOP delegates in the county. Also attending one of Ron DeSantis's swanky Texas fundraisers this week is Representative Chip Roy, who[ has publicly called for Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton's resignation. ](https://substack.com/redirect/be1c6ccb-40df-4652-991b-46b0f0f0b97c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Currently, there are efforts by RINOs and Democrats in multiple states across the country to file lawsuits in an attempt to keep President Trump off the ballot for the 2024 Presidential election. If there was an effort to sabotage President Trump's ability to gain ballot access in Texas, it makes sense as to why the RINO, anti-Trump Texas legislature would orchestrate a coup against the Texas Attorney General, Ken Paxton, who is a loud and proud Trump supporter and Trump ally.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6f18c14f-b21e-4c50-90fb-67f5c045fbcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I'm told by a source that DeSantis and Phelan intentionally planned their fundraisers in Houston, Texas on the same exact day, September 20, 2023, and that they will be meeting and campaigning in Texas together while DeSantis is in town this week for his Texas fundraising blitz.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZtCz6-Wf73qTVMeJWnQClGw85I3scLxsikwJ45nr-rc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137151521)
Over the weekend, On Saturday September 16, The Texas Republican controlled Senate [acquitted](https://substack.com/redirect/2ba085a3-d8f8-4535-8ef4-0259c8c3a6a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Attorney General [Ken Paxton](https://substack.com/redirect/d71a9a10-5d4a-4f5b-af04-01d9553dcaf9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of 16 articles of impeachment alleging corruption and bribery. President Trump congratulated Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton for beating this impeachment attempt by RINO Texas legislators and Texas, Bush-family tied Texas billionaires and millionaires who are now DeSantis donors.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86355295-02ca-4cea-820f-1d7b90e5b793?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In a statement he posted to Truth Social, President Trump said,
> "Congratulations to the Great People of Texas, and the State Senate, for rejecting POLITICAL PERSECUTION, and respecting the Integrity of our Elections. We should choose our elected officials by VOTING, not by weaponizing government. That is for Banana Republics, and Third World Countries. Now Attorney General Ken Paxton can get back to work. He's one of the BEST!"
In comparison, Ron DeSantis's hasn't issued a single statement in support of Ken Paxton, and his upcoming fundraisers explain why he's remained silent over the attacks against Paxton.
Highlighting the ties between DeSantis and House Speaker McCarthy is more than important, especially at a time when every elected official who maintains any level of support for President Trump is falling under the target of a weaponized government. To date, despite the fact that President Trump has a nearly 50 point lead in national polls regarding the 2024 GOP primary, and is even leading Joe Biden in national general election polling, Speaker McCarthy has still not endorsed President Trump for re-election. As I previously reported, McCarthy has a history of directing his donors in both California and Texas to donate to DeSantis's Presidential campaign in an effort to undermine President Trump's 2024 campaign.
