name: Bob Casey
body:
| | |
---
Hi Derek, I’m writing to ask if you will make a $5 contribution to our campaign today.
I want to take a minute to explain why this request matters to our campaign, but if you are ready to help us hold Pennsylvania, you can chip in at this link to split a donation between my campaign and Chrissy Houlahan.
| | [CHIP IN $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69939122/427792022/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk887-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzY1YmYzNi00ZDU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V6NkZP0noa_DtOgUdGnu3oyTqOHRlhSaPU-10jAZBqQ=)
---
$5 may not sound like much. It’s about the price of a water ice, a Hershey bar, or half of a cheesesteak. But the truth is, when enough folks chip in a few dollars whenever they can – whether it’s $50, $25, or even $5 – it makes a difference.
And the stakes of this race are high.
National Republicans are going to pull out all the stops to flip PA. They see the Commonwealth as key to their path to taking back the Senate majority and the White House, which is why we have to build a strong campaign now.
I know we have what it takes to fight back against whatever the GOP throws at us. We made history by electing Josh Shapiro and John Fetterman in 2022, and we’re going to need that same momentum on our side to win in 2024.
**So if you’re able, will you split $5 between my re-election campaign and Chrissy Houlahan? I’m in a tough race here in Pennsylvania, and every dollar makes a difference.**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Click to donate $5.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69939128/427792024/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk887-bu-nd&recurring=0&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzY1YmYzNi00ZDU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V6NkZP0noa_DtOgUdGnu3oyTqOHRlhSaPU-10jAZBqQ=)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69939130/427792026/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk887-bu-nd&recurring=0&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzY1YmYzNi00ZDU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V6NkZP0noa_DtOgUdGnu3oyTqOHRlhSaPU-10jAZBqQ=)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69939131/427792027/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk887-bu-nd&recurring=0&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzY1YmYzNi00ZDU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V6NkZP0noa_DtOgUdGnu3oyTqOHRlhSaPU-10jAZBqQ=)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69939133/427792034/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk887-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzY1YmYzNi00ZDU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V6NkZP0noa_DtOgUdGnu3oyTqOHRlhSaPU-10jAZBqQ=)**
We are building a campaign of supporters across Pennsylvania and the country, and I’m proud to have you on our team.

With gratitude,

Bob
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69939138/427792042/-1727112621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzY1YmYzNi00ZDU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V6NkZP0noa_DtOgUdGnu3oyTqOHRlhSaPU-10jAZBqQ=&emci=b7a59ad7-e753-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=dc65bf36-4d56-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=21278485). name: Adam Schiff
subject: 1982 to 2009 to today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek,

In 1982, I trained to become a U.S. Forestry Service Seasonal Firefighter.

In late summer, I dug fire lines shoulder to shoulder with firefighters in
Southern California as we fought a blazing wildfire.

It taught me respect for fire — its unpredictable and deadly character —
and more importantly, it taught me respect for the men and women who fight
fire. It’s why I’m so honored to announce the endorsement of the
International Association of Firefighters in my Senate race!

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1004&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]Old photo of young Adam Schiff in fire suit

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]Before I go on, can I ask you to chip in
$3 to our
campaign? I want to share with you why this endorsement matters to me. But
I also want to make sure we have the resources to win this U.S. Senate
election before our September 30 FEC deadline. Can you chip in
$3?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1007&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1008&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1009&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1010&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I had quite a few summer jobs to help pay for college and law school. And
even then, I graduated with a lot of student debt that I paid off over the
course of more than a decade. There were some years that my student loan
repayments were more than my rent in Los Angeles...and that’s saying a lot.

It’s why I’ve spent so much of my career focused on expanding Pell Grants
and making community college free. And it’s why I’ve pushed for President
Biden to cancel federal student loan debt.

But this summer job was also formative for me, and one reason that I’ve
spent so much of my time focused on wildfires in Congress.

After the Station Fire in 2009 in the Los Angeles Foothills (in the
northern part of my district) destroyed hundreds of structures and
resulted in the death of two firefighters, I led the charge in Congress to
investigate the cause of the fire, get resources to the Forest Service
that they desperately needed, make policy changes, and invest in wildfire
prevention before the next big one.

By the way — here’s the “Governator” with me inspecting the damage from
that fire, and talking to displaced residents (and yes, after finding the
burned remains of a dumbbell, Arnold could not resist a little showing
off):

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1012&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]Adam Schiff and then-California Gov. Arnold Schwarzenegger holding dumbbell

My experience as a seasonal firefighter, and as a Congressman representing
residents who lost their homes, has helped guide me a lot in Congress.

It’s why I fought for millions of federal dollars to buy “night-flying”
helicopters to drop water on raging wildfires and helped change Forestry
Service policy which banned night flights for decades. It’s why I led the
charge to create and keep running a satellite program to detect wildfires
before they get out of control and give real-time notice to firefighters.
And it’s why I’ve fought for legislation and resources to combat climate
change — because wildfires are only going to get worse in the coming years
if we fail to act.

While this type of work might not generate headlines or be something the
24-hour news networks deem important, it keeps people safe and makes our
communities better. It’s the kind of work that is so critically important
to me personally, and why I am so proud to have the support of the
International Association of Fire Fighters union on this campaign.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1013&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]I want to continue this work for years to come, so I’m asking: Can you
chip in
$3 to
help me keep up this work and win this Senate election against more than a
dozen opponents in California’s all-parties jungle primary?

Thanks for all you do, and remember to always thank your local
firefighters.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=sep2023_abs_em.SOCG8v&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230918_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3889%2E5257348%2EqH4NUw

But this summer job was also formative for me, and one reason that I’ve spent so much of my time focused on wildfires in Congress. After the Station Fire in 2009 in the Los Angeles Foothills (in the northern part of my district) destroyed hundreds of structures and resulted in the death of two firefighters, I led the charge in Congress to investigate the cause of the fire, get resources to the Forest Service that they desperately needed, make policy changes, and invest in wildfire prevention before the next big one. By the way — here’s the “Governator” with me inspecting the damage from that fire, and talking to displaced residents (and yes, after finding the burned remains of a dumbbell, Arnold could not resist a little showing off): [ ]Adam Schiff and then-California Gov. Arnold Schwarzenegger holding dumbbell My experience as a seasonal firefighter, and as a Congressman representing residents who lost their homes, has helped guide me a lot in Congress. It’s why I fought for millions of federal dollars to buy “night-flying” helicopters to drop water on raging wildfires and helped change Forestry Service policy which banned night flights for decades. It’s why I led the charge to create and keep running a satellite program to detect wildfires before they get out of control and give real-time notice to firefighters. And it’s why I’ve fought for legislation and resources to combat climate change — because wildfires are only going to get worse in the coming years if we fail to act. While this type of work might not generate headlines or be something the 24-hour news networks deem important, it keeps people safe and makes our communities better. It’s the kind of work that is so critically important to me personally, and why I am so proud to have the support of the International Association of Fire Fighters union on this campaign. [ ]I want to continue this work for years to come, so I’m asking: Can you chip in $3 to help me keep up this work and win this Senate election against more than a dozen opponents in California’s all-parties jungle primary? Thanks for all you do, and remember to always thank your local firefighters. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 [ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

**Throughout my career, I’ve gotten up close and personal with both — and I can tell you the strategy to defeat an extremist is the same one we use to fight fires: suppress the fuel source.**

[**Will you pledge a monthly recurring donation of $5 or more to show Kevin Kiley that we’re in the fight to get extremism out of California’s 3rd District for the long haul? Our goal is to reach $1,000 monthly recurring contributions, so we need all hands on deck!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69940101/427793762/632462266?refcode=E4154-20230917-RecurringAsk-SL-CampaignNews&amount=5&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTI1NDIwOWItNGQ1Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CNsikuQZnpamXgl22O77nzhmeBl4wk5n66PvZfQiC8U=)

name: Isaiah Martin
subject: Gen Z makes up less than one percent of Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/P0PhS-jyukExefrzwHhpvQ~~/AAPPAAA~)
---
I want to get personal and tell you in detail why I, a 25 year old Gen Z organizer, am running for Congress.

I think that Congress should be reflective of America. **And even though Gen Z is over 20% of the U.S. population, less than ONE percent of Congress is from my generation.** We need more members of Congress who are willing to confront our biggest challenges head on, and deliver real, bold results. Because courage and integrity have no age – and leadership isn’t the same as seniority. So here’s what I, as a 25 year old organizer and candidate, know for sure:

**We _must_ protect our democracy** from MAGA extremists who want to tear it apart. **We _must_ protect the right to vote** from far-right governors like Greg Abbott who want to strip this right from millions. **We _must_ protect the right to an abortion** from the extremists who want to bring our country back fifty years. **And we _must_ do it together.** **[If you’re ready to help make real progress on these big issues, we need to elect new leaders who will be relentless in these fights. That’s why I’m running, and why I need you. Hi friends,
Earlier this month, I launched my campaign for US Senate to beat Ted Cruz because Texans deserve a leader as tough as they are. I wanted to reach out to share my launch video again in case you missed it, as well as to thank everyone who has already made a donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgfortexas] to help lay the foundation for success.

extremist allies are honing in on Jacky Rosen as their top target for

Fellow American,

On September 27th, I'll take the stage for the second GOP Debate at the Ronald Reagan Presidential Library in California.

This will be an historic - and intimate - location for the second GOP Debate. There aren't many debate tickets for this smaller venue, so you'll have a "front row" view of the fireworks that are sure to take place.

Last debate, I was the number one target for the Establishment, and I don't expect it will be any different this time around.

It's important to have a member of Team Vivek, like you, in the crowd as we take on D.C. insiders who are resistant to the revolution we're planning for the Republican Party and the future of our nation.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I want a member of Team Vivek to be in California next week for the next GOP Debate. Will you win? | | Fellow American, On September 27th, I'll take the stage for the second GOP Debate at the Ronald Reagan Presidential Library in California. This will be an historic - and intimate - location for the second GOP Debate. There aren't many debate tickets for this smaller venue, so you'll have a "front row" view of the fireworks that are sure to take place. Last debate, I was the number one target for the Establishment, and I don't expect it will be any different this time around. It's important to have a member of Team Vivek, like you, in the crowd as we take on D.C. insiders who are resistant to the revolution we're planning for the Republican Party and the future of our nation. Fellow American, I hope you'll be my guest at the next debate. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. , you will be entered to win tickets to the debate for you and a guest, we'll also cover your costs for flights and accommodations to Simi Valley, California, for the second GOP Presidential Debate. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. name: Conservatives Give
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a86014dbb9244ad8be5424b54ba4d1c&_e=UgOAy0JLmsEbtePhdkZR8fZUvxLxVC2oTTScIXWHFejqVX1MUBrO1knUiPlHsJPLtWlnzMxeA4BaIogcMzVgnZHERtwBbtIUn0jVjYlidOkrGUYhlSV8rX3Vd_z3w-_2WJyhGcCOX_tDeiQD4bMK6g5mHCjoV3rvplMmgvUieGszclldVY2sk-cCdHxV_9u14esudyg6XuHLHiwol53pOo-00HnY-Woc20TPAoOZXNfi7vbQPuiex2QEoYyUNmJPBl9YL7PdVRaORJDQwKB44i23RNkBEVPwr_zpf-eySos4wZmUbSGKCdt5iZIPHIyDAkPImdc8FK_DKsnB59x1CZifR8PQlvdsL5pOy3Tp69UARR1yX8KnV367nrNNjMveMOqZPE4LZR0N9XRvBmXtTw%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a86014dbb9244ad8be5424b54ba4d1c&_e=UgOAy0JLmsEbtePhdkZR8fZUvxLxVC2oTTScIXWHFejqVX1MUBrO1knUiPlHsJPLtWlnzMxeA4BaIogcMzVgnZHERtwBbtIUn0jVjYlidOkrGUYhlSV8rX3Vd_z3w-_2WJyhGcCOX_tDeiQD4bMK6g5mHCjoV3rvplMmgvUieGszclldVY2sk-cCdHxV_9u14esudyg6XuHLHiwol53pOo-00HnY-Woc20TPAoOZXNfi7vbQPuiex2QEoYyUNmJPO1G-vZbKLLHiT-eExmstCfwA63-UaGsjoN3pRt0TUXwxIGwV-PscC6BdG0yZMtxSSel9Yz9kAL-zP3D-nZMBeTZuWJb-x4fArCv1d4XqhCFyqXarwRccGn__pxZeVVkxMtYBAykIAenI4U1-kXvHug%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a86014dbb9244ad8be5424b54ba4d1c&_e=UgOAy0JLmsEbtePhdkZR8fZUvxLxVC2oTTScIXWHFejqVX1MUBrO1knUiPlHsJPLtWlnzMxeA4BaIogcMzVgnZHERtwBbtIUn0jVjYlidOkrGUYhlSV8rX3Vd_z3w-_2WJyhGcCOX_tDeiQD4bMK6g5mHCjoV3rvplMmgvUieGszclldVY2sk-cCdHxV_9u14esudyg6XuHLHiwol53pOo-00HnY-Woc20TPAoOZXNfi7vbQPuiex2QEoYyUNmJPfjTB4XkYuOscg2FK1GS1-mWqWMpuBq8bmuBdDmGpT35b4wRsf-57tKWyIvL_W-4PBiJNnAR5fe1WgP9MjVIza39BKSlUPbIxrCboQKNA0P4-ZFXsJCi-u5xweMR4zHIAFxj6r1dhU8VM3gbk21alrw%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a86014dbb9244ad8be5424b54ba4d1c&_e=UgOAy0JLmsEbtePhdkZR8fZUvxLxVC2oTTScIXWHFejqVX1MUBrO1knUiPlHsJPLtWlnzMxeA4BaIogcMzVgnZHERtwBbtIUn0jVjYlidOkrGUYhlSV8rX3Vd_z3w-_2WJyhGcCOX_tDeiQD4bMK6g5mHCjoV3rvplMmgvUieGszclldVY2sk-cCdHxV_9u14esudyg6XuHLHiwol53pOo-00HnY-Woc20TPAoOZXNfi7vbQPuiex2QEoYyUNmJPueC3L0spBJ2GhcWRQBtsQNS5fkEh7DUAqYTA0fZ-yt-8QAqTThkp6m9mF-YJlwwNJt4AbxTdTALshqw7T_AAAsEORMcV_sDZAlsJI1CjZiYYM-U8TkC3BMqKSuo_my8s4C3_kqSMMGEzr3o0kf436g%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a86014dbb9244ad8be5424b54ba4d1c&_e=UgOAy0JLmsEbtePhdkZR8fZUvxLxVC2oTTScIXWHFejqVX1MUBrO1knUiPlHsJPLtWlnzMxeA4BaIogcMzVgnZHERtwBbtIUn0jVjYlidOkrGUYhlSV8rX3Vd_z3w-_2WJyhGcCOX_tDeiQD4bMK6g5mHCjoV3rvplMmgvUieGszclldVY2sk-cCdHxV_9u14esudyg6XuHLHiwol53pOo-00HnY-Woc20TPAoOZXNfi7vbQPuiex2QEoYyUNmJPrp2FsQ1bKdlGrnSnfTkQs5oBxWriCZaLOoPYHGzzEOqDdglPDLgih7ojTDV1JT8anMW6WEG0moxGBvegXCEkO7DHd_Tg6bLp9bvQTBpufJMxIdiEOXn7vmVbcE8nV_tQrtYH41Kc19LbzaMTMG8EbA%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: Reaching out about my son Ritchie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69945476/427801019/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230918_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk2ZmY2MC01MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nC3uPawQ_-MqlLnmbGRnDZwxG_OZkUtUWNCoqtJVpU=) I’m personally reaching out today on behalf of my son, who’s working so hard right now to give Americans like me a voice in Congress.

As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | [CONTRIBUTE TO SUPPORT MY SON RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69945477/427801020/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230918_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk2ZmY2MC01MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nC3uPawQ_-MqlLnmbGRnDZwxG_OZkUtUWNCoqtJVpU=)
---
I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House.

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. **He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage.**

Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

**My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter.**

And I know that those experiences drive him _every single time_ he walks into his office in D.C.

[Peter, I know I’m biased, but there is truly no better person than Ritchie to represent NY-15. So if you can afford it, today I’m hoping you could make a $3 donation to continue supporting him. I know he would appreciate it so much. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69945478/427801021/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230918_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk2ZmY2MC01MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nC3uPawQ_-MqlLnmbGRnDZwxG_OZkUtUWNCoqtJVpU=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69945485/427801028/-717493931?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20230918_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk2ZmY2MC01MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nC3uPawQ_-MqlLnmbGRnDZwxG_OZkUtUWNCoqtJVpU=)

Thank you so much,

_Debra_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: | Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. = I’m personally reaching out today on behalf of my son, who’s working so hard right now to give Americans like me a voice in Congress. As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | = I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House. His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage. Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today. My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter. And I know that those experiences drive him every single time he walks into his office in D.C. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much, Debra | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. **Here’s why the GOP is SO threatened by Justice Protasiewicz:**
* Wisconsin Republicans have rigged the rules in their favor for decades. **But voters went to the ballot box earlier this year to elect a liberal justice and flip the ideological control of the state's Supreme Court for the first time in _decades._**
* A lawsuit was filed last month to overturn the state’s rigged maps. If it’s successful, it could put _all 132 seats on the ballot next year_ – giving Democrats an opportunity to finally build power in Wisconsin.
* Unfair maps have made it nearly impossible for Democrats to gain power in Wisconsin’s legislature. **The GOP will stop at nothing (_they might even defy their state Constitution!_) to defend their veto-proof majority in Wisconsin. **

**[Grassroots donors have chipped in $7 here and $10 there to support our movement, and together, we’ve secured Democratic victories in two dozen special elections in 2023 alone. Evers remarks come just as Republicans threaten to impeach a democratically elected liberal justice and the Republican-controlled Senate voted to fire the state’s top election official. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Here’s why the GOP is SO threatened by Justice Protasiewicz: Wisconsin Republicans have rigged the rules in their favor for decades. But voters went to the ballot box earlier this year to elect a liberal justice and flip the ideological control of the state's Supreme Court for the first time in decades. A lawsuit was filed last month to overturn the state’s rigged maps. If it’s successful, it could put all 132 seats on the ballot next year – giving Democrats an opportunity to finally build power in Wisconsin. Unfair maps have made it nearly impossible for Democrats to gain power in Wisconsin’s legislature. The GOP will stop at nothing (they might even defy their state Constitution!) to defend their veto-proof majority in Wisconsin. The future of abortion, voting rights, and our democracy are on the line. Peter, voter suppression has made Texas one of the hardest states to vote in the nation. From putting strict limits on vote by mail, to not allowing voter registration online, and even restricting assistance to voters with disabilities and voters with limited English, getting people to the polls has been incredibly difficult. That means Texas is ground zero for voting rights in this country. Thank you for the support last week as we approach the public FEC filing deadline at the end of the month – it puts us in a strong position as we close out the quarter. **** Thank you for the support last week as we approach the public FEC filing deadline at the end of the month – **it puts us in a strong position as we close out the quarter.**

We’re back in D.C. now, and we have a responsibility to find solutions to the challenges and opportunities before us. Unfortunately, though, under the House GOP majority all we see is partisanship and obstruction from members who care more about their megadonors and media hits than working for the American people.

**Democrats, on the other hand, are committed to working for _all_ Americans, and that’s why we must retake the majority next year. If you’re able to support this work and didn’t get a chance to chip in last week, here’s that link one more time: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/md_septmm#dpwillis67@gmail.com.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69948619/427803059/1751262814?amount=25&refcode=09182023_md_midmonthty_fr_1&refcode2=ddf4237d-5356-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGY0MjM3ZC01MzU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d7HIrLNqXmOsjf8NKE1pULJbhQmTrjAkOC3-A8Fnw-E=)**

subject: Republican Events & Initiatives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Find these upcoming Republican events and initiative signing tables nearest you... | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3746d832cf&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| _**Fairs and Initiatives**_ Summer is winding down but Republican booths are still loud and proud at fairs across Washington State! At our fair booths you will also find **6 initiatives available for you to sign - if qualified with enough signatures by the end of this year - these initiatives will bring 6 key policy issues onto the 2024 ballot for WA voters.** These initiatives are immediate solutions to problems in our state, and if passed, will become law regardless of a Democrat or Republican majority in Olympia.

**Washington State Fair in Puyallup (September 1 - 24)**
Look for the Pierce County Republican Party booth in the NW corner of the 'Showplex Building'.

**Central WA State Fair in Yakima (September 22 - October 1)**
Look for the Yakima County Republican Party booth in the 'Sundome'

_For information on local fairs and upcoming Republican events, please check out your local county GOP websites._

**Initiatives **
I-2113 > Reasonable Police Pursuit
I-2117 > Stop the Hidden Gas Tax
I-2124 > Opt Out of State-Run Long Term Care Coverage Act
I-2109 > Repeal the Capital Gains Tax
I-2111 > No State Income Tax
I-2081 > Parental Notification

For more information on the initiatives, check out www.letsgowashington.com.
---
|
---
| _**'Heart of the Party' BBQ's**_ Hopefully you had the opportunity to join us at one of our many 'Heart of the Party' BBQ's this summer. Our Chairman and staff travelled the state to meet supporters, introduce candidates, and talk about our Party's mission over the next 15 months of the election cycle. **We are** **looking forward to seeing everyone again next summer, along with many more new faces as our Party keeps growing in WA.**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---

_Hosted by the 7th District Republican Committee_

name: Strength in Seven PAC
subject: Join us for the Legacy Celebration
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STRENGTH IN SEVEN PAC Strength in Seven PAC
body:
Congresswoman Shontel Brown’s Second Annual Legacy Celebration is October 13.

Honoring and celebrating the legacy of Cleveland’s own Congressman Louis Stokes, Congresswoman Stephanie Tubbs Jones, and Secretary Marcia L. Fudge.
Peter,

We’re gearing up for Congresswoman Shontel Brown’s Second Annual Legacy Celebration, and we wanted to be sure you saw the big event.

Join us on **Friday, October 13, from 7-10 pm at the Huntington Convention Center of Cleveland **for an all-black attire reception honoring and celebrating the legacy of Cleveland’s own Congressman Louis Stokes, Congresswoman Stephanie Tubbs Jones, and Secretary Marcia L. Fudge. body:
He'll be in court, not campaigning.| | | We won't be seeing Trump on the campaign trail any time soon, folks. He is now under four different indictments in multiple states.

Has to be some kind of a record.

How on earth is Donald Trump going to run an effective campaign if he's going to be in court every day from March 2024 going forward?

Guess what?

He doesn’t care about the campaign, or beating Joe Biden, he only cares about himself.

**The American people deserve a candidate who is focused on beating the Democrats, not beating his case.**

clean_body: He'll be in court, not campaigning.| | | We won't be seeing Trump on the campaign trail any time soon, folks. He is now under four different indictments in multiple states. Has to be some kind of a record. How on earth is Donald Trump going to run an effective campaign if he's going to be in court every day from March 2024 going forward? Guess what? He doesn’t care about the campaign, or beating Joe Biden, he only cares about himself. The American people deserve a candidate who is focused on beating the Democrats, not beating his case. Thank you, Gov. Christie | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

Dan Goldman for a forum on hate crimes and violence.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69951016/427806304/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U1MzhhOTUtNTU1Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MeuvGIhqaD7kc0HZ6T2tQJdmX-ItAEYDoviV770h_MY=)

Friend, Last week, I was proud to participate in a discussion hosted by Rep. Dan Goldman that focused on hate crimes and violence, more specifically antisemitism and Asian hate. You may remember Rep. Goldman during Trump’s first impeachment trial—he was a take-no-prisoners FORCE to be reckoned with!
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69951018/427806306/1649708063?refcode=stopping-hateNGP_PIC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U1MzhhOTUtNTU1Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MeuvGIhqaD7kc0HZ6T2tQJdmX-ItAEYDoviV770h_MY=)
---
Across the country, hate crimes and hate speech (which is more prevalent on nearly every social media platform) have steadily been on the rise. As a candidate for President and then as President of the United States, **Trump openly gave white supremacists and white nationalists a safe haven to promote their reprehensible views.** Trump’s remarks after a woman was murdered protesting a Neo-Nazi rally in Charlottesville, Virginia (”...there were very fine people— _on both sides_ ”) made it crystal clear that he sympathized with white supremacists, if not completely shared their views. And since then, Trump and the MAGA base of the GOP, including my opponent Jim Jordan, have welcomed racists, white supremacists, and anti-Semitic bigots with open arms. **Jordan openly supports domestic terrorists that launched violent riots and tried to subvert our free and fair election.** _**There is no place for the hatred and tolerance that Jim Jordan encourages.**_ And that’s why I’m proud to include policy in my campaign platform around addressing hate crimes, increasing security online, and fighting domestic terrorism. This work may not sound very sexy, but it is absolutely vital for our security and our democracy. **[We can’t let dangerous MAGA bigots like Jim Jordan destroy our country. That’s why I am working around the clock to defeat Jim Jordan—and why I would so appreciate your support right now, even just $10 would be a HUGE help:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69951021/427806309/1649708063?refcode=stopping-hateNGP&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U1MzhhOTUtNTU1Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MeuvGIhqaD7kc0HZ6T2tQJdmX-ItAEYDoviV770h_MY=)**

body:

**BREAKING: NIKKI HALEY SURGES TO SECOND PLACE IN NEW HAMPSHIRE**
Friend, did you see the news?

**FIRST:** Nikki was underestimated...but that didn't stop her.

**THEN:** Nikki held over 100 campaign events across the country, including more than 45 stops in New Hampshire. She didn't fly in and fly out, she put in the work, shook hands, met with voters, and answered every question.

**AFTER THAT:** Nikki had a stand-out performance and was declared the **WINNER** of the first Presidential Debate.

**NOW:** A new poll shows Nikki **SURGING** to second place in New Hampshire...and she's just getting started!

As you read this, Nikki is in New Hampshire for another round of campaign events. **[Would you consider pitching in to keep her momentum going strong?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb4kivvosrnjo6ibv92all1srojq5er7pfahcnvo_rp22sh2s8i66p75c1jm1o34cph2bs "Before her town hall starts in less than 6 hours, can you pitch in to keep her momentum going strong?") **

name: Joe Kent
subject: She refuses to secure the border.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
We pay nearly $5 trillion in taxes to the Federal Government. It is not unreasonable to ask Congress to secure the border and avoid adding to the more than $2 trillion in debt.
Biden and the Democrats are resisting measures to secure our border at a time when it is wide open and lethal drugs like fentanyl are pouring through.
If you believe we need to send a conservative Republican to Congress, please help me get to Washington by contributing to my campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/5Y761ZAR1ySyYAr94t892vVA/F7xOtNXppaUJZ6Bi3fNQ2A).
The Biden administration is saddling the next generation with trillions of dollars in debt. The next budget proposal must include restrictions on spending and include resources for Border Patrol.
Help me with a donation today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/5Y761ZAR1ySyYAr94t892vVA/F7xOtNXppaUJZ6Bi3fNQ2A).
My opponent Marie Perez continues to vote in lockstep with Democrats to increase spending - except when it comes to securing our border. She voted against H.R. 2 Secure the Border Act which would have provided funding for overwhelmed border patrol agents.
Please help me expose Marie's voting record by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/5Y761ZAR1ySyYAr94t892vVA/F7xOtNXppaUJZ6Bi3fNQ2A). You can also opt to make it a recurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button.
When I get to Congress, I will fight to secure the border and rein in D.C.'s out-of-control spending.
You can help get a conservative Republican into Congress by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/5Y761ZAR1ySyYAr94t892vVA/F7xOtNXppaUJZ6Bi3fNQ2A).
Will you please help me meet our goal so we can send a common-sense conservative to Congress?
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
PS - Turn your anger about the border crisis into action by donating. Help me win so I can fight for secure borders by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/5Y761ZAR1ySyYAr94t892vVA/F7xOtNXppaUJZ6Bi3fNQ2A).
Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

name: Andrew Wynne (FCA)
subject: why you should care about judges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
There’s one place we can have an outsized impact on our country...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e8f0f81265b24059a1ee8f69aa91ad7b&_e=pWJbJYfVAmg0qt7koa8xwFXelhPUjGHzngsYJnnvduikCNYDOdXr_LHgbP8771FggHFHXeeRRzuVJBYpWKFOLk2MBXwdfV1_xwWG8TjuNL2njwHE15fqnJTcneGCQGoCrmPsMRTPkJkT-G54vlSBlyYGp1pDSzNYkPZ1N5u2tVGYuIlLnvd0R2x_2Y4293SdJd6VBrAn9lnli5zGwDanGqVCPWcBgyqbYuujE6HocXHNVRcYpC9cv_rfoKdL_ZTo1lU3xFFV4CvuJU2w9rp-efzBAywvMB9Gz64da7YQbEX6mz7pFpSY4J6w43sMrzS5CcT2mu4BQJcEamY_U3D-8QH7G45ow7QWWaA9l6_OROk666TpNuDGsKa0eDDOBLfI)
---
Peter, **Does who sits on the bench matter for America? ** Let’s consult the record...
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e8f0f81265b24059a1ee8f69aa91ad7b&_e=pWJbJYfVAmg0qt7koa8xwFXelhPUjGHzngsYJnnvduikCNYDOdXr_LHgbP8771FggHFHXeeRRzuVJBYpWKFOLk2MBXwdfV1_xwWG8TjuNL2njwHE15fqnJTcneGCQGoCrmPsMRTPkJkT-G54vlSBlyYGp1pDSzNYkPZ1N5u2tVGYuIlLnvd0R2x_2Y4293SdJd6VBrAn9lnli5zGwDanGqVCPWcBgyqbYuujE6HocXHMyx_rc2Qr8Agz6j_82SnlsR-yk8IsuAU5OkZRJlFVCV2YeAOHWY73iEvYhnkXoaVps5KNJwYl0nyomhu8WXpH3ZIRSvZtSiDGCdvYusKBYfRhh8XKA_BaZ8WH7Upaf0Dwa6P5Lo8v0CHSevxTrIbF)
---
**Peter, having solid judges who are willing to defend our Constitution makes ALL the difference.** Without judges like these:
---
* Hunter Biden would have gotten away with working the DOJ to get off nearly scot-free for his many crimes...
* The will of the voters in Alabama would have been crushed by gender ideology...
* And _Roe v. Wade_ would still be the law of the land.

---
While some judges are appointed, many key judges are elected. Yet these races don’t get the horserace coverage of a Presidential or Senate campaign, even though our judiciary is so often the last line of defense for our Constitution. **That’s where[Fair Courts America](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e8f0f81265b24059a1ee8f69aa91ad7b&_e=pWJbJYfVAmg0qt7koa8xwFXelhPUjGHzngsYJnnvduikCNYDOdXr_LHgbP8771FggHFHXeeRRzuVJBYpWKFOLk2MBXwdfV1_xwWG8TjuNL2njwHE15fqnJTcneGCQGoCrmPsMRTPkJkT-G54vlSBlyYGp1pDSzNYkPZ1N5u2tVGYuIlLnvd0R2x_2Y4293SdJd6VBrAn9lnli5zGwDanGqVCPWcBgyqbYuujE6HocXEIdwLTBWX28ywjRkBE9n0-SRoL5Bhj3U0cg622O47CjI4KddnImyXzxQK2_rdXEmqBdMpmSjL-3Y1v7CsepLWJoRZabi7d18nKmrLV35DerEIvT9mIy6yglF-Ky5pWezRhA4VbuxvaMZcptbVYTtNr)**** comes in. ** **We fight to get good judges and prosecutors to protect our country's free and fair judicial system.** That means following these races, educating voters, and going head-to-head with liberal dark money dedicated to sneaking radical activists onto the bench. _Tracking these judicial races is a massive undertaking — but it is critical to protecting our republic. _
**I’ll be blunt: I want you to join our movement, Peter.****Can we count on your donation of ANY amount today to keep fighting for heroic judges like these?**
---

Peter – I said what I said, and I’m going to keep saying it because _this is just ridiculous._

We’re less than two weeks away from a government shutdown that will impact millions of working people, and Kevin McCarthy can’t even get his party in line.

Instead of trying to prevent this shutdown, the GOP is trying to open a B.S. impeachment trial against President Biden.

When our country comes to a halt, we need to remember who did this: Speaker Kevin McCarthy and the extremist House Republicans, who care more about themselves and their politics than you and me.

**So, while Republicans are busy doing nothing, my team set a $10,000 rapid-response fundraising goal for my campaign so we can have leaders in Congress who _won’t_ waste our time.**

Peter, I am so happy to endorse a great candidate for U.S. Senate in Ohio – **Bernie Moreno.**

With Ohio being one of the top three targeted Senate seats Republicans need to flip in 2024, we’re lucky to have a candidate like Bernie in this race. [**But he’s going to need all the support we can give him.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d04f386181634f83b42b4a1043152618&_e=JQnIYYu6j4R0lrtL-xl0EHIDoWH4ndaqoqRRHb3lIWsVodD4jE_V5gUf0z6TytGVxjONX61vnJyDQk62fvuqsKd4aqDac6IXJ6qvEQvWAYVu_XNsl1nXK5qRa-2aEFMR5dF0PSUGmWgvnFA719yTM7Ve9OoYQqE_XerlAUn0WMoYtZdRw9SdVpF7WD-DV3zhI71a587FMiLYofhvaYU9aB9csUBq_r25veMmvNGQT2N67Wr2EpZwVC6IuFR5FrKKxjkIhfHdAYp47vLLtiP6qKfSut7FY-9DOhcOEuY4EROPymEwRI6Z_yw-0GKd43IHWGo8QErq3VMN84atAdOvUu0cYPkyqZWddio4M13zquqThLFkqGMIYhwOb9MYT2jkV7GllMevY98oe1ZrsnyQsg%3D%3D)

Like me, Bernie is an outsider – _he always has been._ But he’s never let that stop him.

From coming to America legally with his family when he was five, to growing up to become a successful business owner who has created thousands of jobs in Ohio, Bernie has lived the American Dream.

**Now, Bernie is running to save the country he loves and the America First values we share.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d04f386181634f83b42b4a1043152618&_e=JQnIYYu6j4R0lrtL-xl0EHIDoWH4ndaqoqRRHb3lIWsVodD4jE_V5gUf0z6TytGVxjONX61vnJyDQk62fvuqsKd4aqDac6IXJ6qvEQvWAYVu_XNsl1nXK5qRa-2aEFMR5dF0PSUGmWgvnFA719yTM7Ve9OoYQqE_XerlAUn0WMoYtZdRw9SdVpF7WD-DV3zhI71a587FMiLYofhvaYU9aB9csUBq_r25veMmvNGQT2N67Wr2EpZwVC6IuFR5FrKKphC-fhVbkq3iMUZ9nkcaI-LaHy39KXJOBOU_dsVRqlOgpmh1VNP-I2Ntlk8TADtMcW3hIywVl3-TGzcY_Hd92SWZ2JrWRxGmi5llIGopPrjcOJ4sC5B7gfQssIMjUnMmttZYiQng65QglHxfoMsqWg%3D%3D)
The country we grew up with is being ruined by corrupt and cowardly insider politicians, and we need an outsider and fierce fighter like Bernie who can go to Washington and fix it.

[**Will you join me in supporting outsider conservative and America First candidate Bernie Moreno with a donation of $15, $25, $35 or more today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d04f386181634f83b42b4a1043152618&_e=JQnIYYu6j4R0lrtL-xl0EHIDoWH4ndaqoqRRHb3lIWsVodD4jE_V5gUf0z6TytGVxjONX61vnJyDQk62fvuqsKd4aqDac6IXJ6qvEQvWAYVu_XNsl1nXK5qRa-2aEFMR5dF0PSUGmWgvnFA719yTM7Ve9OoYQqE_XerlAUn0WMoYtZdRw9SdVpF7WD-DV3zhI71a587FMiLYofhvaYU9aB9csUBq_r25veMmvNGQT2N67Wr2EpZwVC6IuFR5FrKKhWzYaFbcmR1tHLXzqK28cyuzF7krVe50h_6E7ZqHF9Fc8qUGglKwzLivd78-d4FVBbmMZc9KssTMwvZep6HOsrH9k6ntGQPhBAPbtS1aIqeaEwpnD7tYcOVxqn6DBXW4KkodlkilqE1vnqCXswMFFg%3D%3D)

We need Bernie to flip Ohio and put that seat, along with the Senate majority, in the hands of Republicans.

Only then will we be able to secure our borders, restore our economy, stand up to China, get criminals off our streets, and keep the radical woke agenda out of our schools.

[**Please join me in giving Bernie all the support you can today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d04f386181634f83b42b4a1043152618&_e=JQnIYYu6j4R0lrtL-xl0EHIDoWH4ndaqoqRRHb3lIWsVodD4jE_V5gUf0z6TytGVxjONX61vnJyDQk62fvuqsKd4aqDac6IXJ6qvEQvWAYVu_XNsl1nXK5qRa-2aEFMR5dF0PSUGmWgvnFA719yTM7Ve9OoYQqE_XerlAUn0WMoYtZdRw9SdVpF7WD-DV3zhI71a587FMiLYofhvaYU9aB9csUBq_r25veMmvNGQT2N67Wr2EpZwVC6IuFR5FrKK5PnyIu8fjufJ_Pz1h3sQqWjQNfRKnbu7GLYq2l3h1tlLutNXfngSXrAkPNhbcHfS0U0flnNDpXwrPNISMxbWf7ZSEPzjgJyF-yrLdWvSYAeZ_AWbyZ7mTMyE7em__uVXGX_V9JUko6qRjalX8Ws9Rw%3D%3D)

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: We’re in the home stretch. | = = 50 days, Peter. That's it. We only need to put up with 50 more days of Tate Reeves and his corrupt leadership before we give him the boot at the ballot box. That means it's time to step on the gas pedal. We're going all-in — texting voters, emailing voters, knocking on voters’ doors, making phone calls to voters, targeting voters through digital ads, you name it. But I can't do this alone. I need you in my corner — all the way through November 7th. So here's the situation: = Peter — now is our chance to make sure our message is heard loud and clear. Mississippi can't handle four more years of the same song and dance. We will continue to see hospitals close, healthcare access shrink, and corruption grow rampant unless we do something about it. That’s the harsh reality we’re facing. This is our time to reach out to voters, engage our friends and neighbors, and double our efforts to make sure Reeves is done for on Election Day. It won’t be easy, but I know we can get it done. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. subject: Our Constitution is Being Disregarded and Disrespected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Our elected officials have forgotten that “We the People” are at home. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c0ae06233ef1/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12652106?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=cc6782604f&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| We the People of the United States, in order to protect our perfect Union and take our government back from extreme legislators and corporate interests, stand united in defense of our constitution. We remember the oath our forefathers made to _**Secure Our Peace, Defend Our Borders,**_ and _**Protect Our Businesses**_ , but our leaders have not.

Our currently elected leaders have made it their mission to strip our right to free-speech, to defend ourselves from criminals, and to keep the government bloated and ineffective. To this we can only say: **“No More!”**

Our Constitutional Republic requires the participation of our citizenry, and the cooperation of our elected officials. _**They serve the people, not their bottom lines.**_

What the people of Texas deserve is a Congresswoman who remembers our Constitutional Rights and Liberties, _**and will never bend when it’s profitable to do so**_. I am the person for the job, and will bring a new era of prosperity to TX-23 and the Nation, by returning to the principles of our Constitution.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=8bfe1dcba9&e=c982eb7ad4)

clean_body: Our elected officials have forgotten that “We the People” are at home. | | | | | | | Dear Peter, | We the People of the United States, in order to protect our perfect Union and take our government back from extreme legislators and corporate interests, stand united in defense of our constitution. We remember the oath our forefathers made to Secure Our Peace, Defend Our Borders, and Protect Our Businesses , but our leaders have not. Our currently elected leaders have made it their mission to strip our right to free-speech, to defend ourselves from criminals, and to keep the government bloated and ineffective. To this we can only say: “No More!” Our Constitutional Republic requires the participation of our citizenry, and the cooperation of our elected officials. They serve the people, not their bottom lines. What the people of Texas deserve is a Congresswoman who remembers our Constitutional Rights and Liberties, and will never bend when it’s profitable to do so. I am the person for the job, and will bring a new era of prosperity to TX-23 and the Nation, by returning to the principles of our Constitution. | | | "JOIN THE FIGHT FOR FREEDOM »" | "PROTECT OUR CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHTS »" | "TAKE THE PLEDGE »" | For America, Julie Clark Former Medina County Republican Chair Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark" | | Copyright © 2023 Conservatives for Julie Clark, All rights reserved.

name: Lose Cruz HQ
subject: Can we be honest with you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=94%2E623276%2E07jifs)
Not so long ago, there was a time where the very idea of Ted Cruz losing reelection seemed nothing more than some far-off fever dream.
_**But that was then, and this is now.**_
What if we told you...
* In 2018, Ted won reelection but only by _just_ 2.6 percentage points — the closest U.S. Senate race in Texas since 1978.
* CNN recently named Texas as one of 10 Senate seats **_most likely to flip_** next year.
* **_Nearly half_** of Texas voters have a “somewhat” or “very unfavorable” view of their part-time senator.
* There are now not just one, two, but _three_ amazing Democratic candidates seeking to send Ted home — one of which, Colin Allred is polling 5 points behind Cruz.

There are only 413 days left until the 2024 election and we have the unique opportunity to break up with our part-time senator for good. But if we’re going to succeed and win, we can’t do this without you.
**[Can you make a $5 contribution today to bring us one step closer to losing Cruz next year?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20230918?refcode=em20230918&amount=5&refcode2=94_623276_07jifs&akid=94%2E623276%2E07jifs)**

Thank you! We're grateful to have you on this team!
In solidarity,
— LCHQ

name: Bob Casey
subject: Scranton
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=682%2E552475%2E5OK800)
Peter, you probably know by now that I love Scranton. It’s where I grew up, it’s where Terese and I raised our four daughters, and it’s where I’m proud to still call home today.
**[Pennsylvania is my home, and I’m running for re-election to continue representing our Commonwealth in Washington. If you’re able, will you chip in $5 to my campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230918-1?refcode=em20230918-1&refcode2=682_552475_5OK800&akid=682%2E552475%2E5OK800)**
When people ask why I’ve chosen to make Scranton our home, I tell them it really is because of the people.
I enjoy how in Scranton, saying “hello” or “how’s it going?” in the grocery store checkout line always leads to an engaging conversation. Neighbors don’t just say “hello” back and go on with their day. They’re going to tell you about what they’re buying and about their family -- and they’ll ask you about what you’re buying and about your family too.
These conversations remind me how hard Pennsylvanians work to provide for their kids, save for their families’ futures, and give back to their communities. It reminds me why I’m fighting for the people of our Commonwealth in the Senate, because they deserve a Senator who works just as hard to represent their voices in Washington.
**[Peter, I’m running for re-election to keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in the Senate, but I won’t be able to win without your support. Will you donate $5 or any amount now to help defend this seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230918-1?refcode=em20230918-1&refcode2=682_552475_5OK800&akid=682%2E552475%2E5OK800)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230918-1?refcode=em20230918-1&refcode2=682_552475_5OK800&akid=682%2E552475%2E5OK800)**
I’m grateful for your support as we build this campaign.
With gratitude,
Bob

* * *

name: Tina Smith
subject: I’ve had enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Tommy Tuberville, a Senator from Alabama, has single-handedly blocked hundreds of military appointments for months. And if you’re wondering why, it’s because he’s protesting abortion-related travel policies for servicemembers. |
#
Folks — Tommy Tuberville, a Senator from Alabama, has single-handedly blocked hundreds of military appointments for months. **And if you’re wondering why, it’s because he’s protesting abortion-related travel policies for servicemembers.** Right now, military personnel who are stationed in states where abortion is banned (like Alabama) may be reimbursed for travel expenses to receive abortions in other states. Apparently, Tommy Tuberville does not like giving servicemembers the right to make decisions about their health care — and as a result, he’s using partisan tactics to block military nominations. This is an affront to our national security, but Tuberville is still not budging. Numerous top military positions are vacant because of this blockade. Admiral Lisa Franchetti, who is nominated to be head of the U.S. Navy, said it will take years to recover from these delays. Tuberville persists in blocking promotions — and his GOP colleagues remain quiet about his political publicity stunt impacting millions of our military personnel nationwide. **[I’ve had enough — I’m calling on Tommy Tuberville to stop using military promotions as a political bargaining chip. If you agree with me, add your name alongside mine in our efforts to get him to stand down and let the Senate vote on these critical military nominations.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69952573/427812004/-1399350326?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC45_20230918_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDhiZGMwOS01ZDU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCnkc3fJuXhzHhx2MrTSxtdXKX_ii_LWHN60aNbvNTk=&emci=60dcab2e-5956-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=508bdc09-5d56-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69952574/427812005/-1399350326?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC45_20230918_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDhiZGMwOS01ZDU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCnkc3fJuXhzHhx2MrTSxtdXKX_ii_LWHN60aNbvNTk=&emci=60dcab2e-5956-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=508bdc09-5d56-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=6227932)

clean_body: Tommy Tuberville, a Senator from Alabama, has single-handedly blocked hundreds of military appointments for months. And if you’re wondering why, it’s because he’s protesting abortion-related travel policies for servicemembers. | Folks — Tommy Tuberville, a Senator from Alabama, has single-handedly blocked hundreds of military appointments for months. And if you’re wondering why, it’s because he’s protesting abortion-related travel policies for servicemembers. Right now, military personnel who are stationed in states where abortion is banned (like Alabama) may be reimbursed for travel expenses to receive abortions in other states. Apparently, Tommy Tuberville does not like giving servicemembers the right to make decisions about their health care — and as a result, he’s using partisan tactics to block military nominations. This is an affront to our national security, but Tuberville is still not budging. Numerous top military positions are vacant because of this blockade. Admiral Lisa Franchetti, who is nominated to be head of the U.S. Navy, said it will take years to recover from these delays. Tuberville persists in blocking promotions — and his GOP colleagues remain quiet about his political publicity stunt impacting millions of our military personnel nationwide. | Thank you for raising your voice on this issue. I’m sick and tired of Tommy Tuberville’s downright dangerous behavior. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

body:
OVER 8 MILLION ILLEGALS

|

| **They just issued our country 's death warrant.**
OVER 8 MILLION ILLEGALS HAVE CROSSED THE BORDER UNDER BIDEN. The far-Left's border policies are _KILLING_ our country. But I'm not giving up - _**my number one priority**_ is to stop the flow of fentanyl, secure the border, and ban sanctuary policies.

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5351fe5155bc430c80cc21302e72723f&_e=DulmjVp7cww_qI2PXPaeehhGWcqam-xri-tpfTFTwbVIfEQ0YhzN-f-nh_hr3RAvXtKfP01i5sRLZbeAQbVRrR9yJ5yGamIiuWObj4itI0ZKhbpC_2OFqONVZ_qoI9BNs1WEptuEQXe97riL0aJqiQ4d2LTrNG5nkqSpH45rLIiwg_aB3ieCevPPDARlH_ITh3vxS6mOWWML-KI5CSwrAdIvxwOcbEg957A7s0Np_G5pH7k2NGBivRWIF4_jKDKzbhdeuax5sgNWCPj_QyykdNaSGHhlEAd_IO697iAgAj3xKLpu20lDZI2XaXp7anEBj1EQReHYH78g_VTeQERh7suNirFkHNJZXpq8n6kMqVEOk4PoLWa0m4o8TnFaF8suMSwSxHNAIDDD3Znt0OIemCqaKhcVLcwdbFkfUrh3CgoSKbNZYbdUsksns4qkXmxgp13RjZ4UN63fgcC9ntRoRJbk0YYmVRIGrpc-xeOzaJs%3D)

body:
|

Folks,

We may have defeated a record number of election deniers last November, but the movement to undermine American democracy is far from over:
[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69953521/427815327/1071238054?refcode=em-9.18.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdhMWJhOC01ZTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hRue4VgYyxH774hxYf46eO43T8-wbEbR0tPwDqSR6E8=)**According to a new report, twenty-three election deniers in 17 states serve as either governor, attorney general, or secretary of state.**

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Will you join me on Tuesday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

I’ll be joining Our Revolution’s Live National Town Hall, on Tuesday, September 19, 9:30 pm ET/6:30 pm PT to show my support for Barbara Lee’s historic campaign for U.S. Senate. I won’t be alone, Barbara Lee, Mark Pocan, Ayanna Pressley, and Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison will be there too. Will you join us?

RSVP now, and we’ll send you the link to join the call. [https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_live_townhall_2309/]

https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_live_townhall_2309/ [https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_live_townhall_2309/]

We’re coming together on Tuesday to organize and build a more progressive America—an America that values people over profits, an America that lives up to its democratic ideals—and to hear directly from Barbara Lee about her campaign for the U.S. Senate in California and how we can help.

Throughout her career, Representative Lee has been a progressive leader in the trenches with the people. She's not afraid to take on corporate power and fight for peace and justice, even when she’s stood alone. But she won’t have to stand alone now, as we’re by her side every step of the way!

Click here to sign up now and tune in LIVE for Tuesday’s town hall event. [https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_live_townhall_2309/]

See you Tuesday!

In solidarity,
Ro

subject: I'm running for State Representative!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harbick for Oregon ID 23118
body:
My opponent is Representative Charlie Conrad—the ONLY Republican in the Oregon Legislature to vote with Democrats for House Bill 2002. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/intisarstrategies/091823?e=3362c31595)
---
Peter,
I'm excited to announce that last week I filed to run for State Representative here in House District 12!
My opponent is Representative Charlie Conrad—the ONLY Republican in the Oregon Legislature to vote with Democrats for House Bill 2002. This is the radical new law that takes away the right of parents to know if their minor child has made life-altering decisions.
**We can do far better!**
You know me as a conservative small business owner, husband, parent, and grandparent. I am an Oregonian in every aspect of the word.
So whether you live in District 12 (East Lane County) or are a freedom-loving Oregonian in another part of the state, will you stand with me in my fight to replace Representative Conrad?
[**I need you to please chip in $50, $100, $250, $1,000, or even $2,500 to help us have conservative leadership in Oregon!**](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=9b35a8fe47&e=3362c31595)
You can find out about my campaign at [www.harbickfororegon.com.](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=4b365e086b&e=3362c31595) Please join us!
Thank you,
_Darin_

body:
Democrats want me back on the plantation & back in chains.
They want me back in chains of victimhood

| |

**Friend, **

Democrats want me back on the plantation & back in chains.

They are the party of Jim Crow & the Klu Klux Klan.

It was Joe Biden who delivered eulogies at the funerals of Klansmen.

And they're the ones who put a bounty on me after becoming the first black Lt Governor of North Carolina.

My name is Mark Robinson & I'm now running for Governor.

I'm a free-thinking black man & proud conservative.

I stand proudly for the national anthem & I kneel before nobody but God.

Nothing angers Democrats more than a black man that has freed himself from their welfare plantation & broken the chains of victimhood.

They think black folks like me need to rely on them & their government handouts.

Now that I'm running for Governor, all I need to rely on is my faith in God & help from patriots like you.

**So I 'm humbly asking for your generous support today & if you can do so- please chip in. I promise I will NEVER FORGET IT.**
| [**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=fbd9ba33283b4670a801416c9046e5e8&_e=OHzF6MadddToo909UzxYc6M4tXpZ7iUDJl_zUEkuRzhzcktwjXHR1BqdDdPdyOptruelXRKhqfPoZNw33nU8Zc64RUMpTEI3TpBflp-FDcY9RkmfMogSikS-bxYx186ELZMmkeV7fU41py0imbHK1_pbbkAQRPuEKc5p2J28cQ2qfMMaSewm7ij_4gAqheLOmPvd_Fm6El0qeLQBw3BRe7Hzunrc1X6boT2jNMfMMkMi-2mwczZcOtaIxzFRxPh2ftPoSSLLSGeiKeyRNFHTYOl0s1t2T9EJPhqiDlWRUTuhFfW3T8xA6-TquU2ft4-wwAQhlp-B7SqCjD2qOG6Sybb2UExFs5QhfY_AVYabQYayGTNxdSy5WMJF9d3wTjGw09h0PEpFBsEHK9HlfO9gfie1IagRYBMe_jxgIuKv5K8%3D)
---

God Bless,
Mark Robinson

body:
Our team will submit our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission — and those numbers will be made public.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69954078/427817392/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmI0NzY3NS02MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4ktJE_Sw93rAOd5Y3Y5N7gdP-SAX0CL1dtxEsjHw_U=&emci=1a35d7f9-4556-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=cbb47675-6156-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Hey Peter, it’s Becca. Our critical end-of-quarter deadline is less than two weeks away, and [_**I need your help to reach our $30,000 online goal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69954080/427817395/-582533676?&refcode=E4161-20230918-FECReport-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmI0NzY3NS02MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4ktJE_Sw93rAOd5Y3Y5N7gdP-SAX0CL1dtxEsjHw_U=). After the September 30 deadline, our team will submit our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission — and those numbers will be made public. _Why does this matter?_ Let me explain ↓ Since becoming Vermont’s congresswoman, **I haven’t been afraid to call out MAGA Republicans and their dangerous agenda** — including standing up for trans kids in hearings and introducing resolutions to censure Marjorie Taylor Greene and expel George Santos. **But holding MAGA Republicans accountable comes at a price** , and I’ve become the target of right-wing online attacks. National Republican extremists want to see the progressive agenda we’re fighting so hard for fail in Washington — and they’re already laying the groundwork to try and push us out of Congress. So when our fundraising numbers are made public, it’s critical we’re putting up the strongest possible numbers to show them that we’re here to stay _and_ so we have the resources to compete with them. [_**So Peter, can I count on you to chip in ahead of our critical end-of-quarter deadline to support my re-election campaign and help me keep pushing against MAGA Republicans and their dangerous agenda?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69954081/427817397/-582533676?&refcode=E4161-20230918-FECReport-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmI0NzY3NS02MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4ktJE_Sw93rAOd5Y3Y5N7gdP-SAX0CL1dtxEsjHw_U=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | _**[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69954084/427817399/-582533676?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4161-20230918-FECReport-EG-DeadlineEOQ&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmI0NzY3NS02MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4ktJE_Sw93rAOd5Y3Y5N7gdP-SAX0CL1dtxEsjHw_U=)**_ | _**[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69954086/427817401/-582533676?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4161-20230918-FECReport-EG-DeadlineEOQ&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmI0NzY3NS02MTU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4ktJE_Sw93rAOd5Y3Y5N7gdP-SAX0CL1dtxEsjHw_U=)**_
