clean_body: Our team will submit our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission — and those numbers will be made public. | | Hey Peter, it’s Becca. Our critical end-of-quarter deadline is less than two weeks away, and =. After the September 30 deadline, our team will submit our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission — and those numbers will be made public. Why does this matter? Let me explain ↓ Since becoming Vermont’s congresswoman, I haven’t been afraid to call out MAGA Republicans and their dangerous agenda — including standing up for trans kids in hearings and introducing resolutions to censure Marjorie Taylor Greene and expel George Santos. But holding MAGA Republicans accountable comes at a price , and I’ve become the target of right-wing online attacks. National Republican extremists want to see the progressive agenda we’re fighting so hard for fail in Washington — and they’re already laying the groundwork to try and push us out of Congress. So when our fundraising numbers are made public, it’s critical we’re putting up the strongest possible numbers to show them that we’re here to stay and so we have the resources to compete with them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Becca Balint = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . Dear Friend,
---
Happy Monday! I hope you had a great weekend! Start your week off with some encouragement! We just released another music video from our latest album, _SEND ME. _ I wrote LOUDER in response to the 2020 Covid lockdowns in California, taking inspiration from Daniel, who loudly prayed to God, even when man made laws against it. I hope this song of praise brings you encouragement today! _**WATCH LOUDER LIVE**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=089457d001084e838bad93e32899a307&_e=yPVS0DYqbJYn_tcytXdstx6MraBWu9IYT0cQRMf7idjSxlyqsY07zyi9HfaWOkNSjQ9eZpVSD58frPMf_cdURMTBVLBIrAYZNRBrnC8YIcApUYuh7o2--K7z9_LfwfXBwDvbq4llHm5SRKc8V_8DJ9X8iGeANDLIgDyle10wJ46w525JIx4mUmjVQnlAlDEFmpUSV4y-AjwYdJBrpj6UbT6XiGzzT3gRuk8HfgO4Wh7yytSRbXg0LDit_j8y-G0nijTBh2orUDMbMT9H80I_oelokS2ln0JdGU2MQBFyC0AOM8LugSrZ8iqUzYpyXzSX)
---
_🎶 Sing it louder He is faithful_ _Through the waiting, through the breakthrough
Sing it louder let the roar out
Raise a shout from CALIFORNIA_ _
In His presence there is freedom
It's where anything can happen
Sing it louder till we see You
Aren't you glad, we're gonna see You_ _ __🎶_
---

---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean
---

Hello, = What if we told you that in 2022 – after a recount – Adam lost to Boebert by just 546 votes? What if we told you that it was the closest race in the entire country? What if we told you that after Adam announced he was running again, every political pundit said that Adam absolutely can defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? What if we told you that a brand-new poll shows Adam LEADING Boebert – 50% to 48%? And what if we told you that Adam out-raised Boebert last quarter, but our fundraising has really slowed down this month? We know that $5 might not seem like much against Lauren Boebert’s millions from corporate PACs and special interests. name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: New Lawsuit, Old Nonsense, and Marcus Aurelius
body:
Latest news from True the Vote
| | | September 18, 2023 | [Read Online](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/7lGnFEBV30RHklOg_mstw6N_-cQbeN93UNyrRA0hq13It-975cgCl68sgRladm0R9GcD0rh9fzTJsbYTBYBVzQ9wuNeUYLHbFEEw_MVsDOL8xt6QH-YzcqMlxCzXKf70QRg56aEP09IgxFlBr4IV1Cb2TTXjJfSUqOwLMTzbH2wqwe6lHBox4nXZXNwPuWeIwCtqQEiOJ_ah_spi54mcttTuDQy2F4ameLJjdm_hFtJH4RT-HwHuVHZJOYX4BU4Hc6U1in5vRZPO4qpo8eHGxG4uG85EqZD-pudCBZb5Wx8V6wP6woMncoW9_Npc3rLS8gwyd0exxOv2akcUlQmmWKd5-fVyxsZYbPW_Wx4BmId4eZR_qk-d-5UJlbb4GgvDhml_aszCRiTo1MNb8AL6y2saO8joLQG_XXtPmmSqNP2paIvO_nhqRiVuJuq1BnDD4jkx2Fv4pKN_RupQvWLF3ehQHXRqBg3R0VS7ryEWAicJfC-BUrshzvBiB8WjvQBZ7H-NmnL8UOiGaB4R2JEE-kWd9Z4w_tJxKD43wc9TiJOPc6PgymnkC_b91gDuzpmEpbQF6TXjPdqY18QLEt-WyLqhzwHh4BGLnlLqrPLUOLQ/3zp/l7GF7QPzShCqSdJWEH3PZg/h0/NxCiaMcmhRxvtOyxUP626kdgSMh5Q9eVgIU5S0Jv_mg)

| | | |
---
Hi Friend -
I will start this week’s update the same as the last, with a heartfelt thank you. The hits just keep on coming. Thank you for your stalwart support.
Here’s the latest... the China based, CCP-backed, provider of U.S. election software, [Konnech, has just filed a lawsuit](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/4xkviejVe2bcNHdbmWFEFjPX0fFOinE89109lxHipseJljcn00fdDpYIPNfzUoTJqdGyeapXC6fZDX7YD-DRH0khZKMUtIn3FMnrQ9q9GXIkbqA6ucHpXU9hrW9861z-EtpwbP1Hv9oyfFY1tq6wHT1dU53R1NakIrnepm3FaDIVqFKQJfLwVxukqC11uhD8Iqg9PO7vuFbkWd1ddlb1vZ7PN40rsq8E-1xhWcnMpn1x3PfzEDh2nMOiZAgFWQmS/3zp/l7GF7QPzShCqSdJWEH3PZg/h1/seF3D-BGqHeLQs2oObEwdtg_mllunou3Z8S4sYWPVG4) against the Los Angeles District Attorney claiming that D.A. George Gascon “relied too heavily” on True the Vote in their Grand Jury’s determination to indict Konnech CEO Eugene Yu. Though True the Vote isn’t named in the suit, its pages read like a bad tabloid hit aimed squarely at us. Why would they do that, you ask? They want us silenced.
A similar silencing campaign is happening in Georgia. Yesterday I learned that even in certain circles on the Right, the propaganda against True the Vote has worked. They’ve bought the nonsense sold to them by angry elected officials and a journalist who tried to cover up their deficiencies by claiming we were unwilling to provide evidence in support our complaints of ballot box exploitation. This is false. [Here is our response to the lawsuit filed against us by the state of Georgia. ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/4xkviejVe2bcNHdbmWFEFjdsCSM5p0frr0_hrog3pPSGOsQQskOMaPaXSqSHe_PjWq7k8CjlA3I1jFAc7W4fg99ptv7SsM1YaRyLh23wW11yBuf123bFRSWhlw0DCF-8oK2nAE6VGBfGVv-r3PLKhgCzMKlM4n-fNmmcqJFk4fkRIctMNvS7UA6Nwgd52NhuVxjs0_NA5pjOmgSOX5kCGEWOqQs2QeZHgc4o0TmsiRlR06j8tmo6GUO6JC7QOGfn/3zp/l7GF7QPzShCqSdJWEH3PZg/h2/cC-gNAdbK4NefPu3WgQL7Dz2y13urAQZaMvNtPQgZ_k)[Here is a more complete look at True the Vote’s timeline in Georgia](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/1A5_Z39fk90fowLbTa71pyombvBGbxLBANUunhG-bdfoNkCWsuGm0sgbdjIse-pp0JRCQsNPZyDW2yTgPHCdR_3svhvBZ-Da3KhOQ3BXfSZch-livFLwA6s4opwX3ke9cFy68iCATM8MIPvI41Athcf4AM3FaKIdvPst3hr3P2D8A42_8R9guFEvzZZ9HnCnPujggoz_bEvrjYwjvVGkzA/3zp/l7GF7QPzShCqSdJWEH3PZg/h3/hYR8_X97KSqRf7fFMSi1MRHvwONFV595Pm9dRflXLzA).
Despite protestations from apparatchiks on both sides of the aisle, what we have said about Konnech’s connections with the Chinese Communist Party; about the exploitation of ballot dropboxes as featured in the movie ‘2000 Mules’; about the intentional brokenness of our electoral process - is all true.
And, because it is true, we will not only survive this gauntlet, we thrive because of it.
In the year 170, considering the battlefield before him, Marcus Aurelius wisely wrote, _“Our actions may be impeded ... but there can be no impeding our intentions or dispositions. Because we can accommodate and adapt. The mind adapts and converts to its own purposes the obstacle to our acting. The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.”_
We see clearly what we are up against - what the American people are up against. It is more than a uniparty, it is more than political, it is a darkness that threatens freedom on all fronts.
You are the light. Your actions, your voice. Our voices together. This is how we win. We can save our country by working together. It will not be easy. The darkness will continue to put up obstacles... but notice what is happening - more citizens, from more diverse backgrounds, who may have never come together before, are coming together now. Patriots showing up for duty. It’s a miracle happening right before our eyes.
So to our enemies, thank you for the obstacles. We are stronger and more focused because of them.
And we’re going on offense. True the Vote is within a few weeks of rolling out new initiatives for you to engage in. Local actions that will lead to national impact. I’ve never been more excited about the opportunities. I’ll talk in greater detail about all of the above on tonight’s podcast. [Please join us if you can.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HZ3JHW2d17DFn3FABtrwp5TPEhnr_tnVDppMwVLzMzXQ8MzvldM67IVm_ybaWe0DhKrWfghMqKXmStTENVjFJYqidEnliczMr7yhzKf6SYChd4e12Sw6mqphxbyx5fUnejkWkZnT8PUccl-EuVz72cGMqB1DBzpcpMeVvluFxL4gS8sR9cehX0zh8fM454opcmk4mxIYYsmRY6vAA2s3dXw-7SOYnRt3GGoXEz6Es3P4aZubXHiTQGo1ZxjGYctbEA/3zp/l7GF7QPzShCqSdJWEH3PZg/h4/w0-8OOP7ApS4q41lvK1uhJzE7mUVAHxDonAyap6vDrY)
| [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HZ3JHW2d17DFn3FABtrwp5TPEhnr_tnVDppMwVLzMzXQ8MzvldM67IVm_ybaWe0DhKrWfghMqKXmStTENVjFJYqidEnliczMr7yhzKf6SYChd4e12Sw6mqphxbyx5fUnejkWkZnT8PUccl-EuVz72cGMqB1DBzpcpMeVvluFxL4gS8sR9cehX0zh8fM454opcmk4mxIYYsmRY6vAA2s3dXw-7SOYnRt3GGoXEz6Es3P4aZubXHiTQGo1ZxjGYctbEA/3zp/l7GF7QPzShCqSdJWEH3PZg/h5/dnLxlB67tqsw0KS32Ieoz2ddfPpthZU3mrK2uhR8o4s)
---
Keep the faith. Never quit.
Ever onward-

Though True the Vote isn’t named in the suit, its pages read like a bad tabloid hit aimed squarely at us. Why would they do that, you ask? They want us silenced. A similar silencing campaign is happening in Georgia. Yesterday I learned that even in certain circles on the Right, the propaganda against True the Vote has worked. They’ve bought the nonsense sold to them by angry elected officials and a journalist who tried to cover up their deficiencies by claiming we were unwilling to provide evidence in support our complaints of ballot box exploitation. This is false. . Despite protestations from apparatchiks on both sides of the aisle, what we have said about Konnech’s connections with the Chinese Communist Party; about the exploitation of ballot dropboxes as featured in the movie ‘2000 Mules’; about the intentional brokenness of our electoral process - is all true. And, because it is true, we will not only survive this gauntlet, we thrive because of it. In the year 170, considering the battlefield before him, Marcus Aurelius wisely wrote, “Our actions may be impeded ... but there can be no impeding our intentions or dispositions. Because we can accommodate and adapt. The mind adapts and converts to its own purposes the obstacle to our acting. The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.” We see clearly what we are up against - what the American people are up against. It is more than a uniparty, it is more than political, it is a darkness that threatens freedom on all fronts. You are the light. Your actions, your voice. Our voices together. This is how we win. We can save our country by working together. It will not be easy. The darkness will continue to put up obstacles... but notice what is happening - more citizens, from more diverse backgrounds, who may have never come together before, are coming together now. Patriots showing up for duty. It’s a miracle happening right before our eyes. So to our enemies, thank you for the obstacles. We are stronger and more focused because of them. And we’re going on offense. True the Vote is within a few weeks of rolling out new initiatives for you to engage in. Local actions that will lead to national impact. I’ve never been more excited about the opportunities. I’ll talk in greater detail about all of the above on tonight’s podcast. | Keep the faith. Never quit. Ever onward- | PS - | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) True the Vote PO Box 3109 #19128 Houston, Texas 77253-3109, United States of America

**Here’s everything you need to know about the latest developments in our fight to protect Social Security:**
**_FIRST_** , during a heated exchange with President Biden during his State of the Union address, Republicans asserted that they would _not, _under any circumstances, touch Social Security.

**_THEN_** , only a handful of months later, Republicans have re-upped their attacks on this critical program.

**_NOW_** , I’m calling on 5,000 fearless fighters to join me in urging Congress to stay true to their word and PROTECT Social Security.
**I’ll be honest, Peter: I’ve seen Republican lawmakers go back on their word dozens of times. **But with nearly 3.7 MILLION New Yorkers currently depending on Social Security benefits, we CANNOT let them go back on their word again.

**This isn’t about politics; this is about real people who could fall into poverty if Republicans gut Social Security. So I have to ask: [Will you sign my petition now to urge Congress to protect Social Security? I need to collect 5,000 signatures before 11:59 p.m. tonight. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69954629/427819164/-522013986?ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1187-su-nd&refcode=jtk1187-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGQyNzhhZC02MzU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OpfXlX1QEmT1NY1hFZR5NgO_y5Hkprw-VgtOoYBh-V0=&emci=a6fd0d43-ee53-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=20d278ad-6356-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**

| | **The stakes could not be higher in 2024.** Our democracy faces a grave threat from MAGA Republicans who are determined to reverse the progress we've made together. If they win control of the Senate, we can expect nothing less than a relentless assault on the values and principles we hold dear. [**That's why I started Blue Wave Project, a PAC to save the Democratic Senate Majority, and it's why I'm asking you to pitch in $3 or whatever you can today to help us get it done.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69954697/427819628/-641752998?refcode=2023-09-18-bwp&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=785ad33b-6456-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODVhZDMzYi02NDU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSg2_PskHeFPagGHOd7k_moQ-YXl3xQPtzvylpwxkTY=) **[SAVE THE SENATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69954698/427819630/-641752998?refcode=2023-09-18-bwp&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=785ad33b-6456-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODVhZDMzYi02NDU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSg2_PskHeFPagGHOd7k_moQ-YXl3xQPtzvylpwxkTY=)** The consequences of losing the Senate majority are far-reaching:
1. MAGA Republicans have made it clear that they will stop at nothing to roll back the progress we've made on issues like healthcare, climate change, and economic justice. They will dismantle the Affordable Care Act, leaving millions without access to healthcare, and they will continue to strip away our hard-won right to access safe abortions and the full range of reproductive care.

2. We've already seen efforts across the country to restrict voting rights. With a Republican Senate, these efforts will only intensify, eroding the very foundation of our democracy.

3. Our fight against climate change is at a critical juncture. We need a Senate majority committed to immediate, bold action and the transition to a clean energy economy. MAGA Republicans, backed by powerful special interests, will obstruct every effort to combat the climate crisis.

4. The composition of our federal courts hangs in the balance. A Republican Senate will reject every one of President Biden's court nominees, dismantling and corrupting equal justice under the law. And they will torture Biden's executive branch nominees into doing all they can to paralyze his presidency.

We cannot let this happen. With the Blue Wave Project, we're working tirelessly to support Democratic candidates who will fight for our values, protect our democracy, and ensure that we continue to make progress. [**Join me in the fight to save our Senate majority by making a contribution now. clean_body: The stakes could not be higher in 2024. | | | | The stakes could not be higher in 2024. Our democracy faces a grave threat from MAGA Republicans who are determined to reverse the progress we've made together. If they win control of the Senate, we can expect nothing less than a relentless assault on the values and principles we hold dear. = = The consequences of losing the Senate majority are far-reaching: 1. MAGA Republicans have made it clear that they will stop at nothing to roll back the progress we've made on issues like healthcare, climate change, and economic justice. They will dismantle the Affordable Care Act, leaving millions without access to healthcare, and they will continue to strip away our hard-won right to access safe abortions and the full range of reproductive care. 2. We've already seen efforts across the country to restrict voting rights. With a Republican Senate, these efforts will only intensify, eroding the very foundation of our democracy. 3. Our fight against climate change is at a critical juncture. We need a Senate majority committed to immediate, bold action and the transition to a clean energy economy. MAGA Republicans, backed by powerful special interests, will obstruct every effort to combat the climate crisis. 4. The composition of our federal courts hangs in the balance. A Republican Senate will reject every one of President Biden's court nominees, dismantling and corrupting equal justice under the law. And they will torture Biden's executive branch nominees into doing all they can to paralyze his presidency. We cannot let this happen. With the Blue Wave Project, we're working tirelessly to support Democratic candidates who will fight for our values, protect our democracy, and ensure that we continue to make progress. = Onward! ---|---|---

| | **National Public Lands Day is this Saturday, Friend! Whether you are a mountain hiker or enjoy being outdoors, celebrate by defending our public lands.[Act Now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1993631?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** From the snowy-white ice caps and glistening glaciers of the Arctic to low-vast canyons wrapped by river valleys in the west of the United States, we can’t help but to bask in the beauty of Earth’s diversity. You may spot from afar a mama grizzly bear tending to her cubs in the forest or maybe you like to trek along mountain trails as colorful butterflies flutter through the open air -- _there are so many natural wonders to explore!_ The various ecosystems and cycles of nature are all important to sustain plants, wildlife, and people. Our Earth is a beautiful place, _**but it’s all in jeopardy of being demolished for a dollar sign.**_ Friend, this is **SERIOUS.** Our precious public lands are being sold off to the highest bidder for oil drilling and fracking, and what is left is threatened by climate change. Big Oil and Big Polluters are lining their pockets to **exploit** sacred lands, **destroy** natural resources and **displace** both people and animals from homes and habitats. Oil drilling and fracking comes with pollution, destruction, and **more pollution.** Drilling sites contaminate nearby drinking water with **radioactive waste** , **spew harmful emissions** into the air we breathe and can _**INDUCE**_ earthquakes and floods. Nearly one quarter of U.S. climate pollution comes from fossil fuel extraction on public lands. Our planet can no longer endure the destruction and degradation caused by corporate greed. We are experiencing the impacts today -- from _cross country wildfire smoke to record-breaking heat._ And it can only get **worse** if it all continues. **President Biden is reviewing new oil and gas rules RIGHT NOW!** **[That’s why we are calling on environmentalists like YOU to demand protection of our land, climate, and the wildlife that depend on both. Can we count on you Friend? Act Now!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1993632?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1993633?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Public lands are more than just places to explore, Friend. Many sites that are up for sale are home to Indigenous people who rely on the land to sustain their families and communities. Pollutants found in the drinking water, food, and air are linked to _serious health concerns_. The loud screeching from industrial-sized machinery produces **intolerable noise pollution** , causing blistering headaches. And the same oil and gas industry that is turning public lands into deserted areas of toxic waste is also using them to throttle up the climate crisis.
**Protecting public lands is protecting the future of this planet. Hurry -- the comment period is CLOSING SOON!** **[Sign the petition NOW to demand President Biden save people, wildlife, and the planet from fossil fuel destruction and the climate crisis.>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1993634?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1993633?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for protecting people, wildlife, and the planet.
Friends of the Earth**
|

---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7ca0b7b5-e5b0-4d81-a145-c5a872de385c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I'm taking a break from a whirlwind five weeks that had me speak with thousands of people on multiple continents from a variety of industries. I spoke with [insurance leaders in Colombia](https://substack.com/redirect/ab0fb35f-68d9-4ccb-afbe-20a4b60d6832?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), transportation workers in Asia, [investment professionals in Australia](https://substack.com/redirect/9e01bc53-1dda-4d67-b0b7-79b1f9a95c1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), banking and financial experts in Canada, [cement executives in Panama](https://substack.com/redirect/73f7d928-5e7b-4db4-902d-ffffb372c840?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [food and agriculture entrepreneurs](https://substack.com/redirect/1800d79a-afc2-40ef-94a6-f17a11c0a288?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the United States. I also met with senior government officials, think tank scholars, journalists, academics, and students. I gave keynote speeches, briefed executives and boards, and led dozens of small group conversations across a wide range of industries.
While my engagements were all organized under a generic theme of "Navigating Uncertainty," I focused my comments on the global economy, geopolitics, and how [disruptive developments in technology, energy, and demographics were likely to impact inflationary pressures plaguing the world today](https://substack.com/redirect/bf660034-dc94-416b-b0e2-b4305a06fe58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And of course, I spent a fair amount of time discussing what I believe to be perhaps the most important issue facing the world today, [the rapidly escalating US-China War](https://substack.com/redirect/eaeddaa7-ea9b-4319-a38a-d2d43d2113df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as well as its implications for [global multilateralism](https://substack.com/redirect/8f2d441b-98c0-4754-b316-f4367dd5f19a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [agriculture markets](https://substack.com/redirect/dfd23978-ff46-45c9-88ba-1cbb77c9006b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [rising labor unrest](https://substack.com/redirect/b863944b-4808-45dc-a4a0-0762fd2c9891?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..j-csT5QXL8oLlNPYW90wKoWLLcJBrP9iTiOJrA4j-lo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137135388)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/df147221-1538-4021-894a-0e10fc582928?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Solving the world's problems over ceviche in Cartagena, Colombia; August 2023.
I found the reactions to my ideas quite interesting. In some cases, I was [intentionally provocative in a quest to stir up some unconventional thinking](https://substack.com/redirect/3aef6c6c-1832-48ef-a549-422f2f0ae4aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and while most audiences found my comments thought-provoking, not everyone was convinced by my take on what was happening in our world today. I always take the time to listen to those who disagree with me and find disagreements usually spur better thinking. Here are three of the most forceful arguments made against my analysis:
* **The US is destabilizing the world**. America was adamant that the USSR not be present in Cuba or near the United States (remember the Monroe Doctrine?); yet America maintains bases along China's border, and uses NATO to encircle Russia.
* **China is not a threat**. It's an economic house of cards that seems to collapsing; youth unemployment, ballooning debt, and slowing growth mean Beijing has seen its best days; the Chinese Communist Party must focus internally.
* **Inflation is here to stay**. Everywhere you look, you see inflation. Food, energy, and labor markets are all supply constrained and driving higher prices. The risk of deflation is miniscule.

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..j-csT5QXL8oLlNPYW90wKoWLLcJBrP9iTiOJrA4j-lo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137135388)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0027ba7b-8c57-43da-8253-b5ef8a5a02f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Enjoying a beverage with Australian portfolio managers after debating asset allocation strategies in the face of the rapidly escalating US-China War, Sydney, Australia; August 2023.
I also sought to understand local perspectives on global issues. I took diligent notes after each event, scribbling down the topics that resonated and the types of questions asked. While I fully appreciate that I was definitely not talking with a cross-section of society and the people I met were disproportionately educated and wealthy, I nevertheless found the questions asked of me insightful, and three topics seemed to come up over and over again:
* **What 's going on with American politics?** Democracy seems to be unraveling. What is driving US polarization to such extremes? What do you think will happen with the 2024 Presidential election? Will American democracy survive?
* **Are we going to have a recession?** Won't housing markets fall as the full impact of higher interest rates flow through the system? Won't companies begin to lay off employees as profits fall? Will oil crash as climate change efforts ramp up?
* **Will the expansion of the BRICS group matter?** Is this a symptom of the bifurcating global economy or the early stages of a new monetary union being formed? How will it impact the US dollar? Should we buy bitcoin to hedge?

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..j-csT5QXL8oLlNPYW90wKoWLLcJBrP9iTiOJrA4j-lo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137135388)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/21945f6d-9a8c-4841-85eb-6b10fcd41fe6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Watching a car-carrying ship transit the Miraflores Locks of the Panama Canal, September 2023.
Given the hours and hours I've had on planes over the past few weeks, I've had plenty of time to think about what I've heard and observed. I've also paid attention to the topics that weren't raised as much as I had expected, or issues I addressed but were met with apathy or indifference. Here are some high-level reflections that are leading me to ask more questions:
* There is a strong consensus among those I met that **China is going to militarily engage** **Taiwan** in the next five years. This concerns me as surprise and deception are two hallmarks of Chinese military strategy. _Could this be a diversionary tactic as Beijing plots another course? Might Japan, Korea, the Philippines, or Australia be a potential target of CCP expansionism?_
* I've been struck by how dismissive most investors have been about **the restart of student loan payments**. Student loan balances are larger than credit card debt, and the _[Wall Street Journal](https://substack.com/redirect/ce016bd3-9640-4713-b591-7388e6f5f6b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ estimates that servicing the debt (which is scheduled to restart on October 1) will pull $100 billion out of consumer pockets](https://substack.com/redirect/ce016bd3-9640-4713-b591-7388e6f5f6b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). _Could student debt repayment generates a recession and/or financial correction?_
* Concerns over the **US Dollar as the global reserve currency** are widespread, but when I ask audiences if they'd deploy capital into another currency, they almost universally say no. _If there is no genuine alternative to the US Dollar, are worries about its future status overblown?_ _What are the scenarios under which the world loses faith in the US Dollar?_
* The **risks emerging from artificial intelligence (AI)** seem to be getting disproportionate attention; everyone seems concerned about the downside from adopting AI. _Could the opportunities being created by rapid advancements in AI be greater than any of us is expecting? Might AI generate advancements in healthcare and medicine comparable to what the Internet did for communication?_

While it's impossible to know what the future will hold, thinking about the possibilities that may transpire can help all of us navigate through the inevitable uncertainty. The almost 45,000 miles I've traveled in the past few weeks (equivalent to almost two trips around the planet!) have given me the thinking space to contemplate new scenarios and potential developments that can impact our world. In the weeks and months ahead, I plan to dive deeper into several of the topics raised above (as well as others that now have my attention...), so please stay tuned!

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..j-csT5QXL8oLlNPYW90wKoWLLcJBrP9iTiOJrA4j-lo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137135388)
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=137135388&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3MTM1Mzg4LCJpYXQiOjE2OTUwNzA4ODksImV4cCI6MTY5NzY2Mjg4OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IdYvprsjcOlwi0VQhGvESVTtpEoealj_10NIBL7My6Q&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments)

About [Vikram Mansharamani](https://open.substack.com/users/37278065-vikram-mansharamani?utm_source=mentions)
Dr. Mansharamani is a global generalist who tries to look beyond the short term view that tends to dominate today's agenda. He spends his time speaking with leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism...and prides himself on voraciously consuming a wide variety of books, magazines, articles, TV shows, and podcasts. _LinkedIn_ twice listed him as their #1 Top Voice for Global Economics and _Worth_ profiled him on their list of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. He has taught at Yale and Harvard and has a PhD and two masters degrees from MIT. He is also the author of _[THINK FOR YOURSELF: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/5c4b8ab8-6db9-4c41-ad57-a7d6179d859a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ as well as _[BOOMBUSTOLOGY: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/51e60433-1c37-48c8-bf2a-f0326f32fc11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. Follow him on [Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/0f56bbe0-6a5f-4e84-ba38-a87e7e104cbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [LinkedIn](https://substack.com/redirect/c4935d04-4088-46a4-a254-da4261eefb97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

clean_body: Lessons learned during recent globetrotting | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Lessons learned during recent globetrotting | | | Sep 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- I'm taking a break from a whirlwind five weeks that had me speak with thousands of people on multiple continents from a variety of industries. I spoke with , transportation workers in Asia, , banking and financial experts in Canada, , and in the United States. I also met with senior government officials, think tank scholars, journalists, academics, and students. I gave keynote speeches, briefed executives and boards, and led dozens of small group conversations across a wide range of industries. While my engagements were all organized under a generic theme of "Navigating Uncertainty," I focused my comments on the global economy, geopolitics, and how . And of course, I spent a fair amount of time discussing what I believe to be perhaps the most important issue facing the world today, , as well as its implications for , , and . | | ---|---|--- Solving the world's problems over ceviche in Cartagena, Colombia; August 2023. I found the reactions to my ideas quite interesting. In some cases, I was , and while most audiences found my comments thought-provoking, not everyone was convinced by my take on what was happening in our world today. I always take the time to listen to those who disagree with me and find disagreements usually spur better thinking. Here are three of the most forceful arguments made against my analysis: The US is destabilizing the world. America was adamant that the USSR not be present in Cuba or near the United States (remember the Monroe Doctrine?); yet America maintains bases along China's border, and uses NATO to encircle Russia. China is not a threat. It's an economic house of cards that seems to collapsing; youth unemployment, ballooning debt, and slowing growth mean Beijing has seen its best days; the Chinese Communist Party must focus internally. Inflation is here to stay. Everywhere you look, you see inflation. Food, energy, and labor markets are all supply constrained and driving higher prices. The risk of deflation is miniscule. | | ---|---|--- Enjoying a beverage with Australian portfolio managers after debating asset allocation strategies in the face of the rapidly escalating US-China War, Sydney, Australia; August 2023. I also sought to understand local perspectives on global issues. I took diligent notes after each event, scribbling down the topics that resonated and the types of questions asked. While I fully appreciate that I was definitely not talking with a cross-section of society and the people I met were disproportionately educated and wealthy, I nevertheless found the questions asked of me insightful, and three topics seemed to come up over and over again: What 's going on with American politics? Democracy seems to be unraveling. What is driving US polarization to such extremes? What do you think will happen with the 2024 Presidential election? Will American democracy survive? Are we going to have a recession? Won't housing markets fall as the full impact of higher interest rates flow through the system? Won't companies begin to lay off employees as profits fall? Will oil crash as climate change efforts ramp up? Will the expansion of the BRICS group matter? Is this a symptom of the bifurcating global economy or the early stages of a new monetary union being formed? How will it impact the US dollar? Should we buy bitcoin to hedge? | | ---|---|--- Watching a car-carrying ship transit the Miraflores Locks of the Panama Canal, September 2023. Given the hours and hours I've had on planes over the past few weeks, I've had plenty of time to think about what I've heard and observed. I've also paid attention to the topics that weren't raised as much as I had expected, or issues I addressed but were met with apathy or indifference. Here are some high-level reflections that are leading me to ask more questions: There is a strong consensus among those I met that China is going to militarily engage Taiwan in the next five years. This concerns me as surprise and deception are two hallmarks of Chinese military strategy. Could this be a diversionary tactic as Beijing plots another course? Might Japan, Korea, the Philippines, or Australia be a potential target of CCP expansionism? I've been struck by how dismissive most investors have been about the restart of student loan payments. Student loan balances are larger than credit card debt, and the . Could student debt repayment generates a recession and/or financial correction? Concerns over the US Dollar as the global reserve currency are widespread, but when I ask audiences if they'd deploy capital into another currency, they almost universally say no. If there is no genuine alternative to the US Dollar, are worries about its future status overblown? What are the scenarios under which the world loses faith in the US Dollar? The risks emerging from artificial intelligence (AI) seem to be getting disproportionate attention; everyone seems concerned about the downside from adopting AI. Could the opportunities being created by rapid advancements in AI be greater than any of us is expecting? Might AI generate advancements in healthcare and medicine comparable to what the Internet did for communication? While it's impossible to know what the future will hold, thinking about the possibilities that may transpire can help all of us navigate through the inevitable uncertainty. The almost 45,000 miles I've traveled in the past few weeks (equivalent to almost two trips around the planet!) have given me the thinking space to contemplate new scenarios and potential developments that can impact our world. In the weeks and months ahead, I plan to dive deeper into several of the topics raised above (as well as others that now have my attention...), so please stay tuned! About Dr. Mansharamani is a global generalist who tries to look beyond the short term view that tends to dominate today's agenda. He spends his time speaking with leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism...and prides himself on voraciously consuming a wide variety of books, magazines, articles, TV shows, and podcasts. LinkedIn twice listed him as their #1 Top Voice for Global Economics and Worth profiled him on their list of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. He has taught at Yale and Harvard and has a PhD and two masters degrees from MIT. He is also the author of as well as . Follow him on or . name: =?utf-8?Q?Mackinac=20Republican=20Leadership=20Conference?=
subject: NEW SPEAKERS’ ANNOUNCEMENT - State Rep Neil Friske!!
body:
Announcing State Neil Friske for the Mackinac Leadership Conference. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
Michigan State Rep Neil Friske is confirmed to speak at the Mackinac Leadership Conference.
The **NEW MIGOP** , led by the **CONSTITUTIONALISTS ,** is committed to making this conference the best one yet. Dr. Thurston and Leah Southwell join an already impressive lineup of speakers, which includes JIM CAVIEZEL, KARI LAKE, VIVEK RAMASWAMY, DINESH D’SOUZA, ZUBY, ALEX NEWMAN, and TAMARA SCOTT.
We are confident that the upcoming Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference will be the most diverse and unforgettable one ever.
Neil Friske, born in Petoskey and raised near Charlevoix on the family farm, Friske Orchards, is a respected life-long resident of Northern Michigan. He graduated from Ellsworth High School and spent two-thirds of his life working on and running the family farm. For over a decade, Neil and his brother, Richard Jr., were second-generation partners in the family operation.
Currently, Neil owns and operates Friske & Sons Property Management in Charlevoix. When he’s not hard at work, he spends as much time as possible with his family. He has four grown sons and is a delighted Opa of three beautiful grandchildren.
Friske heartily enjoys serving and being a part of his community. Friske has made church and faith a priority in his and his family’s lives: he served on a church board and led music in church. To this day, Neil constantly and willingly gives his insight, time, and energy to his community, his church, and his fellow farmers and local business owners.
In tune with his values and stances on state and federal policies, Friske is a life-long member of the National Rifle Association (NRA), a life-long member of Michigan United Conservation Clubs (MUCC), a member of Right to Life, and a member of Farm Bureau. Always, Neil will go out of his way to preserve the Second Amendment, fight for and defend the lives of the unborn, protect and educate on conserving and valuing our natural resources, and support the often-unheard needs and concerns of farmers and small businesses. Neil Friske wants to help take back our lost freedoms, defend liberties that are being torn down, and preserve our rightful and valued heritages.
For additional details about our Mackinac Island Conference, please [click here](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=2b5930c183&e=a2af77507c).
**We cannot wait to see you at this historic conference.**
| [PURCHASE HOTEL AND CONFERENCE TICKETS HERE](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=7bd77e3376&e=a2af77507c)
---
### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.
| [DONATE NOW](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=4b3efab792&e=a2af77507c)

subject: Famous Gereghty Family Chocolate Chip Cookie Recipe!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIZ FOR NY
body:
Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom who is running for Congress in New York's 17th congressional district. Hello Peter,

Now that school is back in session, and so many of us welcome ravenous monsters home from the bus, I have been thinking about cookies. Cookies and milk after school – for mine that’s always a heck yes! Chocolate chip cookies in particular are a Gereghty family favorite, and my husband Jim has perfected the recipe.

We know that at this time of year, we are all inundated with events and commitments, back-to-school night, sports, homework, and all of the other demands of our jobs, family, and community. While I think getting together in person is best, sometimes it’s just too hard to make it work. So taking a page from some clever PTO leadership, we decided to have a no-event fundraiser. That’s why I want to share a bit of my family with you. Each person who donates more than $48 through **[this link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69955646/427822842/-1756596824?refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230918_FR_NoEventFundraiser_0_CST_Liz_na_na_na&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMyN2Y2ZTctNjY1Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kFi2Vj5kHPDXrXE9L9Y3w2lFeB8ghnn9OFOXofM_UkE=)** will receive Jim’s Extraordinary Chocolate Chip Cookie Recipe! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69955648/427822844/-1756596824?refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230918_FR_NoEventFundraiser_0_CST_Liz_na_na_na&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMyN2Y2ZTctNjY1Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kFi2Vj5kHPDXrXE9L9Y3w2lFeB8ghnn9OFOXofM_UkE=)
“Best f***ing cookies I’ve ever had” - Neighbor For 20 years, I have called NY-17 home and worked hard as a mother, small business owner, and member of the Katonah-Lewisboro School Board. We need members in Congress who have invested in their communities and want to continue doing that at a federal level. Can you help me become the Congresswoman for NY-17 and take back the House for the Democrats? Check out my campaign website here: **[https://www.lizforny.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69955650/427822846/1221763811?refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230918_FR_NoEventFundraiser_0_CST_Liz_na_na_na&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMyN2Y2ZTctNjY1Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kFi2Vj5kHPDXrXE9L9Y3w2lFeB8ghnn9OFOXofM_UkE=&emci=4066bafd-2856-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=b327f6e7-6656-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=14515669)**

It’s always better to be in person, but if we can’t have that, at least we can have some cookies.

:)
Liz

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy.

I’m a former Navy SEAL and small business owner, not a politician, and _**I’m learning that in politics, things tend to happen all at once or not at all**_.

Coming off a busy summer, things have quieted down a bit for us here in Montana. I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself to you. **[I’m linking a 65-second video to the image below that I’m hoping you’ll watch today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=572c6326cf784fc9aeead56e7782ae67&_e=-oUqc7Er6y4R7WYbGk3j1-RPBQu_PknoVZna8MIJ48osn4F6BF3vDNc7tfZoySpAcGV_5p5NokOZiUQGcnHn4tdIyoGTq48B-DtWj406Q3FwKWCA568FCSj3sOCCUeYIKtLo5RvjgiqEaREQVuw2nQFO1qPmbJrk2mtC7A8ED1OAoFZt6aFojFlW7VC_KQTk2M9lCrJo-xaGKrd7SlZiKeVysI_uCAripe1Eq2_ooqSFUcAnXhBDDMGP91prSGvX6IibrHWmaLi9oQBRKD6-Ta_tF3U8Y0Gh8Hp8wrxY3AxPXwaYVE5Hh_qEXRHpDvXoTLLsORMHv5Da7oWkWpXPYhJHj7LiF6qUT9hhua4Fhq5QgQ3-igI7P75-VRdWzkUNhCXv8CvUeeESPxhLfVuPrrMNupTVI0wA4cWberA3Ck4%3D)**

name: WisDems
subject: Democracy’s last stand.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
We’re in one of the fights of our lives and we need your help.
#
We asked The Long Run if we could reach out again. Here’s why:
**Republicans _still_ want to impeach, convict, and remove newly-elected Justice Janet Protasiewicz from the Wisconsin Supreme Court.**
That’s it, that’s the story.
We’ve been working desperately around the clock to protect the will of Wisconsin voters but Republicans will only back down if Wisconsinites mobilize: [**will you chip in a $5 split donation between WisDems and The Long Run to help us win this fight? >>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230918-1-t45&t=1&akid=4853%2E196590%2EvvETdk)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230918-1-t45&t=2&akid=4853%2E196590%2EvvETdk)
If Republicans successfully remove Justice Protasiewicz, Wisconsin would face another Supreme Court election next year, on the same day as the crowded GOP primary, which could revert the court to a conservative majority.
**_This is democracy’s last stand._**
In 2020, Wisconsin came the closest of any state to overturning presidential election results. A single vote on the Court stopped Republicans from overturning President Biden’s victory in Wisconsin.
In 2024, Republicans could try again — and without Justice Protasiewicz on the bench, their next effort to thwart democracy could be successful.
[**That’s why we need every single one of our supporters to take action — will you split a $5 donation between WisDems and The Long Run to help us in this final chance to protect democracy? >>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230918-1-t45&t=3&akid=4853%2E196590%2EvvETdk)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230918-1-t45&t=4&akid=4853%2E196590%2EvvETdk)
In solidarity,
_WisDems_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=4853%2E196590%2EvvETdk). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4853%2E196590%2EvvETdk)

Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=4853%2E196590%2EvvETdk)

Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Mark Mullet
subject: Education is key
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | I know that education is the key to a brighter future. I’m probably most proud of my work on the Senate Education committee because this issue is personal to me. Solid public education was my ladder out of poverty growing up. And with six kids going through public schools in our state, it’s still important to me today.

Over the years, I’ve worked with Washington teachers and administrators to create the “College in the High School” program, allowing high school students to earn credits toward a college degree right from their classrooms and teachers.

Last session in the State Senate, I sponsored legislation that finally eliminated the program's fees for ALL students, removing economic barriers and helping more students realize they have the potential to be successful in post-secondary education. It wasn’t right to me that students who did the same work weren’t receiving the same benefits, solely because they couldn’t afford the fees. So we fixed it.

[Sign on if you agree that education should be accessible and affordable for everyone.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69956106/427824492/844695876?contactdata=fWx2RHurwgwYFAZlX9servORInkAKGK5yyPDQrzhhBJiVIlmv5r+oESU41+PSVnHMGcWuvFiZroTOgf8bY52y/rWQlFFRUT4SP1jT1O1NpFTeu3f9OW/IvZ0CVxhYlmzl1tp2Q0/mlDwdBIHnCS4zg==&source=MM_EM_PT_LO_230918_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmM2Mzk2ZS02ODU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cC-snQ2mgJN-pSh-YJJtW0i3dd7MWKAH003tQGGxsEE=&emci=01db52a9-5d56-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=56c6396e-6856-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=45626167) | | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69956107/427824493/844695876?contactdata=fWx2RHurwgwYFAZlX9servORInkAKGK5yyPDQrzhhBJiVIlmv5r+oESU41+PSVnHMGcWuvFiZroTOgf8bY52y/rWQlFFRUT4SP1jT1O1NpFTeu3f9OW/IvZ0CVxhYlmzl1tp2Q0/mlDwdBIHnCS4zg==&source=MM_EM_PT_LO_230918_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmM2Mzk2ZS02ODU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cC-snQ2mgJN-pSh-YJJtW0i3dd7MWKAH003tQGGxsEE=&emci=01db52a9-5d56-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=56c6396e-6856-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=45626167)**
---
I have always advocated for expanding opportunities for students across the state, and I’m committed to paving the way for our kids to build a future for themselves right here in Washington.

There’s a lot of work left to be done to ensure that every kid has a bright future ahead, but I’m proud to stand with Washington public schools in that fight.

[Join my fight for public education by adding your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69956108/427824494/844695876?contactdata=fWx2RHurwgwYFAZlX9servORInkAKGK5yyPDQrzhhBJiVIlmv5r+oESU41+PSVnHMGcWuvFiZroTOgf8bY52y/rWQlFFRUT4SP1jT1O1NpFTeu3f9OW/IvZ0CVxhYlmzl1tp2Q0/mlDwdBIHnCS4zg==&source=MM_EM_PT_LO_230918_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmM2Mzk2ZS02ODU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cC-snQ2mgJN-pSh-YJJtW0i3dd7MWKAH003tQGGxsEE=&emci=01db52a9-5d56-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=56c6396e-6856-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=45626167) | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69956109/427824495/844695876?contactdata=fWx2RHurwgwYFAZlX9servORInkAKGK5yyPDQrzhhBJiVIlmv5r+oESU41+PSVnHMGcWuvFiZroTOgf8bY52y/rWQlFFRUT4SP1jT1O1NpFTeu3f9OW/IvZ0CVxhYlmzl1tp2Q0/mlDwdBIHnCS4zg==&source=MM_EM_PT_LO_230918_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmM2Mzk2ZS02ODU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cC-snQ2mgJN-pSh-YJJtW0i3dd7MWKAH003tQGGxsEE=&emci=01db52a9-5d56-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=56c6396e-6856-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=45626167)**

So we fixed it. | | I have always advocated for expanding opportunities for students across the state, and I’m committed to paving the way for our kids to build a future for themselves right here in Washington. There’s a lot of work left to be done to ensure that every kid has a bright future ahead, but I’m proud to stand with Washington public schools in that fight. | Thank you, Mark | Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous. | | ---|---|--- | = ** Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet Elect Mark Mullet 401 2nd Ave S Ste 303 Seattle, WA 98104 United States

clean_body: FIGHT BACK | THE LEFT WANTS TO REWRITE AMERICAN HISTORY. WE CAN 'T STAND FOR THIS | Friend, The radical left and woke revisionists want to tell us a story -- that we're evil, and America is a corrupt, evil, capitalist nation that has contributed nothing to the world worth celebrating. This is FALSE. We live in the greatest country on earth -- there's no dispute. Leftists want to teach our children that Americans are EVIL and conservatism is DEAD. If the left has its way, generations of American children will grow up being brainwashed to hate this nation. Will you help us protect our conservative legacy -- and DEFEND our history? Thank you, Conservative Alerts Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

name: Working Families Party
subject: A historic move from Pennsylvania Senator John Fetterman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | We have big news out of Pennsylvania, Peter: **[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUKa_lnqTh-9hI_LG17p9JAUHbK0h1Uz4kHgWZ-O5bkZC9oeA3B5INAU8qxkJaH4W9u4EXRT-_j3BDm5tzcB6MvdBHvBRW7X7kwJp5vag74zJpCH06H1tHylWUtJ7CCIaFpN7Kjdb0xOXCJ3dqG3SWBgRJCn8mGb0MV5q7sbj78GN9lSkRLsQuaMOAMG-jexIH_2RWLiShEJK8xa_x0hlw8s2UXM75ERxpjU-33S0hTJRMefqlgaueeuHnIxi8TLC4Byywd7w-r72G1DqKpQ7_0r19X3H7byR-Ic8pQmSmwG1Ll0mgkGqfJQ0p48RcBOozSRkdnU7jkNm79whcgcTjXdp6bRJEC_sSYKZ7-SLuHpZIdyoeUJCocr1d7d5Ai3Gd5RDxUMEXYU5Kup90PHMuzMDoCjU6EiZZ6QDWmrnGAuc-erg12sx7yv00ClORxXB7/3zp/mv9YUfH5QA-nFKLWxQKsSw/h0/O4Yrka9JgNs0TSL-LbNSmjUUBqBvrurieBXPdjMBh9Y)
** **Today, Democratic U.S. Senator John Fetterman announced his endorsement of WFP's Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke in Philadelphia’s City Council race.** He told Philly Mag, “I’m proud to support this slate and join the big coalition they are building. As Senator, I want partners in government in Philadelphia and throughout our commonwealth who are champions in putting working families over billionaires and corporate donors.”1 We need to make sure that come November, we elect Kendra and Nicolas and make the Working Families Party the dominant minority party in Philadelphia, instead of the Republican Party who is fighting progress everywhere you look. [**Will you split a contribution between Kendra and Nicolas’ campaigns today?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUKa_lnqTh-9hI_LG17p9JAUHbK0h1Uz4kHgWZ-O5bkZC9oeA3B5INAU8qxkJaH4W9MbtRQr20ovpPOEhkw-a_BzVXdQC6rzYVwP_b_kfB3nHdAxDxMIfedIgAvkbkFmljhcJND_TwonY0uhCyR11CzzJphoZwgCSvrIL92NbWI_4TJB99YoEJGXNoVvTrBBR7hVoN8i-b2wkYfvTTKgmozOMkL2XoVG5VH7_PkqpNzuXs28999Sr46WdhF4DC7HgWOfRotMLeOYZE5g561sWhraPIcIvCNj-7eE98EEMVvRBfiKczeQMVYGe7tFVVeAmYPbB3XFtHVCMPjrCUpD15T8-8J_ML9tlKVDaVokh3B1aylflRVs7ehlgZdgomeDvoZEC0-U4Fnk0pbWdqgfarhsjvoZuq0jPbKVRAinqcN7tzQg_yaO9ecV05D6L3VcXx/3zp/mv9YUfH5QA-nFKLWxQKsSw/h1/SaFluztKoohNWZGoj8M-h2l_A1bw3z6bdsTueL2qpMs) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUKa_lnqTh-9hI_LG17p9JAUHbK0h1Uz4kHgWZ-O5bkZC9oeA3B5INAU8qxkJaH4W9mCAhloWlV7n-UmajLiHi8LtK39TTbrM6Haj9vV_rqlFbrVnmQ6REWdjbyQ5nDoCYgGLMWLUry9plZDr8kai3ErKJImnaKfUZ_kGvBzDATgaUPXx2tFPKMxUsY4Ywm50rt7nFTQ8k_tuVEoE3q6sRsbEs6Fv3zcV8rXihhybS7mOu-yRHu_9NX_oB0MIdS6iJzHRn20GdmQ-pWoWKQN3cIWYjPXaM9M0j9veQ4NG6J0ZYBXjN31hnFaSEHS7T18ZTGphdyBWRD1XSbhL5SZBLFNbPdavpHVZZjZnk0v2BQAAVB4pFEFeYj_ax4ufB6IJauGPhMCklon9jmO9ca1ndOmn6ovso4FU08qo8xXpeTu0ZTJVigIO8OrvWww6D67qv/3zp/mv9YUfH5QA-nFKLWxQKsSw/h2/WKIza6Ctds3Mx5JN3vHCCss_zz_ncXILy2UCVKssgO0)** Fetterman’s endorsement is downright historic, Peter. It’s not everyday that we see prominent elected officials line up behind third-party candidates like Kendra and Nicolas.
But across the board, Pennsylvania Democrats — including Governor Josh Shapiro who endorsed Kendra earlier this month — are backing them, defying requests by party leadership to do otherwise, and even risking _expulsion_ , because they see the bigger political picture. **If Kendra and Nicolas win the two at-large seats designated for a minority party in Philadelphia’s City Council, not only would they erode Republican influence in the city — they would lay the groundwork for third-party progressive insurgents in other major cities across the country to do the same.** That’s why this is one of the most closely watched races this fall, and it’s why some of the biggest fighters for working people are all hopping on Kendra and Nicolas’ train of supporters. **With just 50 days left until the General Election, we need you on board too.**[**Can you split a donation between Kendra Brooks’ and Nicolas O’Rourke’s campaigns to make sure every voter in Philadelphia knows why U.S. Senator John Fetterman and Pennsylvania’s most prominent Democratic leaders are all-in to elect them?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUKa_lnqTh-9hI_LG17p9JAUHbK0h1Uz4kHgWZ-O5bkZC9oeA3B5INAU8qxkJaH4W93xWA89tHGuINPgi811IJgFSFWm8o9tdFpi3EfsGW8lmdzOiUjjTbvZi23j2b7SQmwhn8qJuSjgWP7b3GY5k2dbQPQVDcHcg11BqJeYJUGSB2ayWZ6LzEglvX9xTY6Zs_bZxKKO5R2Z0bQ6wpQc1SloR01VoxphIjAv4wLBEGF1YyW86EIPLQ-IYy4hmHyGbUVAiLUvuMsKldvPc3HjgAgWxNWqxklvhRS8d0vxszqg1ifXZK4LQ-dpLCOeJBcx9979b_rjBuRAv_kz4otQAFMRqDMyScApZUAXUWjQWNkcXhtyGBju-vIT9tOCEEtupMnxso_LUHEkc5zOSJCcqWxVFbn9-TP9yHQID34C1UDz14HJXzhQpL7YG-j1d6laxf/3zp/mv9YUfH5QA-nFKLWxQKsSw/h3/yn1xxn3gvizyLuXXoUUn_5oO2_18GBMfZeKNeeZpAuM) Your support will help us build the large-scale grassroots movement needed to cover the costs of canvassing, texting, phonebanking, and all of the organizing that’s needed to reach voters across Philadelphia and win this election. **[Contribute](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUKa_lnqTh-9hI_LG17p9JAUHbK0h1Uz4kHgWZ-O5bkZC9oeA3B5INAU8qxkJaH4W9RBSau8_ysa-P8XMMae0tbVQ5oCWI2PGVdEf8Bd1VH0rsvQGcESHCKqt0rLYvgKH8WAIW1gCNxlMmX5GfHSJ4pjo9D6yJQzjrPeBtjFoP9qeslyglKS6fuUIGv_jquHev1jIenOsB9YWlmpyQ0KVQtyxqfm7nfxkLzkcpDcp607aJ1qZheCom0mWNhoBabgcroGLxLICVaDez096WBX0C8i-PYONRfosm3puJoLz2D8BPXRBmdjH69Owvx7v6Wqhw2xjP_vFYMONPTFSEBZCzoOWWgBCju5OPc7LcVWOtKhT5PNRXnNwVPp2bXJZknB-rH-bfpmZCcb0RsE7RbR4ttFJyTBs-K4lgprdCSSflgHUKRGPj5DZ7vsXdRBZY9D6d/3zp/mv9YUfH5QA-nFKLWxQKsSw/h4/RXOm01EkoomBVef8K7F7fPcVmOR6bTwInyI1dB0LZAY)** Thank you, as always, for all of your contributions to the Working Families Party and our champions. Whether through your financial support or by giving your time and energy, you’re helping us build power to transform communities and get things done for working people. In solidarity, Working Families Party

clean_body: | | | We have big news out of Pennsylvania, Peter: Today, Democratic U.S. Senator John Fetterman announced his endorsement of WFP's Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke in Philadelphia’s City Council race. He told Philly Mag, “I’m proud to support this slate and join the big coalition they are building. As Senator, I want partners in government in Philadelphia and throughout our commonwealth who are champions in putting working families over billionaires and corporate donors.”1 We need to make sure that come November, we elect Kendra and Nicolas and make the Working Families Party the dominant minority party in Philadelphia, instead of the Republican Party who is fighting progress everywhere you look. Fetterman’s endorsement is downright historic, Peter. It’s not everyday that we see prominent elected officials line up behind third-party candidates like Kendra and Nicolas. But across the board, Pennsylvania Democrats — including Governor Josh Shapiro who endorsed Kendra earlier this month — are backing them, defying requests by party leadership to do otherwise, and even risking expulsion , because they see the bigger political picture. If Kendra and Nicolas win the two at-large seats designated for a minority party in Philadelphia’s City Council, not only would they erode Republican influence in the city — they would lay the groundwork for third-party progressive insurgents in other major cities across the country to do the same. That’s why this is one of the most closely watched races this fall, and it’s why some of the biggest fighters for working people are all hopping on Kendra and Nicolas’ train of supporters. With just 50 days left until the General Election, we need you on board too. Your support will help us build the large-scale grassroots movement needed to cover the costs of canvassing, texting, phonebanking, and all of the organizing that’s needed to reach voters across Philadelphia and win this election. Thank you, as always, for all of your contributions to the Working Families Party and our champions. Whether through your financial support or by giving your time and energy, you’re helping us build power to transform communities and get things done for working people. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , Philadelphia Magazine, September 18, 2023. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Michael Tyler (via JoeBiden.com)
subject: re: TV ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We’re investing more in TV ads across battleground states than ever before. Here’s why. | | |
---
Peter, This election will be the **most important in our nation’s history.** We’re fighting against MAGA extremists who are pushing the most dangerous, out-of-touch agenda we’ve ever seen. **That’s why the Biden-Harris campaign is investing in this race early by launching TV ads in some of our most key battleground states.** Launching these ads early and running them often is one of the best ways we can get our message out to voters and continue to build our coalition of grassroots supporters who will help carry this campaign to victory next November. But running ads is _expensive_ , especially running them in multiple critical states that we’ll need to win in order for Joe and Kamala to finish the job. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. Grassroots support from donors like you is what allows us to keep these ads and this campaign running. Which is why I have to ask:** [**Will you chip in $25 today to help us keep these ads on the air in battleground states across the country? clean_body: We’re investing more in TV ads across battleground states than ever before. Here’s why. | | | Peter, This election will be the most important in our nation’s history. We’re fighting against MAGA extremists who are pushing the most dangerous, out-of-touch agenda we’ve ever seen. That’s why the Biden-Harris campaign is investing in this race early by launching TV ads in some of our most key battleground states. Launching these ads early and running them often is one of the best ways we can get our message out to voters and continue to build our coalition of grassroots supporters who will help carry this campaign to victory next November. But running ads is expensive , especially running them in multiple critical states that we’ll need to win in order for Joe and Kamala to finish the job. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. Grassroots support from donors like you is what allows us to keep these ads and this campaign running. Which is why I have to ask: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Team Biden-Harris is committed to fighting for progress for the American people, and your support ensures we can do just that in November 2024 and beyond. Thank you, Michael Michael Tyler Communications Director Biden-Harris 2024

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda.

Yesterday, over _**75,000**_ people took to the streets for the March to End Fossil Fuels in New York. It’s truly inspiring to see so many people from different walks of life unite and make their voices heard.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69956780/427826728/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230918-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkZTJmOTIyLTZiNTYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jAZXN9LvEWuAzTwLSbX66k0v2K67aZsnhEPAs64-6Ec=)
Thank you for helping spread the message, participating on virtual calls, and showing up to tell the president what we expect of him!

**This was a historic demonstration asking President Joe Biden to answer the UN Secretary-General’s Call to Action to take the steps we need to end the era of fossil fuels.

The president has the power to stop approving fossil fuel projects, phase down oil and gas drilling, declare a climate emergency, and start a just and equitable transition off fossil fuels. Hopefully, he will listen to the thousands of voices coming together to demand he do just that.**

As we head into the rest of “Climate Week,” I’m energized and hopeful that the future of the climate movement is in great hands.

| Peter,

This isn’t the news we wanted to share, but I just got out of a finance meeting and found out that _**we fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal.**_

Our fundraising goals allow us to plan for the future and ensure we have the resources we need to build a successful grassroots campaign. That’s why it’s so important that we hit our goals.

We’re facing unprecedented challenges here in Washington, and those challenges call for a leader who can bring our community and government together to find bold solutions. clean_body: Our fundraising goals allow us to plan for the future and ensure we have the resources we need to build a successful grassroots campaign. | = | Peter, This isn’t the news we wanted to share, but I just got out of a finance meeting and found out that we fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal. Our fundraising goals allow us to plan for the future and ensure we have the resources we need to build a successful grassroots campaign. That’s why it’s so important that we hit our goals. We’re facing unprecedented challenges here in Washington, and those challenges call for a leader who can bring our community and government together to find bold solutions. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Hilary Franz * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. subject: Your refund is waiting

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?refcode=091823 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?refcode=091823]
Friend,
Our records indicate you haven’t contributed to the Minnesota House DFL yet in 2023. When you contribute to the Minnesota House DFL you are investing in all the important work DFLers do for Minnesota: protecting abortion access, investing in our public schools, and making healthcare more affordable. Plus, here in Minnesota we have what’s called the Political Contribution Refund program, or PCR for short. This program allows you to donate $50 (or $100 per couple) to a participating campaign and get it refunded by the state. That’s right, you can support the Minnesota House DFL and our DFL trifecta and get your money back! What are you waiting for, friend – make your refundable $50 donation today: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?refcode=091823]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Refundable $50 Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=091823_50]
Refundable $100 Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=091823_100]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?express_lane_other=true&refcode=091823_other]
We know it’s important for you to get your refund as soon as possible. That’s why we mail your PCR receipt to you quickly, along with the forms you need to claim your refund. We really appreciate all you do to help protect our House DFL majority, friend. Thank you.
House DFL Team

name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura?=
subject: Join the Fight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress
body:
| | | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=1ec5ef4669&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
# The Battle to Flip Texas Blue.

My name is Laura Jones and I am running for Congress in Texas’s 8th District.
As a mom, a business owner, and a born-and-raised Texan, I know that real representation starts with having a voice from one of us, not a career politician.

My campaign and winning a seat in the United States Congress will be instrumental in achieving better representation for our communities and flipping Texas BLUE.

[**In a moment, I’m going to explain why running is so important to me, but if you’re ready to flip Texas blue and win for the 8th district, chip in today!** ](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=920c432a0f&e=a2a46ff12c)
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=e26d77ac80&e=a2a46ff12c)
**Some things you may not know about me:**

I served as the Chair for the San Jacinto County Democrats and Field Director for Texas Senate District 3 under the Texas Democratic Party's Non-Urban Rural Caucus.

I was born and raised in Houston, Texas, where my Husband and I raised our 6 children and operated a successful business.

I fell in love with the peace and tranquility of rural Texas. So a few years ago, my husband and I built a home with our two youngest children here.

However, I immediately noticed the lack of proper representation. As Field Director, I traveled around East Texas talking to residents, and I heard many times that they felt as if their voices were not heard. Many issues have gone unresolved for decades, and we now face real challenges with our healthcare, public education, the climate crisis, and job security in many rural Texas communities.

As a tax-paying resident and mother of children attending a rural community's local schools, I could not just sit back and allow things to decline. And so I am running to be a part of the change that we desperately need in our community.

I am ready to be one of us for all of us.

[**If you’re ready to be a part of our campaign and see that we have the momentum needed to flip Texas, please chip in today. It would mean the world to me.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=ee47922622&e=a2a46ff12c)
*If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
| [Chip in $25](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=308101e461&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| [Chip in $50](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=d047a543ad&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| [Chip in $150](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=ecbf4900c4&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| [Chip in $500](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=041af65abc&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| [Choose Amount](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=29c90e122b&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
Thank you so much. I am looking forward to updating you in the coming days and to get going with you by my side.

\- Laura
|

P.O. Box 742
Coldspring, TX 77331_

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign now: Investigate attacks on Stop Cop City activists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Officials are charging protesters with domestic terrorism. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvUNz_-o_L0z_pNroZXEFSZS1pCx4vY4Lu8sirrt2YCAWKRp89CTpuZAaB5o4HtyPIK8GF4u64fLSe1zujsz85CvjLybSIKdM0CiZpwHA-7LQMQ4CXqr_0EKHQ6p1iWdqAcZZ64i3OTOpc35_DyUmj6iJSj-TSZnW6AFDQDr9PIgTPP6CA-Et9hxsIs_eSiCQWK38o7Lm-9DxcyFjG2YgO_b-N62p3X-3GPqFXmfkWc-I/3zp/gOO9UAXARAKrEs2LPQbQfw/h0/u6Hr5Qadq-2VHw-zACraI3hp1Yply6TitJn1x8YYPP0)
---
Friend, You’ve probably heard about protests against building “Cop City” in Georgia—a project that would destroy the Weelaunee Forest and devastate the watershed upon which nearby Black communities depend. This massive training center for militarizing police would include a fake city to practice urban warfare tactics and suppressing protest. **For months, city and state officials have been covering up evidence of the police killing of a protester and charging protesters with domestic terrorism for exercising their constitutional rights.** Police shot and killed an activist named Tortuguita in a hail of 57 bullets, while Tortuguita sat with their arms raised. It appears that an officer shot another officer and tried to pin it on Tortuguita. Police lied, but autopsies demonstrated Tortuguita’s innocence. We need justice and accountability for Tortuguita’s murder. But none of the officers involved have been charged. Meanwhile, activists who passed out flyers about it were charged with an outrageous felony, and have been held in solitary confinement without bail. This is unacceptable. Other activists have been arrested and held without bail for having mud on their shoes, sleeping in a forest, “standing next to signs for anarchy,” being “known members” of “a prison abolitionist movement,” and for supporting activists with legal aid and raising bail money. All of these activities are legal. And last week, Georgia’s Attorney General charged 61 activists with state RICO charges (42 of whom were already charged with domestic terrorism) in order to further criminalize dissent. **This is a very dangerous attack on our First Amendment right to protest.** [**Please sign now to call on the Department of Justice to investigate Tortuguita’s killing, its subsequent cover-up, and the widespread assault on protesters’ civil rights. We must protect our right to dissent.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QxjawaKzRh4DvjCH117S5VZ2HZgJxnhh9gxBukRc5XvbUlagxl57Y5i2aV3JEXSYKEk5XGLD0o9JB2zIf8dsGicsrLhs4_iRELV0jx3TzmW1es2Htx-YHfJDMdAn8Dfu5wrEfKAoVJsIUExGj0ZklUyowSc8CKm2jU4wF2rET0rKb2Gf-DD9NM9DRLxnaNnO0D4kNOt65elcSICJkRw_8s53NGpZumkpeTOfMWwjugiYhpvR2Il_1HV73NASG_OdpiaSR3QZzlb85yqnNtVKjA9gV_gd_TJXIb9Of3Ku1FTkMldBMXYEHCQ1ISiv6-8dGQhGT8xn4a1ipmAVAT2KN28TiXjFFFlGqAgz1xMdyvgMMFIfGgviw7R-L7L3cXpNQ/3zp/gOO9UAXARAKrEs2LPQbQfw/h1/7YplW4x-nH8Ola2OWzlVLjPFyg2YxZUxvVVLTD3TROk) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QxjawaKzRh4DvjCH117S5VZ2HZgJxnhh9gxBukRc5XvbUlagxl57Y5i2aV3JEXSYKEk5XGLD0o9JB2zIf8dsGiXoCrDEZKv7lVS770J9L-6w5ogQrR3Pdsu6xsGjpZ2cM5p7M9r4Zb5JhdIwOYIWwC69DxiIPlkLO9dIEutJ_j1qmbc-2fBfKeDnAAkW5Oy7uqLD_woL2EWB4h2pi5nkJreUlqAkBDmJEku8-oyLeX-DcfJybwILp01jHRIQAddCEBw5-NIrdStojMp5CzCXGcHSavBC6F0Dzfeec8Vc61ZyOy3fo0pu1_nzZsJn9fQIJ0Xxzu2gwPLxdY-GAl58LazkWDcQeand89VR6QXxxSJOLmyLXa9cr3Z2bMffNrA6d/3zp/gOO9UAXARAKrEs2LPQbQfw/h2/5C7eSYIoF6bnp2n6FCoZdlyFzBMD65AeaEBmtjWiu8Y)
---
This extreme government overreach is an unconstitutional attempt to silence dissent, which violates our First Amendment rights and is meant to intimidate others from joining the movement against police violence.
And it’s not limited to Georgia. In the country’s largest majority-Black city of Detroit, police brutalized and even sued Black Lives Matter protesters for exercising their right to protest.
Across the country, we’re seeing a backlash against popular uprisings for much-needed justice and a better future for us all.
People have been rising up to transform what is currently an injustice system—from police killings to predatory cash bail practices to underfunded access to public defenders—into a system of justice for all.
In Congress, I’m carrying forward the grassroots call to overhaul our criminal legal system and invest in true community safety. That includes pushing for policy solutions and continuing to fight back against dangerous attacks on our right to protest.
We must take a stand in support of the movement to Stop Cop City, and against the attacks on our rights. It’s time to hold those responsible accountable. If we don’t act, it will set a frightening precedent.
[**Add your name now to call on the Department of Justice to investigate Tortuguita’s killing, its subsequent cover-up, and the widespread assault on protesters’ civil rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QxjawaKzRh4DvjCH117S5VZ2HZgJxnhh9gxBukRc5XvbUlagxl57Y5i2aV3JEXSYKEk5XGLD0o9JB2zIf8dsGiekpy1xdkku9GGT1lFPOicGg95QKU6pkNubxpMzVndhFNyTCxzoeOMI3llA7U55EharYaO99XSXgixOxUkESwOTXjFjNlXI5_czZiPMr_B9kMZfxn2l-wSZQolR1-ViQ_HJn7emdpvY6A8SXSLQNvHjkz8NiLfDUhWpndnsJVmMTuyvi-5Fqud9Tm98QGMCP66ztec0eozk8b65Qc1xNCyiC7TZWfAxgmNZ-GPsnq8jFE6AMLhrv1j3KS4kXp9_TdOC9-ikYkc-t715YTchEkGsrGcPJyRC3K9iFt22vaCbf/3zp/gOO9UAXARAKrEs2LPQbQfw/h3/pcCo43DFQSNwVuvdt8ijGMS1-S3shFBMnuDCnxsIVLE)
Thank you for fighting for our safety and our rights.
In solidarity,
Rashida

We must take a stand in support of the movement to Stop Cop City, and against the attacks on our rights. It’s time to hold those responsible accountable. If we don’t act, it will set a frightening precedent. Thank you for fighting for our safety and our rights. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via .
