name: Becca Balint
subject: Bold and transformative change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’m hopeful about what we can accomplish together with another term and a Democratic majority.
#
Hi Peter, it's Congresswoman Becca Balint.
Amidst unprecedented attacks from the right on our bodies, our right to vote, and on the very fabric of our democracy, Democrats are setting an agenda grounded in bold and transformative change for the people. **A key part of our agenda is having strong, fierce, progressive leaders like Pramila and myself.**
Last year, I made history when I was elected as the first woman and first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent Vermont in Congress. Since serving in the House, I have been fighting tirelessly to combat far-right extremism, protect workers’ rights, and expand mental health care.
**Now, it’s time to ensure that we keep this campaign — and our ever-expanding progressive movement — in Congress.[Can you split a donation between mine and Pramila’s campaign to ensure we can continue to fight for progressive values?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/45627?refcode=em20230918-2940&t=1&akid=2940%2E420207%2Epj69Q3)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/45627?refcode=em20230918-2940&t=20&akid=2940%2E420207%2Epj69Q3)**
I have never shied away from big fights. From introducing resolutions to expel George Santos and censure Marjorie Taylor Green and going toe-to-toe with MAGA extremists to standing up for trans youth, I have been a courageous adversary against the GOP’s dangerous agenda.
Pramila is the Chair of the Progressive Caucus, so I am more than honored to have her support in this fight to protect our progress and push our country forward, even as Republicans are set on rolling it back.
As we fight to elect even more progressive power houses in Congress, I’m hopeful about what we can accomplish together with another term and a Democratic majority. **[Support our work for the people by splitting a contribution between Pramila and my campaign today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/45627?refcode=em20230918-2940&t=21&akid=2940%2E420207%2Epj69Q3)**
Thanks so much,
Congresswoman Becca Balint

| Dear Neighbor,

Early voting for the most important local election in a generation begins in just four days!
...will the policies that have made Prince William demonstrably less safe continue to compound our 70% increase in violent crime?
...will the trifecta of tax increases (personal property, real estate, and the Meals Tax) continue to blast Prince William families?
...will well-heeled special interests from outside Prince William continue to have the most prominent seat at your county government table?
These and many more important questions will begin to be answered this Friday.

Peter,

I’m the conservative running for California’s 9th Congressional District who is going to flip this top-target House seat and retire a failed Democrat incumbent who votes with Biden 95% of the time.

Believe it or not, I’m also the mayor of one of California’s largest cities.

After watching my city suffer from crime, homelessness, and economic hardship, I decided to take on the powerful Democrat incumbent – _and I won._

Now, we’re reducing crime and homelessness, revitalizing our economy, creating jobs, and balancing our budgets.

**As a conservative who’s proven I can win in blue California,[I now need your help to flip CA-9.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4a26f3b61824bf39efe3408f81ea5bf&_e=DRo07lfoeaPT8RvTQsTisgk14u-nSWY0jKICio0MKoou-2eIvR5gDNPvwr9MdYj9QT33bUvAnZGUtiuklegatSvLJAzXtsdU2HcCWhQ8uV4dXkKHksjCWGDHlBzSQv5wl2NZlxDN3rnaJH8PjoAoNtbwWqtAToCbocOdUcDLb2--uAJmWbUgqXpXi1sizjAl1B-3_PUqhV4NQE2WDh3sovRpRpeH6B1sRoeBviZIXGsmDkPjt2AGX_bQVj71pUdt58UaUQ7sWaK5uBRrU6VBYdze0SlvrLD0RpwaPgoC_vP1cPcS4Dx5iW6FRSyOinDRD4MTlOatpYnrpdUW5kh5fdYJB4-Og8XO1YDnNQN9_fSka-Jl6tU9ybidNCPz-5Lh)**

House Republican leadership has identified this race as **one of our best chances to flip a seat and grow our majority.**

[ ** Help Kevin Flip CA-9 ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4a26f3b61824bf39efe3408f81ea5bf&_e=DRo07lfoeaPT8RvTQsTisgk14u-nSWY0jKICio0MKoou-2eIvR5gDNPvwr9MdYj9QT33bUvAnZGUtiuklegatSvLJAzXtsdU2HcCWhQ8uV4dXkKHksjCWGDHlBzSQv5wl2NZlxDN3rnaJH8PjoAoNtbwWqtAToCbocOdUcDLb2--uAJmWbUgqXpXi1sizjAl1B-3_PUqhV4NQE2WDh3sovRpRpeH6B1sRoeBviZIXGsFD5Q4PAf2a8pf2DBk1pD3EQMLvG6jHi6YdKSV6h2XWQoyvK8IdkmQmSDMbY0YK26KdMMtIGbi57lZf794BALUPNxiwTRuhSYrgverhfIAC8Khd57Folo6Qk9TKbUwyoHGeehT2DJMFk6FwBzgsBsk)
I’ve already received endorsements from Speaker McCarthy, Majority Leader Scalise, and Conf. Chair Stefanik – [**and now I need your support too.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4a26f3b61824bf39efe3408f81ea5bf&_e=DRo07lfoeaPT8RvTQsTisgk14u-nSWY0jKICio0MKoou-2eIvR5gDNPvwr9MdYj9QT33bUvAnZGUtiuklegatSvLJAzXtsdU2HcCWhQ8uV4dXkKHksjCWGDHlBzSQv5wl2NZlxDN3rnaJH8PjoAoNtbwWqtAToCbocOdUcDLb2--uAJmWbUgqXpXi1sizjAl1B-3_PUqhV4NQE2WDh3sovRpRpeH6B1sRoeBviZIXGvfFNAyDHTef3WnD0tNfXrcnYp8rFOvA-Cd5ICmw9HrLK6l1-LAtcd53yHq-5fl-avmJEKAzMgK8LOwhcwWfzNw-yCSeJK6cJO-YoQqgsI-y04khiGkPG3QzBWLGY2Um-A7LN6APHQBpcpr_jrAI_2V)

We need to get inflation under control, secure our borders, end government corruption, support our veterans & military, and protect our freedoms.

But we need to flip this seat so we have a fail-proof House majority that can work with a Republican president and Senate to get America back on track.

[**Will you join our effort to flip this top-target House seat by supporting my campaign with a contribution of $10, $25, $50 or more?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4a26f3b61824bf39efe3408f81ea5bf&_e=DRo07lfoeaPT8RvTQsTisgk14u-nSWY0jKICio0MKoou-2eIvR5gDNPvwr9MdYj9QT33bUvAnZGUtiuklegatSvLJAzXtsdU2HcCWhQ8uV4dXkKHksjCWGDHlBzSQv5wl2NZlxDN3rnaJH8PjoAoNtbwWqtAToCbocOdUcDLb2--uAJmWbUgqXpXi1sizjAl1B-3_PUqhV4NQE2WDh3sovRpRpeH6B1sRoeBviZIXGtuHp-BqWCSuMfzrY5P79zD0dcf0kJvBQY68xtUUhcO4ad0kitfB97tH7jRyTiSqWQ9-vk5fBmoCgheOqjF2pfRwneUxw3N_Q95y8wwPJY-tcQkF7bNsL6gCvovB8lgvAzWSp_Psku1XI-XM-pc3Kze)

Thank you,

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

[ ** Help Kevin Flip CA-9 ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4a26f3b61824bf39efe3408f81ea5bf&_e=DRo07lfoeaPT8RvTQsTisgk14u-nSWY0jKICio0MKoou-2eIvR5gDNPvwr9MdYj9QT33bUvAnZGUtiuklegatSvLJAzXtsdU2HcCWhQ8uV4dXkKHksjCWGDHlBzSQv5wl2NZlxDN3rnaJH8PjoAoNtbwWqtAToCbocOdUcDLb2--uAJmWbUgqXpXi1sizjAl1B-3_PUqhV4NQE2WDh3sovRpRpeH6B1sRoeBviZIXGv2g711Lx_daQuYCVCcHVrJi7IreX2coC1JJ0YdzL3aflsDn4CjhkVrRolZQTJY3tsJWiZrniSEZK1VtL9nZvayuR3otlPR-8SWK9Gb2igGoYTFL-YIQt75zLrHdc65chp-YIGht8x9rFGbzF-4hPDO)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.
[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4a26f3b61824bf39efe3408f81ea5bf&_e=DRo07lfoeaPT8RvTQsTisgk14u-nSWY0jKICio0MKoou-2eIvR5gDNPvwr9MdYj9QT33bUvAnZGUtiuklegatSvLJAzXtsdU2HcCWhQ8uV4dXkKHksjCWGDHlBzSQv5wl2NZlxDN3rnaJH8PjoAoNtbwWqtAToCbocOdUcDLb2--uAJmWbUgqXpXi1sizjAl1B-3_PUqhV4NQE2WDh3sovRpRpeH6B1sRoeBviZIXGsTdPRt7UxQ_uDqT79D5b208naGetFQHjJ_-ia1lv9RgF_qWSf2xSPLFZ45kqkfZKwBCHgb4WBhiLeX326N-rWZXk6VElOiJ7A7_xh6I_w2IrqSMt5gZGDTDZy4uJJ2tMTmeTTD5FblrM6Xk_B86DyR)

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, you’re invited!

Join Our Revolution’s LIVE National Town Hall with US Reps. Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna, Ayanna Pressley, and Mark Pocan, and Minnesota AG Keith Ellison!

body:

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f607dfaf236e47e9b6172e661d5e58fb&_e=N6Wf9XQU6nUBDZ274EXX5XVZU_UoBz7pBhy314KO9yzGfpm9gHcI9pWYPRkdWV1mVesCWbpG1igBGe02poN_yn-yDKIjurilil-WimfUELT7Pba0ga0Q0ZvgbX7snmY060IqkcWi0T_TEEYy3Y2uzd0CrzD9IdrTuBtAZYEAJrUNZPzlKZSjPuOxR8Xse6ViCd-LIPFq7426573tAG-rVnS0UlIOa49gfLFMvc5NrLR_4Yz1nb09R7EojNUYRl42ymEXMOulef5-aAEW8kp-aq8tzKzJj4e231iAkAVd7YUkju7Zjm4Puk5MRwAfW_t9ye7Rx5pMpNuhw1rGEqVN2RDJhNbtmjxMhRRWDi1av0gUBWmrkiVYjOlzPMYpAUqxyVrFPK5BNG4txAoalWeXZQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow conservative, I am so happy to endorse a great candidate for U.S. Senate in Ohio – **Bernie Moreno.**

With Ohio being one of the top three targeted Senate seats Republicans need to flip in 2024, we’re lucky to have a candidate like Bernie in this race. [**But he’s going to need all the support we can give him.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f607dfaf236e47e9b6172e661d5e58fb&_e=N6Wf9XQU6nUBDZ274EXX5XVZU_UoBz7pBhy314KO9yzGfpm9gHcI9pWYPRkdWV1mVesCWbpG1igBGe02poN_yn-yDKIjurilil-WimfUELT7Pba0ga0Q0ZvgbX7snmY060IqkcWi0T_TEEYy3Y2uzd0CrzD9IdrTuBtAZYEAJrUNZPzlKZSjPuOxR8Xse6ViCd-LIPFq7426573tAG-rVnS0UlIOa49gfLFMvc5NrLR_4Yz1nb09R7EojNUYRl42tyMo58GCiAEHN5PoLTOMIoHBXbcyaJkwC4P1akwYZl9ezFag14TYfWWwafxAn4BwgusezFN_oHNtm_E2Qv2iPmLeyjDPdMoQJnmONDimEPIyoNaDdp3cNhkM6axTFyWyhHJAvC3n9V9FmbjMN_GXhw%3D%3D)

Like me, Bernie is an outsider – _he always has been._ But he’s never let that stop him.

From coming to America legally with his family when he was five, to growing up to become a successful business owner who has created thousands of jobs in Ohio, Bernie has lived the American Dream.

**Now, Bernie is running to save the country he loves and the America First values we share.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f607dfaf236e47e9b6172e661d5e58fb&_e=N6Wf9XQU6nUBDZ274EXX5XVZU_UoBz7pBhy314KO9yzGfpm9gHcI9pWYPRkdWV1mVesCWbpG1igBGe02poN_yn-yDKIjurilil-WimfUELT7Pba0ga0Q0ZvgbX7snmY060IqkcWi0T_TEEYy3Y2uzd0CrzD9IdrTuBtAZYEAJrUNZPzlKZSjPuOxR8Xse6ViCd-LIPFq7426573tAG-rVnS0UlIOa49gfLFMvc5NrLR_4Yz1nb09R7EojNUYRl42sMOk6-ePi7rRooX--bbKrEg7cEPaa1a9y2UApLHXzGn8TNwzp6Gir7G7xakgjNOpNTzPVXXrVUKVrV0GPqCY7JAmdO82I2-clbHyf-dZotFJu2lYVX8L4ywvqG_gBy9bQx6lZBxwNjNUOSnwqb3RmQ%3D%3D)
The country we grew up with is being ruined by corrupt and cowardly insider politicians, and we need an outsider and fierce fighter like Bernie who can go to Washington and fix it.

[**Will you join me in supporting outsider conservative and America First candidate Bernie Moreno with a donation of $15, $25, $35 or more today?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f607dfaf236e47e9b6172e661d5e58fb&_e=N6Wf9XQU6nUBDZ274EXX5XVZU_UoBz7pBhy314KO9yzGfpm9gHcI9pWYPRkdWV1mVesCWbpG1igBGe02poN_yn-yDKIjurilil-WimfUELT7Pba0ga0Q0ZvgbX7snmY060IqkcWi0T_TEEYy3Y2uzd0CrzD9IdrTuBtAZYEAJrUNZPzlKZSjPuOxR8Xse6ViCd-LIPFq7426573tAG-rVnS0UlIOa49gfLFMvc5NrLR_4Yz1nb09R7EojNUYRl42HrIIyNpXiiTccylZXAYk4eEsQ7mEDOahi1t4X3aw5NuLTTrTOfOlYIEM_xCTQYzXi9wJDWlkpV_WfFZCOWtTyKCJn-0RoGnsJXb0qaBgKzoFFvOmUb2l6wE05dUZWyy264iynuKDHya1_1PgTOgByQ%3D%3D)

We need Bernie to flip Ohio and put that seat, along with the Senate majority, in the hands of Republicans.

Only then will we be able to secure our borders, restore our economy, stand up to China, get criminals off our streets, and keep the radical woke agenda out of our schools.

[**Please join me in giving Bernie all the support you can today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f607dfaf236e47e9b6172e661d5e58fb&_e=N6Wf9XQU6nUBDZ274EXX5XVZU_UoBz7pBhy314KO9yzGfpm9gHcI9pWYPRkdWV1mVesCWbpG1igBGe02poN_yn-yDKIjurilil-WimfUELT7Pba0ga0Q0ZvgbX7snmY060IqkcWi0T_TEEYy3Y2uzd0CrzD9IdrTuBtAZYEAJrUNZPzlKZSjPuOxR8Xse6ViCd-LIPFq7426573tAG-rVnS0UlIOa49gfLFMvc5NrLR_4Yz1nb09R7EojNUYRl42a2Zmo7QyvN7Kit5pDz_VcZd-7nWKNV9EunmHLU-STaYRxTehSQUtCEGBJC8hs-qm5sxzxzFMblp3WfMso0iJn3CUSm8sQidx0wptWRiTep5lzCObl_n574vNOtFywZqlJsLUa1R5QB83ZzpI3QuRdQ%3D%3D)

[ ** Join Kari ⇨ Support Bernie! **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f607dfaf236e47e9b6172e661d5e58fb&_e=N6Wf9XQU6nUBDZ274EXX5XVZU_UoBz7pBhy314KO9yzGfpm9gHcI9pWYPRkdWV1mVesCWbpG1igBGe02poN_yn-yDKIjurilil-WimfUELT7Pba0ga0Q0ZvgbX7snmY060IqkcWi0T_TEEYy3Y2uzd0CrzD9IdrTuBtAZYEAJrUNZPzlKZSjPuOxR8Xse6ViCd-LIPFq7426573tAG-rVnS0UlIOa49gfLFMvc5NrLR_4Yz1nb09R7EojNUYRl42czR0E3GfHEdxCKudsqeFY8GY8Ea_vI-Suu4pfawmU9lmLQ4VHFgemTUAS2Tm_YYCpJDe6t4Xj-kXf03G9UExktYoadx-Jj-pSC0UQQonvp2AVUdNoqKECHe8hdDCffNQrLu4bZQDAeGBSzxDmaX3qQ%3D%3D)
Thanks,

Kari Lake

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

name: =?utf-8?B?TWFybGVuZSBHYWzDoW4tV29vZHM=?=
subject: My parents fled communist Cuba
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69957397/427832798/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDcyNjQ3YmItNzM1Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=McANcarvS-XpQ8bbF4h4fhE_UMS9K5cSoJ_iY3NalK0=)
Friend,

Friday marked the beginning of National Hispanic Heritage Month -- from September 15th to October 15th, we celebrate the incredible contributions of Hispanic Americans to the culture of the United States.

**As a first-generation American and the proud daughter of Cuban immigrants, I want to share part of my personal journey with you.[I hope you’ll read on about my story, then chip in a $3 donation toward our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69957440/427832821/-898110066?refcode=em-9.18.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDcyNjQ3YmItNzM1Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=McANcarvS-XpQ8bbF4h4fhE_UMS9K5cSoJ_iY3NalK0=)**

My parents fled Fidel Castro’s dictatorship in communist Cuba to give me and my siblings a chance at a better life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69957465/427832872/-898110066?refcode=em-9.18.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDcyNjQ3YmItNzM1Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=McANcarvS-XpQ8bbF4h4fhE_UMS9K5cSoJ_iY3NalK0=)
It wasn’t easy. My father sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet, and we didn’t enjoy many luxuries growing up.

**But what my parents did instill in me and my siblings was the power of hard work, the importance of fairness, and that family is everything.**

These values have driven me for my entire life. They led me to Arizona in the 1980s, where I worked as a broadcast journalist. It’s where I grew as an investigative journalist, uncovering corruption and holding truth to power.

I am so very proud to be an Arizonan and to have raised my family here. It’s where I met the love of my life, Grant, and where we raised our children.

**But today, much like how my parents fled extremism in Cuba, our country is facing another type of extremism -- the far-right.** Extreme Republicans are hell-bent on stripping away our rights. And now, my daughter is growing up with less control over her own body than I did.

clean_body: | = Friend, Friday marked the beginning of National Hispanic Heritage Month -- from September 15th to October 15th, we celebrate the incredible contributions of Hispanic Americans to the culture of the United States. As a first-generation American and the proud daughter of Cuban immigrants, I want to share part of my personal journey with you.= My parents fled Fidel Castro’s dictatorship in communist Cuba to give me and my siblings a chance at a better life. = It wasn’t easy. My father sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet, and we didn’t enjoy many luxuries growing up. But what my parents did instill in me and my siblings was the power of hard work, the importance of fairness, and that family is everything. These values have driven me for my entire life. They led me to Arizona in the 1980s, where I worked as a broadcast journalist. It’s where I grew as an investigative journalist, uncovering corruption and holding truth to power. I am so very proud to be an Arizonan and to have raised my family here. It’s where I met the love of my life, Grant, and where we raised our children. But today, much like how my parents fled extremism in Cuba, our country is facing another type of extremism -- the far-right. Extreme Republicans are hell-bent on stripping away our rights. And now, my daughter is growing up with less control over her own body than I did. My family is what drove me to become a candidate for Congress in AZ-01. David Schweikert is nothing but a rubber stamp for Trump and his extreme followers, and our communities deserve a leader who will actually hold extremists like him accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Marlene =** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: People can’t focus on making a living when they don’t feel well
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69957499/427832918/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjI1NDdiYi03MzU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjw7EwLpfeWZlwWsr7l2nb9meMPFjAlZxi70_wefD3Y=)
Peter, In 2016, I needed to have surgery on both of my kidneys. It was risky and unknown, with the surgical technique only created five years earlier. I knew it was risky, but inaction wasn’t possible if I wanted to stay alive. I also knew that this new procedure could become an anchor of debt for the rest of my life. **After the operation, I let my healthcare bill sit on the counter for days out of fear of what was inside. And the truth is, although my insurance covered part of the procedure, I had to take on serious medical debt that took years to pay off.** Peter, nobody should go into debt because they’re sick, but far too many in our community don’t have the privilege of coverage that keeps necessary, life-saving treatment costs manageable. It’s one of the realities that drove me to run for Congress, and a fight I take extremely seriously as we battle special interests who want to keep the status quo. **[I will always be your voice in Congress, and I will always take on the idea of profits over people. If you’re able, please donate what you can today to help me fight off dark money attacks coming my way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69957508/427832926/2043242937?refcode=em-9.18.23-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjI1NDdiYi03MzU2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjw7EwLpfeWZlwWsr7l2nb9meMPFjAlZxi70_wefD3Y=)**

People can’t focus on making a living when they don’t feel well, either physically or mentally. And the specter of bill collectors and life-altering debt for an operation can be one of the greatest mental weights people can have.
**We need to be setting people up for success, and quality, affordable health care is essential to providing opportunity for all.**
Everyone has the right to be well, and that means receiving care that doesn’t cause financial jeopardy.
Eric

clean_body: | = Peter, In 2016, I needed to have surgery on both of my kidneys. It was risky and unknown, with the surgical technique only created five years earlier. I knew it was risky, but inaction wasn’t possible if I wanted to stay alive. I also knew that this new procedure could become an anchor of debt for the rest of my life. After the operation, I let my healthcare bill sit on the counter for days out of fear of what was inside. And the truth is, although my insurance covered part of the procedure, I had to take on serious medical debt that took years to pay off. Peter, nobody should go into debt because they’re sick, but far too many in our community don’t have the privilege of coverage that keeps necessary, life-saving treatment costs manageable. It’s one of the realities that drove me to run for Congress, and a fight I take extremely seriously as we battle special interests who want to keep the status quo. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = People can’t focus on making a living when they don’t feel well, either physically or mentally. And the specter of bill collectors and life-altering debt for an operation can be one of the greatest mental weights people can have. We need to be setting people up for success, and quality, affordable health care is essential to providing opportunity for all. Everyone has the right to be well, and that means receiving care that doesn’t cause financial jeopardy. Eric = | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = To volunteer on Eric's campaign, We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Biden appoints a war criminal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We're disappointed. Joe Biden just nominated a Trump-backed official,
Elliott Abrams, to a key diplomatic post.

We're talking about a man who called for a Muslim travel ban. We’re
talking about a man, who in 1991, pleaded guilty to withholding
information from Congress during the Iran-Contra scandal. We’re talking
about a man who defended a genocidal Guatemalan dictator and downplayed
reports of human rights violations in El Salvador.

Abrams’ questionable record of calling for Muslim travel bans and his
general disregard for human rights are just a few of the reasons why this
nomination would be disastrous if voted through.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138118?t=1001&akid=30919%2E1203867%2EMkc1H8 ]In the name of protecting human rights here and abroad, we have to stop
the Senate from confirming this disastrous nominee. Can you write your
senator today and tell them to REJECT Elliott Abrams? Click here to send a
quick email to them.

SEND A LETTER

Let’s stop this while we still can,
Peter.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230918-30919-footer&t=1002&refcode2=30919_1203867_Mkc1H8&akid=30919%2E1203867%2EMkc1H8

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=30919%2E1203867%2EMkc1H8

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m never going to run a race like Kyrsten Sinema
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The way it should be
#

We email a lot, Peter.
No doubt about it.
I wish I didn’t have to — really. That’s the truth.
If we could win this race without sending another fundraising email, I’d do it.
But I’m never going to run a race like Kyrsten Sinema. She takes in millions from the wealthiest people in the country, but next to nothing from regular folks.
One of the things I am most proud of is that almost every dollar we raise comes from donations of less than $50.
That means when I go to the Senate, I’m not on the hook to some huge corporation or a bunch of lobbyists. No billionaire is going to tell me what to think or which bill to vote for.
I’m running for you. For the people who need a voice in Washington.
**And today, I’m hoping I can convince you to make your first donation.**
If you’ve been waiting for the right time, this is it. We’re right up against our critical FEC deadline. Sinema is circling, laying the foundation she’ll need for a successful re-election campaign. So is Kari Lake.
[**$3 today will help us be ready for anything. $3 to help us fight back against the millions in attack ads that will come our way. $3 to run a campaign that is powered by real people — the way it should be.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230918-2&t=1&akid=1216%2E734936%2EmqJZVw)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sept23.4uOuYS&amount=3&refcode=em230918-2&t=2&akid=1216%2E734936%2EmqJZVw)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sept23.4uOuYS&refcode=em230918-2&t=3&akid=1216%2E734936%2EmqJZVw)**
---
****
Thank you, this means a lot.
\- Ruben

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=685%2E552475%2EGBTbN7)
Peter, we'll make this quick:
**[Will you kick in any amount you can spare to our campaign right now so we don’t fall short of our quarterly fundraising goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230918-2?refcode=em20230918-2&refcode2=685_552475_GBTbN7&akid=685%2E552475%2EGBTbN7)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230918-2?refcode=em20230918-2&refcode2=685_552475_GBTbN7&akid=685%2E552475%2EGBTbN7)**
We know you get a lot of emails, and you might be tempted to tune them out.
But this is a reminder that online donations like yours are going to have a real impact on whether we’re able to re-elect Bob Casey and defend our razor-thin Senate majority in 2024.
We still have a lot more work to do and resources to raise in order to organize across Pennsylvania -- which is on CNN’s list of Top 10 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seats.
So before time runs out: **[Will you make a donation to our campaign today, knowing it could help stop Mitch McConnell and national Republicans from flipping the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230918-2?refcode=em20230918-2&refcode2=685_552475_GBTbN7&akid=685%2E552475%2EGBTbN7)**
If enough supporters chip in before our upcoming end-of-quarter deadline, we'll stay on track to win — no matter what the GOP throws our way.
Thank you for your support,
Team Casey

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=685%2E552475%2EGBTbN7)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=685%2E552475%2EGBTbN7)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

| | Friend, Another busy week for Team Kelly out on the trail! Yesterday, Kelly joined Adam Sexton for [WMUR's CloseUp](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/7aOgOzBev/c?w=1LrMZJOpCRF-BJ02Nzfx71IdKShGXDJvafkBPnE-iKI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9DSS1tQ1hLaFJkST9zaT1ObDl0NlFrazE3Q3RDX2dSIiwiciI6ImZjNzBjMWM5LTFjYzctNDgzYS05ZjA2LWJiNjQ4N2ZmMTIzYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjJiMDhlNzAzLWE2MjctNDZmMy1iZThhLTVkNTY1NDQyNjIwMiJ9) to talk about how she's going to keep New Hampshire safe, prosperous and free. We also announced the formation of our [Law Enforcement for Kelly Coalition](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/7aOgOzBev/c?w=stY0l5ev4zhjlGOD5BeHT-J2XqqiwCu_cSlA1e7PpKM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9LZWxseUF5b3R0ZS9zdGF0dXMvMTcwMjI5NzYxNTMzNTg5MTMyNT9zPTIwIiwiciI6ImZjNzBjMWM5LTFjYzctNDgzYS05ZjA2LWJiNjQ4N2ZmMTIzYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjJiMDhlNzAzLWE2MjctNDZmMy1iZThhLTVkNTY1NDQyNjIwMiJ9) with over 130 law enforcement signing on. On September 11th, Kelly joined Swim with a Mission for a memorial tribute on Woods Island honoring those lost in the attacks and honoring those who fight to preserve our freedoms. Later in the week, Kelly attended the Grafton County Fall Dinner in Lincoln, served food at Glendi in Manchester, attended the Pelham Old Home Day breakfast with Rep. Kimberly Abare, and joined the 8th Annual Nashua Water Walk. Keep up with all of our campaign updates on our [Facebook](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/7aOgOzBev/c?w=R3N1xVzoUOG20-8MyYvHEXWROuGWykOjlButPj5X2tE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0tlbGx5QXlvdHRlRm9yTkgiLCJyIjoiZmM3MGMxYzktMWNjNy00ODNhLTlmMDYtYmI2NDg3ZmYxMjNiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0) page. Best, Team Kelly

| | News Highlights
---
| |

| | “Law enforcement officers risk their lives every time they step out of their home and go to work. I have always, and will always, have their backs,” Ayotte said in a statement. “As attorney general, I stood shoulder to shoulder with our state’s law enforcement community. As governor, I will make sure that our law enforcement officers have the resources and support they need to keep our communities safe. We have the best law enforcement in the country, and I will fight every day to make sure they are treated as such.” [Read the full article from the NHJournal here.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/7aOgOzBev/c?w=-xODFQ6ymACcSt6-oYgzSZbbCaLY0pOmifvFUk0pf6k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uaGpvdXJuYWwuY29tL2F5b3R0ZS1hbm5vdW5jZXMtbGF3LWVuZm9yY2VtZW50LWZvci1rZWxseS1zYXlzLWZlbnRhbnlsLWFuZC1iYWlsLXJlZm9ybS10b3AtcHJpb3JpdGllcy8iLCJyIjoiOTA4Mzc2NTQtNTk5Mi00ZWU3LWJlNjctM2JjNjBhMjVhNTcyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0)

Healey just had to declare a state of emergency because so many illegal immigrants are there because they have sanctuary policies.” [Read the full article from the Breitbart News here.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/7aOgOzBev/c?w=D-GIbnLk853y0TAB5-UxQ-Rtg1ZPpnIQ24TcSvRT9fE.)

body:
Trump tells MAGA mob to “fight like hell” for the White House in 2024
| **_Trump’s latest statements spell a DISASTER for democracy:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Donald_Trump_Approval/?source=VPP_20230918_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=10508%2E878179%2ETQv8B7) Donald Trump is sending dog whistles to his MAGA supporters, saying they have to “fight like hell” to take over the White House in 2024.

...and we’re FRIGHTENED because in the face of this some Democrats are _switching_ teams! [**We need to know the truth:**
**Do you APPROVE of Donald Trump?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Donald_Trump_Approval/?source=VPP_20230918_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=10508%2E878179%2ETQv8B7) | [NO, ABSOLUTELY NOT! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Donald_Trump_Approval/?source=VPP_20230918_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=10508%2E878179%2ETQv8B7)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Obsessed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
What they are up to is nuts.
#
Derek, the GOP TOTALLY has their priorities straight. 🙄
Because House Republicans can’t agree on ANYTHING, we’re 13 days away from a government shutdown, impacting things like Social Security + veterans benefits. On top of that, we found out last week that child poverty has *doubled* over the last year, because the Expanded Child Tax Credit expired.
**But instead of focusing on literally ANY solution for any of this, Republicans decided they’d spend their time today attacking me for how I dress.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230918-1?refcode=em20230918-2&refcode2=8568_434096_cZ4vnt&akid=8568%2E434096%2EcZ4vnt)
**[While they’re obsessing over my clothes, I’m focused on the big problems that the working people of PA sent me to the Senate to solve instead. Chip in today to help me keep up that work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230918-1?refcode=em20230918-1-8568&refcode2=8568_434096_cZ4vnt&akid=8568%2E434096%2EcZ4vnt)**
What they are up to is nuts. From Fox News to Congress to the presidential campaign trail, they’re talking about *me* instead of keeping the government working for everybody.
I’m not here to play games or judge anyone on their appearance -- you sent me to DC to fight for working folks, and that’s what I’m going to do.
**[But I need your support to keep up the fight-- would you consider chipping in today? Your support really matters.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230918-1?refcode=em20230918-1-8568&refcode2=8568_434096_cZ4vnt&akid=8568%2E434096%2EcZ4vnt)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230918-1?refcode=em20230918-8568&refcode2=8568_434096_cZ4vnt&akid=8568%2E434096%2EcZ4vnt)**
THANK YOU 🙏
-- John 💛
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230918-8568-footer&t=1&refcode2=8568_434096_cZ4vnt&akid=8568%2E434096%2EcZ4vnt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8568%2E434096%2EcZ4vnt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8568%2E434096%2EcZ4vnt)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

I owe you. _Seriously._

Missouri could be one of the closest Senate races in America.

_In fact, control of the Senate could come down to us._ Staying on track with our far-Left opponents hasn’t been easy, but grassroots patriots like you have shown up to the challenge.

**But as much as I appreciate the grassroots support we’ve gotten so far, we’re still not fully caught up to my woke opponents.**

It’s not just my challengers that are focused on turning Missouri blue: **the entire Democrat establishment, from George Soros to Chuck Schumer, has their eyes on us.**

**If we’re going to win, we need to EXPAND and STRENGTHEN our grassroots team, and I’m counting on you.**

I know you’ll do whatever it takes to take back the Senate, and that’s why I trust you, Friend.

clean_body: | | | I owe you. Seriously. Missouri could be one of the closest Senate races in America. In fact, control of the Senate could come down to us. Staying on track with our far-Left opponents hasn’t been easy, but grassroots patriots like you have shown up to the challenge. But as much as I appreciate the grassroots support we’ve gotten so far, we’re still not fully caught up to my woke opponents. It’s not just my challengers that are focused on turning Missouri blue: the entire Democrat establishment, from George Soros to Chuck Schumer, has their eyes on us. If we’re going to win, we need to EXPAND and STRENGTHEN our grassroots team, and I’m counting on you. I know you’ll do whatever it takes to take back the Senate, and that’s why I trust you, Friend. Any amount you can spare is VITAL to this race. I cannot begin to describe how much I appreciate you and all you’ve done so far for this campaign. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: [READ THIS TODAY:] Only a few days left to ensure Congress doesn't gut environmental protections and programs
body:
Time sensitive

Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled https://links.messages.lcv. ).

The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now.

Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now.

In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen.

Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters.

This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises.

Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline:

Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.

The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including:
Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution
Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040
Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_

Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9975447&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTgyMDQxNTU2MwS2&spReportId=MTgyMDQxNTU2MwS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9975447&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTgyMDQxNTU2MwS2&spReportId=MTgyMDQxNTU2MwS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_ https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9975447&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTgyMDQxNTU2MwS2&spReportId=MTgyMDQxNTU2MwS2

**URGENTGRAM**
**FREEDOM WATCH NEEDS YOUR STRONG PRAYERS AND FINANCIAL SUPPORT** Dear Fellow Patriot: At a time when the Biden Justice Department and its equally corrupt FBI are terrorizing ordinary Americans to not rise up peacefully and legally against Joe Biden and the Left for having destroyed the country in two and one-half years, your Freedom Watch has become your real Justice Department. **Our actions on behalf of the American people are unparalleled. Unlike other so-called public interest watchdogs, and RINOs in the Republican Party, we don’t just talk to get our faces on Fox News or promise things that we do not strive to deliver.** **Your Freedom Watch puts your money where our mouths are!** Here are just a few of our strong actions in recent weeks and months. **1\. We succeeded in convicting Joe, Hunter and James Biden of the crimes of bribery and Joe Biden of negligent homicide in Afghanistan. This week we will commission established law enforcement to have them arrested and if they do not, the American people, peacefully and legally, will then act to attempt citizens arrests. The Bidens were each sentenced to 20 years in prison.** **2\. Dr. Anthony Fauci is next on the legal chopping block and Freedom Watch expects a ruling shortly by the citizens judge criminally convicting him for having negligently killed over 6 million people, more than even the Third Reich during the Holocaust, by sending the Sars virus to the Communist Chinese military bioweapons lab in Wuhan, China, which then released Covid-19. If and when we get the conviction, we will ask for a sentence of life imprisonment.** **3\. Then there is our class action in Dallas, Texas against the Communist Chinese over Covid-19, for the death and destruction they have caused along with Fauci.**
**4\. Freedom Watch has two class actions for the peaceful January 6, 2021 protesters who are being forced into confessions and sent to prison, to quell all dissent, as if this were Iran, North Korea or Russia.********5\. In addition, we also have sued the Islamic Republic of Iran over its paying bounties to have the Taliban kill our brave servicemen in Iraq and Afghanistan. This is in contrast to Biden, as the bribed criminal he is, having just released 6 billion dollars to the mullahs which will be used to kill more Americans and others.****** These are just a few of our hard-hitting actions on behalf of you and your loved ones! We need to hire more lawyers, paralegals, and others to continue our proven success on your behalf. **Your Freedom Watch does not just get documents, we seek justice!** [**Please click below to donate today, as we are your real Justice Department.**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=79eb9c934f&e=8edd2b8f7d)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I’m proud to stand with striking auto workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Will you join me by signing on to the UAW’s petition for a new contract?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36548?t=1&akid=3799%2E614464%2EnLVFxV)
Peter,
American auto workers have seen their average real hourly earnings fall 19.3% since the 2008 taxpayer-funded auto bailout. Meanwhile, pay for CEOs at the Big 3 auto companies is up 40% — all while they’re handing out $66 BILLION in stock buybacks and dividends to their shareholders.
**So now, auto workers across the United States are striking for a new contract.** They’re fighting for fair wages, job security, and to protect the middle-class way of life they’ve spent decades building and defending in our country.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36548?t=2&akid=3799%2E614464%2EnLVFxV)
**I was proud to stand in solidarity with striking auto workers from UAW Local 2250 at the GM plant in Wentzville on Friday.[So today I wanted to reach out and ask, will you join me in supporting these workers by signing on to the UAW’s petition for a new contract today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36548?t=3&akid=3799%2E614464%2EnLVFxV)**
**[SIGN ON NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36548?t=4&akid=3799%2E614464%2EnLVFxV)**
Generations of workers just like the ones striking today fought for the workplace protections we all take for granted. We have a duty to stand with them as they fight for the fair pay, benefits, and job security they’ve earned.
In solidarity,
Lucas Kunce

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=3799%2E614464%2EnLVFxV). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
